- Along with my familiar of the night, Ozvaldo Hrafnavins, will safeguard your path ahead, for fate has revealed to me that this be decreed! ｜ 将携夜之眷属奥兹华尔多·赫芙那梵茵斯，守护你的前路。正如命运的默示录所昭告的那般！
- He said that I just needed to find some small frozen boar, and that there was no need to go too far up the mountain, so there'd be no danger at all... ｜ 他还说，只要去找那些被冰冻住的小猪就行了，不用太过深入雪山，没有任何危险…

- No one knows why the legendary gladiator wore this flower on his chest. It was the brutal warrior's only weakness. ｜ 无人知晓传奇的斗士为何始终将这朵小花戴在胸口，这是残酷的战士身上唯一的弱点。
- No wonder the Tavern is so important to the Forest... ｜ 怪不得酒馆对这个森林来说这么重要…
- You mean... this person isn't real? ｜ 你的意思是…这不是真人真事？
- Laziness is the Enemy! ｜ 偷懒是健身大忌!
- Woof, woof, woof! ｜ 汪汪汪。
- Find Anna ｜ 寻找安娜
- Industriousness is the foundation of the land of Geo. Industriousness is believing in one's own ability to earn a place in the land of the gods through sweat, wisdom, and power. ｜ 岩之国土的根基是勤劳。勤劳即为相信自己，即为相信通过汗水、智慧与力量，在诸神的土地上，人人都可以拥有自己的一席之地。
- ...Autumn, forget it. Give up. She's living a good life, and her parents are rich. What would you even do if you found her? ｜ …小秋，放弃吧。她现在过得很好，她的父母很有财力，你找到她又能做什么呢？

- Checkmate! ...Still, it's been a while since someone tested me this much. ｜ 将军。哼，但能把我逼到这个地步，还真是不简单啊。
- By my calculations, I need to work 48 more years to pay it back... without sleeping and eating. ｜ 按这么算的话，我的打工赎身生涯差不多还剩下48年吧…当然，是不吃不喝不睡的前提下…

- Increases all party members' Max HP by 22% for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色生命值上限提升22%，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。

- Thank you all very much. I promise you that I will create a bright future for Inazuma. ｜ 非常感谢你们，我向你们保证，我会给稻妻一个光明的未来。
- Two gatherings of monsters should be loitering somewhere ahead. They seem to have amassed a sizable inventory of damaged weapons to hoard within their camps, though I'm uncertain as to why. ｜ 前面是两处魔物聚集地，这群魔物四处搜集了不少破损的武器，放在营地里不知作何用途。
- Obtained from Limited-Time Event ｜ 限时活动获取
- So, you've got to engage more with the people around you. Some drinking and chatting is the way to keep well, physically and mentally. ｜ 所以啊，还是要多和身边的人接触，喝喝酒，谈谈天，才能维持身心的舒畅。
- Headspace Capture ｜ 顶空集香
- Well, remember when you asked me if I knew how to meet the Dendro Archon? Even though I don't know how, I think I've actually seen her before. ｜ 派蒙，你之前问我知不知道如何求见草神大人，我虽然不知道办法，但我觉得，我曾经是「见过」草神大人的。
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>So apparently, some detectives in Fontaine manage to solve cases without ever setting foot outside their homes. They call them "armchair detectives"...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>That's what they call "working from home," right? Sounds pretty cushy.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Still, how do they figure out the truth if they never even go to the crime scene? ...Oh, Paimon knows! They must be using divination.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>You're thinking of fortune-tellers, Paimon. Not detectives.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Oh... yeah...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>In any case, surely the evidence isn't just dropping itself off at the detective's doorstep.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>You mean... Oh, the detective must have people collecting information for them...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Perhaps, or... Maybe they post commissions at the Adventurers' Guild?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Huh? But... that would mean the detective gets all the credit for our hard work! Bet they make a tidy sum of Mora off of it, too! Hmph, Paimon won't stand for that. Let's go have a little talk with Detective Armchair right now! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>听说枫丹廷有足不出户就能解明真相的侦探。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>这就是所谓的居家办公吧？听起来很轻松呢！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不过话说回来，不亲自去现场调查，究竟是靠什么推理出真相的呢…啊，我知道了！一定是用占卜吧？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那应该叫占卜师而不是侦探吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>对、对哦…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>案件的线索可不会自己长脚还专程到侦探府上拜访。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>也就是说，一定有人帮侦探收集线索…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>说不定我们在冒险家协会接到的委托里有一部分就是…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸？那原本应该给我们的报酬岂不是会被侦探拿走一部分？那可不行！我们现在就去找侦探抗议！
- And the first stone slate tells us that long ago, the Hydro Archon used her power to turn Oceanids into humans... ｜ 而在第一块石板所描绘的画面中，古早时期水神的神力之下，纯水精灵们变成了人类…

- A brash and fearless black-and-white piebald cat that seems to be filled with curiosity about everything around it. Others say that it likes to use its agile tail to express itself, so if you'd like to break the ice, why not start with its tail? ｜ 莽撞胆大且无所畏惧的黑白色花猫，似乎对身边发生的一切都充满了好奇心。据说，它喜欢用那灵动的尾巴直率地表达自己的情绪，因此与它的破冰之旅，不如就先从尾巴开始吧？
- Take care of those annoying Bullet Barnacles! ｜ 解决很烦人的子弹藤壶！
- #{NICKNAME}, let's go underwater and check it out. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，要不我们去水下看看吧？
- The Lost Child ｜ 迷失的孩子
- I've been working out this whole time, and I've even been training with Karima.. She's never gonna catch me again in a race! ｜ 我一直都在锻炼，还和卡里玛一起训练了很久…她都已经快要跑不过我啦。

- Meow. ｜ 喵。
- "Best wishes and good health to my parents and everybody here at Mondstadt." ｜ 「希望我不在的时候，父母身体健康，一切平安。蒙德的大家也一样。」
- Huh, looks like this path has come to an end... ｜ 唔…这边好像已经没路可走了欸…
- We also have some Mora on us, which I hope you won't mind having. It's not a lot, but we weren't counting on needing outside "help" like this either... ｜ 另外呢，我和同僚们也凑了些摩拉，希望两位不会嫌弃…唉，毕竟这种意外而来的「帮助」，事先并没有算进预算里…
- The stage is now set for the final act! Ahh, I'm so excited, I could cry! ｜ 终幕的舞台现在已经开放了！激动！感动！啊！

- ...And there's also Lizard Tail and Onikabuto. ｜ …然后还有蜥蜴尾巴味和鬼兜虫味。
- Fundamentally speaking, there's little difference between snow and rain, yet people lavish praise only upon the former... Fate can be truly arbitrary. ｜ 明明和雨没什么区别，却讨人喜欢多了…真是人各有命。
- Lan Yan's Constellation Activation Material ｜ 蓝砚的命之座激活素材
- Paimon's noticed that something's bugging you. Is it the Extravaganza? 'Cause Paimon's starting to think that there's more than meets the eye here, too... ｜ 刚刚我总觉得你有什么心事，难道也是在思考学院庆典的问题？听迪希雅和坎蒂丝说完之后，我也感觉这背后好像藏着一些秘密…
- Well received. I'm on the case. ｜ 好的，我这就去办。
- Alpha Pose ｜ 叉腰
- I'll just say it now by the by, I won't marry anyone unless they can go a round with me and win. It's as simple as that. ｜ 顺带一提，我择偶的标准也很简单，只要能在掰手腕上赢过我就行了，就这么简单。
- No, that will not do. I have taught them well. Unless you prove yourselves, they will not trust you. ｜ 不，这还不够，我把他们教得很好。除非你们能够证明自己，否则他们绝对不会信任你们。
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- Ai yai yai... The fog is long scattered, and long scattered is the fog! Yet who has not boarded? The lady of the golden hall shall be angry. Most angry... ｜ 唉呀呀…雾散久矣，雾散久矣…谁还没有上船呀…金色屋子的女主人会生气的呀…
- Pankration ｜ 拳力斗技
- "A Very Warm Place" ｜ 「特别温暖的地方」
- Namecard style.\nWith magnificent sunglow sheds light on the night sky, chimes are orchestrated to celebrate the bygone year. The gilded palaces are adorned with beaded curtains, the railings painted silver by bright moonlight, and the feasts brimmed with jolly singing and dances. Is that flowers or fireworks? A wealth of instruments plays in unison, harmonious and pleasant. ｜ 名片纹饰。\n霞明玉映海灯天，今宵共奏华年。金殿珠帘，月彻银栏，虹歌流彩绣筵。花如烟。瑟彼清弦，鸾笙瑶管，和乐且湛。
- The first Skill used or first Talent equipped by each of your characters per Round will cost 1 less Elemental Die. ｜ 我方每个角色每回合使用的第一个技能或装备的第一张天赋的元素骰费用-1。
- Hmph. Look who's finally developed a conscience. ｜ 哼，亏你还有点良知。
- Equipment Card ｜ 装备牌
- Check unviewed tutorials ｜ 查看未浏览的教程
- Certified Player Paban, a newsy who sells The Steambird, and considered the Court of Fontaine's own miniature "Know-It-All" by some others his age. Paban has recently taken to playing Genius Invokation TCG with those who come to him for information, offering them the following deal: If he wins, his opponent must become his distributor. Unfortunately, Paban is not particularly skilled, and newspaper distribution plans remain far beyond his meager capabilities, so it won't be easy for him to realize his plans anytime soon... ｜ 协会认证牌手帕班，售卖《蒸汽鸟报》的报童，被部分同龄人视为枫丹廷的小小万事通。最近帕班常常与前来打听消息的人玩七圣召唤，并与对方约定，如果他赢了，对方就要在以后成为自己的报纸分销商。可惜帕班的牌技不算出彩，分销报纸的企划对于他来说也太过复杂，一时半会儿没法实现…
- Oh, it's simple! Come closer, and I'll let you in on my secret... Magicians have a special skill called "telepathy," which means we can read other people's minds. ｜ 很简单。嘘…悄悄告诉你，其实魔术师都会「读心术」，可以轻松看穿一个人内心藏着的秘密。
- Exile's Pocket Watch ｜ 流放者怀表
- Good. In that case, let's first pay Madame Ping a visit in the city before heading out to Jueyun Karst. ｜ 好。去绝云间之前，我们先到城里拜会一下萍姥姥吧。

- How do you like it here? ｜ 在这里还习惯吗？
- They're usually pretty wary of outsiders, but not so with students of the Akademiya. It's because the kind of goods that students are looking for aren't the kind of goods the Eremites are after. As long as they know you're a student, then deals can be made. ｜ 虽说他们对陌生人很警觉，但其实并不排斥学生。因为学生要的货他们一般不要。只要向他们表明身份，就还有的谈。
- "Free"'s the highest price of them all... ｜ 免费的才是最贵的…

- What? You're exaggerating! You know, I'm not always in fear of Lady Yae rushing my writing! ｜ 哪里有这么夸张啊！我也不是时时刻刻都害怕被八重大人催稿的！
- Ahem, I've gone too far... Anyway, Aderfi had been our point of contact, and he was in charge of everything that had to do with trade. ｜ 咳咳，扯多了、扯多了…总之，阿德菲是我们的联络人，我们的物资交易一直由他负责。
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- "That's... How should I put this? I think this has nothing at all to do with the phlogiston pattern, and in any case, you really shouldn't be taking your clothes off in public spaces..." ｜ 「这个…怎么说呢，我觉得这已经和燃素图案没有任何关系了，总之你还是不要随便在公开场合脱衣服比较好…」
- ...Ah, that reminds me, are you familiar with the historical event in Fontaine known as the "Perfume Mania"? ｜ …说起来，你们知道枫丹历史上的「香水狂热」吗？
- That way, we can minimize casualties. ｜ 就可以尽量减少伤亡了。
- Thank you, Chef Mao. ｜ 谢谢卯师傅。
- Did you learn them from Cloud Retainer? ｜ 该不会是师从留云借风…
- Investigate the ruin ｜ 调查遗迹
- We have emergency stockpiles of things like water, food, and medicine, but what if we'll need them even more in the future...? ｜ 除了药，食物和水这类东西虽然有应急储备，但谁也不知道接下来会怎么样…
- Paimon wants to be number one too! Uh, wait... Why would Paimon wanna fight you to be Sorush's "willing instrument," anyway? ｜ #我也要当第一号！等等…我为什么要跟{NICKNAME}争这个？我们才不是供斯露莎「驱使」的什么手下啦！
- What gift could I get you, Sister Sorush? ｜ 斯露莎姐姐想要什么谢礼呢？
- Oh? You found some already. ｜ 嗯？你已经找来了啊。
- Is it Paimon, or does it sound like they think you work for them? ｜ 她们好像偷偷把你卖了呢…
- That's okay, everyone's input counts. Keeping it seasonal and suitable for all ages sounds like a pretty good idea to Paimon. ｜ 倒也不是没有参考价值呢，适合时节、老少咸宜的菜肴，的确是个好选择。
- The winds have come at an opportune moment. Let's seize this chance. ｜ 正好有风吹过，现在是最好的时机。
- Whoa... What a gigantic Ruin Guard! Huh? Is that a cave behind it? ｜ 哇…好大的一台遗迹守卫！欸？在它后面是不是有个山洞呀？

- Artifact Set ｜ 圣遗物套装
- Did you ask him why he wanted to purchase this item from you? ｜ 那你有问他为什么想要收集这套牌背吗？
- ...Or at least let's... y'know, discuss it first? Can't hurt for you to get a second opinion. ｜ 至少…您也应该，先听听大家的想法吧？
- Grateful? Why? ｜ 感谢我？为什么？
- Talk to Granny Ruoxin ｜ 与若心对话
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- This harbor is like a mountain of dry tinder. One spark and the fire will consume us all. ｜ 这座港口，就和柴火堆一样。只要一点火星，火就要止不住了。
- Windtrace Coins - Signaling Device Repair Bonus ｜ 维修发信机的「迷踪币」加成
- Don't forget, if you ever need an Outrider, just come find me! ｜ 遇到需要侦察骑士出马的场合，就尽管交给我好了！
- The Withering, Eleazar, and the sandstorms... Don't you think what is happening right now across Sumeru is rather similar to the forbidden knowledge pollution that occurred in the desert thousands of years ago? ｜ 再结合当下的种种现象，死域、魔鳞病、沙尘暴…你们不觉得，与千年前那场沙漠中的「禁忌知识污染」很像么？
- Albedo, is this the way down? ｜ 阿贝多，这里是下山的路吗？
- So... you're gonna head five hundred years in the future to serve as the Pyro Archon again... ｜ 也就是说，姐姐需要前往五百年后的未来，履行火神的职责…

- Message ｜ 留言

- Oh, okay... So, have you found any clues? ｜ 原来如此，那你们找到什么线索了吗？
- I—I'm not good at dealing with strangers... Anyway, as long as the ingredient gets into the right hands, that's all that matters... ｜ 我…我不擅长和陌生人打交道，只要材料能平安送到就可以了…
- Still, if you're in a hurry, you can go out and find him wherever he happens to be gathering inspiration from! Let me mark where he said he was going for you. ｜ 不过，你们要是着急，先去采风的地点找他吧！他之前好像说要去这里来着，我为你们标出来吧！
- From our cooperation thus far, I've observed a massive gap in the "degree of organization." ｜ 交流到现在，我的直观感受是「组织度」上的差距。

- A gigantic barrel-shaped wooden structure with shockingly large valves, commonly found in Fontaine's countryside. While they generally serve as water tanks now, such barrels were originally designed for the brewing and easy retrieval of large quantities of various liquors that required extended fermentation periods. With the rise in popularity of a new drink called Fonta in Fontaine, the sales of alcoholic beverages have declined, resulting in reduced demand for these casks from the distilleries. Consequently, the barrel manufacturers have had to sell them at a low price to people living in the wilderness who lacked access to the water supply system. This has made these casks one of the most recognizable landmarks in the countryside of Fontaine. ｜ 伫立在枫丹野外的木制桶形建筑，容积巨大，装有尺寸惊人的阀门，常被人们当成水箱使用。实际上，这种木桶最初的设计目的，是大量酿造并及时取用各种需要长期发酵的酒类。由于名为枫达的饮品强势闯入了枫丹市场，酒类的销量相对衰减，酒厂对这类木桶的需求也大大减少，制作了木桶的厂家只好将它们低价抛售给居住在野外，并未享受完善供水系统服务的民众，使得它们成为了枫丹野外标志性的建筑之一。

- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 4 consecutive strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nDrains Stamina over time to perform continuous spinning attacks against all nearby opponents.\nAt the end of the sequence, performs a more powerful slash. \n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nPlunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多四段的连续挥砍。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n持续消耗体力，旋转大剑攻击周围的敌人。\n停止旋转时，会进行一次格外有力的挥砍。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成范围伤害。

- We don't know that for sure! Maybe... maybe your body is still in one piece! Yeah, these two planks are probably just, um... part of your... family tree! ｜ 那还不一定呢！说不定，说不定「大肉丸」的身躯还好好的，碰到这两块木板只是…「触类拔萃」！
- Alright, let's go and find those materials! ｜ 走吧！去找他要的东西！
- Unlike what the rest of the world may think, Tartaglia was not born with his exceptional skills in battle.\nBut he would never speak to anyone about that critical, fateful encounter of his...\nWhen he was 14, he fled his monotonous life at home with nothing but a shortsword and a bag of bread in hand.\nThat 14-year-old boy got lost in the snowy forest.\nPursued by bears and wolf packs, he lost his footing and fell into a bottomless crack in the earth's surface.\nThere, he witnessed the endless possibilities of another ancient world. There, he would meet a mysterious swordswoman...\nOr perhaps one should say that this dark realm had sensed the burning ambition in this boy's heart.\nThis darkness was something that the Harbinger Childe could never again delve into.\nIn those three months, the swordswoman taught Tartaglia how to pass through the Abyss unhindered, and more importantly, nurtured the ability to stir up endless havoc from within Ajax's trouble-mongering nature.\nNo one knew what happened within that darkness during those three months, nor would Ajax ever speak of this to anyone.\nWhen his worried mother and sisters finally found him in that forest, only 3 days had passed in this world.\nThus did Ajax's first adventure end, with his now-rusty shortsword in hand.\nThis would mark the end of his youth and the beginning of his days as a warrior. ｜ 与世人所想不同，达达利亚的战技绝非生而知之。\n但至关重要的那次经历，达达利亚绝不会对他人提起——\n十四岁那年，为了逃离一成不变的家庭，少年携着小小的短剑和一小袋面包出走。\n十四岁那年，轻狂的少年迷失在雪林之间。\n被巨熊与群狼追逐，他失足落入了深不见底的黑色裂隙。\n在那里，他见识到了另一个古旧世界的无限可能；在那里，他偶遇了一位神秘剑客。\n或者不如说，黑暗的国度注意到了野心勃勃的少年…\n那是日后成为愚人众执行官的「公子」，也无法再次探知底细的黑暗。\n在三个月的时间里，剑客把畅行深渊的得意之术一并教授给他。\n而更重要的是，在这三个月间，从他嗜好动荡的本性中，生长出了挑起无尽斗争的能力。\n没人知道那三个月的黑暗中究竟发生了什么，阿贾克斯后来也对这段经历闭口不提。\n但当心急如焚的母亲与姐妹终于在树林中寻到他时，「世间的时间」才不过流逝了三天。\n手握着已然锈迹斑斑的短剑，少年就这样完成了他的第一次冒险。\n这是少年生涯的结束，也是武者之路的开始。

Made from classy-looking metal, under the right lighting, it gleams like shining Mora.\nWith this special trophy, you can get unlimited refills of refreshing Fonta at designated machines, drinking to your heart's content, and become the most satisfied enjoyer of fine drinks in the world... ｜ 以教练身份参加「拳力斗技」娱乐赛，指导格内薇芙和布瓦列特夺得冠军后赢得的奖杯。以美观的金属制成，在特定的光照条件下，呈现出摩拉般华丽的色泽。\n拥有这座特殊的奖杯，就能在特定的机器上无限兑换清爽的枫达，尽情畅饮，成为世界最满足的饮品享受者…
- There aren't a lot of adventurers out there investigating... ｜ 去野外调查的冒险家似乎不多…
- On the edge of a thick and eerie forest, two wise and learned sages happen upon a Hydro Eidolon, wandering alone... ｜ 在幽深诡异的密林边缘，两位兼具学识与胆量的智者，发现了一位落单的水形幻灵…

- Thank you, everyone! Thank you so much! The blessings you gave me are more precious than any treasure, and more beautiful than any fairytale! ｜ 谢谢大家，谢谢你们所有人！你们给予我的祝福，比任何东西都要宝贵，比任何童话都要美丽！

- Your resistance to the corrupting power of the Abyss is truly remarkable. It would easily make you an all-important figure in the upcoming battle. ｜ 你对于深渊的抗性实在是令人印象深刻，在这场战斗中，肯定能发挥举足轻重的力量。

- Somewhere in the Veluriyam Mirage, you and Paimon run into a cheerful researcher who invites you to play a game... ｜ 在「琉形蜃境」的某地，你与派蒙撞见了一位开朗的学者，她正忙于抒发自己的情感，并邀请你们试玩某种游戏…

"But faced with such a slippery, shameless foe... Surely even for {REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}, this is a fight that cannot be w..." ｜ #正当邪恶的暴徒将要跃入部族防卫阵地的时候！哐——哐——尾巴上系着红丝巾的救星突然现身。「怎么会在这里？」比黑曜石更坚固的双爪，无论怎样的土石都能轻易击碎，「但对手的柔韧程度更甚无赖的脸皮，{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}的胜算…」

- A sly animal as elusive as a fairy that often appears in folk stories, symbolizing unusual cunning and ancient memories.\nIts coat of thick, white fur helps conceal it amongst the snow. Living in harsh environments has sharpened both its wits and sense of smell. \nEven in the jade fields of the Realm Within, the whereabouts of the Snow Foxes are constantly changing and unpredictable. They sometimes jump out of the bushes suddenly, giving Tubby a shock and waking her from her slumber. ｜ 精灵般隐匿的狡黠生灵，在民话传说中拥有奇特的智慧与悠远的记忆。\n为了隐身在风雪之中，而长出了厚厚的白色皮毛。尽管生活在更加艰难的环境中，却因此变得更加机敏、嗅觉也更为敏锐。\n即便在翠色弥漫的壶中洞天，雪狐们的行踪也灵动叵测。有时它们会突然从灌木丛中钻出来，吓得阿圆一个激灵，睡意全无。

- This tented-roof pavilion is a perfect place to sit and cool down in the shade, or to watch the stars while reciting poetry.\nUsually, a pavilion like this would come with a table for drinks and snacks so that people can sit and drink tea or wine and enjoy a few nibbles while admiring the view. But the view in this realm is so stunningly beautiful that one could admire it all night long. So, to avoid encouraging heavy drinkers to spend all night drinking in the pavilion, Tubby has taken the liberty of removing the table. ｜ 这种攒尖凉亭是夏日乘凉，观星吟诗的绝佳去处。\n但壶中洞天的景致秀美，为防某位酒鬼兴起，在凉亭中喝到酩酊大醉，阿圆撤走了茶桌和茶椅。

- A group of Forest Rangers was patrolling the Avidya Forest. Asti and Beydim were responsible for surveying the surrounding environment. While advancing, they discovered monsters ahead and ended up getting caught in a downpour, with the rain making the ground so muddy that they were temporarily stranded.\n\nAsti sent Beydim out to the other team of Forest Rangers with the intention of reminding them to stay vigilant. Then Asti hid in a tree until the monsters left.\n\nLater, following Beydim, the other team of Forest Rangers successfully rendezvoused with Asti. Afterward, they quickly left the forest. However, of their number, only Beydim was soaking wet. Why was that? ｜ 一群巡林员正在道成林中巡逻，阿斯蒂和佩迪姆负责勘察周围的环境。但在前进时发现了猛兽，天降暴雨，周围太过泥泞，无法快速离开。\n\n阿斯蒂让佩迪姆告诉后方的另外一队巡林员提高警惕，自己则躲在了树上，直到野兽离去。\n\n过了一段时间，佩迪姆带领另外一队巡林员前来会合。随后他们迅速离开了林子，但只有佩迪姆全身都湿透了。请问这是为什么？
- Alright... Grab the gloves, and don't forget the board. ｜ 好…这个手套带上，这个滑板也带上。
- A hat once worn by the witch who dreamt of burning away all of the demons in the world. The large brim blocked her sight. ｜ 曾经梦想烧尽世间魔物的炎之魔女曾经戴过的帽子。宽大的帽檐能遮挡她的视线。

- We've waited a long time for this day to come... The sun and the moon no longer shine here. All you see now is cracks in this desiccated land. But, fate has finally dealt me a hand to play against the Akademiya. ｜ 我们等这一天太久太久了，日月光辉不再，大地残破龟裂…而今，命运将这张对付教令院的底牌发到我手中。

- A black-and-red rug with origins shrouded in mystery, it features a very novel design: Using four cards of various dimensions overlapping one another to create a kind of distorted visual effect, it makes the viewers witnesses to a wondrous magic card trick. Unlike conventional round or rectangular rugs, this sort of asymmetrical rug design leaves visitors with a feeling of novelty, and leaves them looking forward to all sorts of new and wondrous experiences and things — such as creative new cuisines. ｜ 来历成谜的地毯，以红与黑两种颜色为主色，采用了别出心裁的不规则设计——将尺寸不一的四张「纸牌」相互交叠，达成一定的视觉错位效果，从而营造出纸牌魔术般的奇妙场景。与常规的圆形或矩形地毯不同，这种不对称的地毯结构会令客人萌生一种奇妙的新鲜感，并期待接下来可能看到的种种新奇事物——比如独具匠心的美食。

- The following effect will trigger every 10s: The equipping character will gain <color=#99FFFFFF>0.045%</color> Energy Recharge for each point of Elemental Mastery they possess for 12s, with nearby party members gaining 30% of this buff for the same duration. Multiple instances of this weapon can allow this buff to stack. This effect will still trigger even if the character is not on the field. ｜ 每10秒，产生如下效果：装备者的每点元素精通，都会为该角色提升<color=#99FFFFFF>0.045%</color>元素充能效率，并基于该提升的30%为队伍中附近的其他角色提升元素充能效率，持续12秒，多件同名武器产生的此效果可以叠加。角色处于队伍后台时也能触发效果。
- Good Night ｜ 晚安…
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param10:P}/{param11:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param10:P}/{param11:P}
- Hidden in the golden sandstorm, the eternal oasis was devoid of life. The oldest ruler of all plants, whom no Aranara had had the pleasure of meeting, lay dormant in the sand. ｜ 隐蔽在金色的沙暴当中的永恒绿洲，其中没有任何生命。没有兰那罗有幸面见的，一切草木最古老的主宰，蛰伏在黄沙之中。
- Memories: Earthshaking Dragon II ｜ 追忆：摇撼山岳之龙 II
- What? You can't grow up with me? How can I be without you? ｜ 什么？你们不能和我一起长大吗？我怎么能没有你们呢？
- When did he die? What happened to him? ｜ 那是什么时候的事？到底发生了什么？
- Does the Maritime Express run out of Constellation Metropole? ｜ 海上列车是从星轨王城开过来的吗？
- Aragaru ｜ 兰迦鲁
- I wrote all five of our names inside the lantern. You know, during the annual Lantern Rite, we all release a lantern like this. ｜ 我在霄灯里面写上了我们五个人的名字，其实每一年海灯节的时候，我们都会放一盏这样的灯。
- Anyway, don't change the subject. We've performed the experiment as we agreed... ｜ 你不要支开话题哦，我们按照约定，帮你测试了装置。
- Really? Really, really? I know you've never lied to me before, but... ｜ 真的吗？真的是真的吗？虽然卡特哥哥从来没骗过我，但是…
- The moment I think upon those magnificent Khaenri'ahn machines, my heart flies upon those thoughts into the depths of the desert... ｜ 想到那些宏伟的坎瑞亚遗迹机关，我的心已经飞到了沙漠深处…
- No matter. Hand the Gnosis over. Now. Don't make me take it from you. ｜ 无论是哪一种，现在都快把「神之心」交出来吧，别让我自己来取！
- "A game of cards is great every once in a while — let's unwind and forget all our worries!"\nKaveh's deck contains large numbers of Location Cards with high costs. He can play Location Cards normally to obtain advantages, or he can use "Kaveh"'s Skills to discard high-cost cards from his Deck to deal lots of DMG. ｜ 「偶尔打打牌，放松一下，忘掉所有烦心事吧！」\n【提示】卡维的牌组包含了大量高费用的「场地」卡牌，既能正常打出场地牌积累资源优势，又能通过「卡维」的技能从牌库中弃置高费卡牌来造成高额伤害。
- No, he's still not responding. ｜ 不行，阿加霞，还是什么反应都没有。
- I see. Yes, she's always had great analytical skills. It'd be nice if she was more confident, though. ｜ 原来如此。她的分析能力一直都很出色，要是更自信就好了。
- Well, it's not like it can be helped. Better safe than sorry, as they say. In any case, we can't have another disaster here at The Chasm. We owe you a ton of thanks as well for solving the problem this time. Though I stand guard here, I do so with a hopeful heart for our future. ｜ 也是没办法的事情，防范未然嘛。毕竟层岩巨渊可经不起第二次折腾了。也感谢你们解决了这里的问题，虽然我还是在这里站岗，但是接下来的日子多少有了盼头。
- See you! Trust the lord and you'll turn a big profit! ｜ 再见！相信老爷，大家都能赚大钱！
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Ah, but it's getting late, isn't it? My dear Xingyan might be calling it a night soon, in fact. What would you like to ask her? ｜ 这大晚上的，我家星燕也要休息了，你找她有什么事吗？
- I'd like to give them a shot, just to see if there's any demand, but I'm not sure about the price point... ｜ 我想进一些过来试着卖卖看，但就是不知道价钱怎么样…
- He's presently out on business. His official stamp is needed before your materials can enter our expenses calculation system. ｜ 现在他正在出外勤，不在办公室里，您的这份材料必须要盖上他的公章，才能进入我们的报销流程。
- "I'd Rather Lose Money Myself..." ｜ 「看到那小子挣钱…」
- In which case, why head back now? ｜ 难道还有走回头路的必要吗？
- Natlan Remarkable Chest Reward ｜ 纳塔地区奇馈宝箱奖励
- So I thought, why not give him the soil as a toy gift? ｜ 我就想，既然他有这么新奇的点子，不如就把这泥土当做玩具送给他。
- The poor lad can't leave his post to chase after them, so he has to make do with what's left... ｜ 因为还要站岗，他也不能去教训赤鹫，只能看着它们飞走，然后就着剩下的菜赶紧把饭吃完…
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}
- Golden Dusk Announcement ｜ 「黄金傍晚」公告
- Lucky Dog's Clover ｜ 幸运儿绿花
- Enjou ｜ 渊上
- Well, she's right over there... ｜ 寝子不就在那边吗？
- Oh? They've finally decided to enroll? Let me see! ｜ 哦？是来报名听我的课的吗？快让我看看！
- The ritual has now begun — all we can do is patiently await the result. Here's hoping Sensei will be back to his normal self very soon. ｜ 现在驱邪仪式已经开始了，我们还是安心等待结果吧。希望师父没事。
- Huh... Hold on! It's the adepti! What are you doing on the Jade Chamber? Paimon thought you were arguing with the Qixing... Is the fighting over? ｜ 咦？…啊！是仙人们！为什么你们会在「群玉阁」上？之前听说你们在和七星吵架…已经吵完了吗？
- When I grow up, I want to be a great sailor like Sinbadacus! ｜ 长大以后，我要变成辛巴达克斯那样的伟大航海家！
- What an embarrassment! Stop acting like a child and giving up whenever things don't go smoothly. How can you even call yourself a warrior? I'm ashamed to call you my brother. ｜ 丢人！白长了这么大个子，碰到一点困难就想逃跑还算是勇士吗？你这家伙居然是我的同胞哥哥。
- Receiving a Gift: I ｜ 收到赠礼·其一
- Gascon ｜ 加斯东
- Talk to Depierris ｜ 与德皮耶里对话
- If you're looking for Wolfhooks, there should be plenty nearby. ｜ 要采钩钩果的话，周围应该有很多。
- Liar. You wouldn't be doing this if that were the case. So, why? Why have you backed us into a corner? ｜ 你骗人。那你们为什么还要这么做？为什么要把我们逼上绝路？
- A banquet hall filled with a panoply of delicious food inspired by the inn at the Stadium of the Sacred Flame. It faithfully recreates a touching scene of warriors gathered together in celebration of triumph. Victory is precious and seldom comes easily, and so any site for feast and celebration must be carefully chosen. Of utmost importance is to create a relaxing yet passionate atmosphere, one that will set those present at ease and encourage the liberal flow of drink. ｜ 放置有无数美食的宴会厅，参考了圣火竞技场内餐厅的布局，还原了战士们齐聚一堂，共同庆祝胜利时的场景。无数人都认同一个道理——胜利来之不易且弥足珍贵，故而宴饮庆祝的场所，也应经过一番好好挑选。而宴饮场地最重要的特质，便是轻松且热烈的氛围，毕竟只有这样的氛围方能让人开怀畅饮，不醉不归。
- They exhausted their strength, to the point where they could no longer maintain their form, and were rejected by the Vourukasha Oasis for being tainted. ｜ 耗尽了力量而无法维持形体，又因为沾染了污秽而被花海所拒绝。
- Bundle ｜ 礼包
- What kind of relic? ｜ 是什么样的文物？
- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- They'll say something like "I won't do it again," or "I'll be careful next time," but they'll be back in a few days as if they've forgotten all about their promise... ｜ 每次被我拦住时，他们都说「下次注意」、「再也不敢了」，但没过两天就好像忘了这茬，卷土重来…
- Check Season Fortune Slip ｜ 查看本期签文
- Wave {0}/{1} - Complete ｜ 第{0}/{1}轮 挑战完成
- By the way, have you had a chance to visit Dunyarzad? How's she doing? The Homayanis haven't allowed any visitors after the festival, so we haven't been able to check on her. ｜ 说起来，你去看过迪娜泽黛了吗？她那边怎么样？后来呼玛伊家一直不允许外人进出，我们都没机会去看她。
- I mean, that's great, right? Finally, I'll be free from the judging gazes of those Sisters! ｜ 哎呀，总算是能离开这破地方，不用天天吃修女的白眼了。
- Don't mention it, Mr. Khayyam! That's what we Javans should do! ｜ 不要客气啦，海亚姆先生！这都是我们「杰万」应该做的！
- #{NICKNAME}, let's find the key and get the remedy, fast! We can't let the Water Droplet suffer too long! ｜ #{NICKNAME}，我们赶快去找钥匙，拿回解药，不要让「小水珠」难受太久！
- A complex and intricate adeptal mechanism created by the hand of Cloud Retainer that can miraculously soothe the mind, aid with sleep, and help those afflicted with amnesia find themselves.\nHowever, as its creator said: "We adepti can only help those who first resolve to help themselves." Although adeptal mechanisms are truly wondrous, they are not omnipotent. If you wish to realize your dream, you must ultimately rely upon your indefatigable efforts... ｜ 精致复杂的仙家机关，出自留云借风真君之手，有着能安神促眠，帮助失忆之人寻找自我的妙用。\n然而，诚如它的创造者所言：「人必先自助，而后仙人助之。」仙家机关虽然玄妙，但也并非万能之物，想要实现美梦，还是要依靠个人不懈的努力…
- Guess everyone's interested in history now, eh... ｜ 现在大家开始对历史感兴趣了么…
- Visit Tlazolli ｜ 拜访特拉佐莉
- So what would you like to eat? ｜ 那你想要吃什么菜？
- ...I've been transparent about my materials from the very beginning. I've already proved there's nothing wrong with them. ｜ …我早就发布过声明，证明我的用料没问题。
- Iron Ming ｜ 铁明
- Frost-Weaved Dignity ｜ 遍结寒霜的傲骨
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Easel of Wonders ｜ 奇绘画架
- The crucial elements are Shiroyama's motive and means, which we have established. ｜ 真正的关键是城山的犯罪动机和犯罪过程，这个我们已经证实了。
- Switch characters in battle to use <color=#FFE14BFF>Cryo and Electro attacks in tandem</color> to trigger Superconduct and defeat your opponents swiftly! ｜ 在实战中，通过切换角色，<color=#FFE14BFF>交替使用冰元素与雷元素攻击</color>，引发超导反应，快速消灭敌人吧！
- Ancient Engravings ｜ 古老的碑铭
- What about if... the little Oceanid is hounded to death by people who hate her, her lover makes sure her secret never gets out, and humanity continues down the path to extinction? ｜ ——水的女儿因仇恨而死，深爱她的人不再揭晓真相，人类走向灭亡。
- Wish ｜ 祈愿
- Eh? Come now, Lutong, don't jinx it... ｜ 呃？噢，见鬼…
- #That's where you're wrong — {F#she}{M#he} means just as much to us. As a member of the resistance, {F#she}{M#he}'s a comrade. I'll never surrender {F#her}{M#him} to you. ｜ #…你错了，{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_HE|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SHE]}对反抗军同样很重要。{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_HE|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SHE]}已经加入了反抗军，现在是我的部下，我不会把{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_HE|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SHE]}交出来的。
- Tristane ｜ 翠斯塔
- Yet, as time marched inexorably onward, accidents began to befall the Anemo air balloons...\nThe Keepers soon found their town was slowly losing altitude, teetering on the precipice of shattering into pieces on the mountain's summit...\nA great calamity loomed, accompanied by tremors that shook the inhabitants' hearts as well as their homes... ｜ 但随着时间流逝，货运热气球似乎遭遇了某些意外…\n守望者一族发现，小镇的高度正在下降，似乎再过不久就会坠落至山顶，摔个粉碎…\n巨大的危险正在降临，小镇损失高度的同时，小型地震般的颤动频频来袭，每位守望者都惶恐不安…
- Good day. In any case, these agents and I are acquainted. I met them when I arrived at the Court of Fontaine last night. ｜ 日安，几位探员，我们很有缘呢。昨夜我抵达枫丹廷，就见过几位了。
- Sister Victoria told me you already helped tidy up the Cathedral! Thank you so much! ｜ 辛苦你了，你帮忙打扫了教会周围对吧？我已经听维多利亚修女说了。
- A few days ago, I received a commission from an Amurta researcher who takes pictures of different places with a Kamera to perfect his Environmental Monitoring Record. When I was taking a photo {0}, I found a huge machine that had never been seen before. I wanted to photograph it in physical detail, so I went in for a closer look, and it came to life! Fortunately, I took the developing fluid and dumped it on the machine's head and made a run for it while it was dazed. If that guy's eyes keep getting covered in the fluid, it won't hurt anyone. But when I looked at it from a distance, I saw it spinning on the spot, shaking all the fluid off its head... How bothersome! ｜ 几天前，我受一位生论派学者委托，用留影机拍摄各地的景色，完善他的「环境监测档案」。结果我{0}留影时，发现了一台之前没见过的巨大机器，我想把它的身体细节拍下来，就凑近了观察，结果它居然又启动了！好在我把冲洗画片的药水泼在了它的脑袋上，趁着它看不清的时候逃远了。要是那家伙的眼睛一直被药水糊住，应该是不会伤到别人的，可我在远处看的时候，只见它在原地打起了转，脑袋上的药水全都被甩掉了…这下真的麻烦了！
- Long-Term Planning ｜ 从长计议
- A small and agile Onikabuto that prefers using long-ranged attacks and can fire off lightning bullets by combining the power of Electro into a projectile and firing it at its opponent after a short duration.\nOn the Friendly Spar and Honed Will difficulties, you can disperse the lightning bullet using rush attacks before it can be formed or aim at the fired bullet using a <color=#FFE14BFF>piercing strike</color> to reflect the projectile back at this Onikabuto.\nOn the Fanatic Passion difficulty, only executing a <color=#FFE14BFF>piercing strike</color> first can perform this reflection. Rush attacks will not be able to disperse the bullet. ｜ 小巧灵敏的鬼兜虫。倾向使用远程攻击，可以施放雷弹：将雷元素的力量凝聚为一枚弹丸，一段时间后将弹丸击向对手。\n在切磋和锐意难度中，可在雷弹被它打出前，通过突进将雷弹打散，或瞄准雷弹打出<color=#FFE14BFF>「刺挑」</color>将雷弹击向它自己。\n而在狂热难度中，仅有抢先打出<color=#FFE14BFF>「刺挑」</color>能将雷弹击向它自己，突进无法将雷弹打散 。
- Huh? I didn't know you could activate repeat mode too... ｜ 嗯？原来你也会启动复读模式…
- I'll leave the ending of the story... to you. ｜ 这个故事的结尾，就交给你来讲吧。
- Start filming ｜ 进行映影的拍摄
- ...Hmph. ｜ …哼。
- Many traditional dishes in Chenyu Vale were prepared with that in mind. ｜ 许多沉玉谷的传统菜肴就是基于这种情景烹调的。
- Machine Battlefront ｜ 筑机战阵
- A restaurant and hotel rolled into one on the outskirts of the Chuwen Fair. Provides free accommodation and food to warriors taking part in the Pilgrimage. The name was once given in the hope that warriors would leave their weariness in the inn and step into the Stadium filled with energy. It is said that every manager of this inn was selected and designated by the Speaker's Chamber. ｜ 位于楚汶市集外侧的餐厅兼旅馆，会为参加归火圣夜巡礼的战士们提供免费的住宿与吃食。之所以叫这个名字，是希望战士们将倦意留在此处，从而精神饱满地踏入竞技场。据说每一任的店主都会由「话事处」挑选并指定。
- Now Nelson likes <color=#00E1FFFF>places that are warm</color>. In fact, the last time I went looking for him, I found him in the <color=#00E1FFFF>bush next to the blacksmith</color>. So let's go look for him there. ｜ 这家伙很喜欢<color=#00E1FFFF>暖和的地方</color>…之前找它的时候，它经常趴在<color=#00E1FFFF>铁匠铺旁边的草丛</color>里，我们去那边找它吧。
- Ragged Records ｜ 残旧的记事
- Leonine Bite ｜ 炎啸狮子咬
- Ah! If that's the case, you must've been flipping through all sorts of books during our adventure these past few months. ｜ 啊，这么说来，我们一起旅行的这几个月里，你好像查过不少古籍。
- Puppy ｜ 「小狗」
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- I would have been on one of those and traveling the world right now if it weren't for my seasickness. ｜ 要是我不晕船的话，现在一定正驾驶着这样的大船在各国游历呢。
- No, I would feel sorry for the Slimes. ｜ 不，我会说史莱姆好可怜。
- Millelith Soldier ｜ 千岩军兵士
- *sigh* ...Would you just look at this seat? It's a total mess, how could one go to class like this? ｜ 唉…您瞧瞧这椅子，七倒八歪的，还哪有心思上课呀…
- Anemo ｜ 风元素
- (A damaged stone tablet. The inscription on it has been eroded by the relentless passage of time, but you can still manage to vaguely make out some of what the remaining text says...) ｜ （一尊破损的石碑，其上的铭文几乎已被无情的时光磨灭，但你仍能从残留的文字中依稀分辨出一些内容…）
- CD|{param4:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param4:F1}秒
- Finally, with a mighty plop, the fish escapes... ｜ 「砰」的一声，鱼脱钩了…
- Hmm... I think the clue about the Test of Courage is the most relevant one I have so far. ｜ 我现在觉得，试胆的线索是最有可能的。
- Cooking Ingredient ｜ 食材
- A flower born of the minerals and rocks of cliffside cracks. The way its petals blow in the wind makes it seem alive. ｜ 盛开于磐陀巨岩的金石之花。花瓣随风轻摇，似有生机。
- Yes, we've bumped into them before. ｜ 之前就遇到过他们。
- Keen Sight ｜ 眼识殊明
- Big cold person. ｜ 人很大很冰。
- Descenders? ｜ 「降临者」？
- After relentless research... ｜ 在我不懈的研究…
- #Why don't you try feeding them, {NICKNAME}? ｜ #来，{NICKNAME}，你也试着喂喂它们吧？
- Yes, I swear, I'm not making this up. The Acting Grand Master wants everyone to gather at headquarters, in the main hall. Hurry! We need to leave right now, or we'll be late! ｜ 千真万确，代理团长正召集大家去总部大厅集合呢！快点快点，再不走就要来不及了！
- Ask around in the store ｜ 在店内打听消息
- That guy keeps imitating everything I say. It's driving me nuts. ｜ 旁边那位总是学我说话，快把我烦死了。
- Despite one's lack of interest in worldly attachments, one is quite conscious indeed of the importance of "bonds." Such a simple word for a thing so profound that it all but defies articulation... Take oneself and those old fossils, for example. Ah, sometimes we go years without meeting, and even then we find no shortage of things to quarrel about at our next reunion. Yet so deep runs our bond that no matter the physical distance between us, one will never feel alone and adrift in this world... One holds you in high esteem, child, and is pleased to count you as a friend. Do you also treasure the bond we share? ｜ 本仙虽不在意身外之物，亦深谙「牵绊」二字。这二字写起来容易，个中真意却难以言说。就像本仙与那些老家伙们，有时几年才相见一次，见了面也经常吵架斗嘴，但不论彼此身在何处，都不会有漂泊无依之感。你是本仙认可的人，自然也在本仙的朋友之列，不知道你是否和本仙一样珍惜这份「牵绊」呢？
- Treasure Hoarder Hydro Potioneer ｜ 盗宝团·水之药剂师
- Sword of Narzissenkreuz ｜ 水仙十字之剑
- Right. Now that's sorted, it's time to get back to my magnum opus... ｜ 这下子，我总算有空来创作新诗了…
- We didn't find anything valuable, no... But I couldn't have stayed on that island a second longer. ｜ 虽然没找到什么有价值的东西…但我实在不想再待在那座岛上了。
- ...Sure! Bring it on! ｜ 来…来就来！

- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for setting up an Adventurer Camp.\nA campsite hastily made by adventurers deep in the wilds.\nWhen adventurers make camp, they must be sure to place a fence down to fend wild beasts off. But since the area rarely has enough wood to create complete protection, they must often keep watch on shifts and sound the alarm to avoid any slip-ups and mishaps.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Placement Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「冒险家的临时营地」的放置方法。\n深入荒野的冒险家临时建立的营地。\n冒险家们准备宿营时，需要设置围栏，以防走兽袭扰。可附近的木材往往不足以建立起完整的屏护，只能用轮流值班放哨来确保万无一失。\n使用后可进入放置界面查看。

- The guardians of the lost ancient desert ruins have power enough to punish any who would presume to disturb the pure dreams of their lord.\nThe lord of the blazing sun who once ruled this desert once promised his people a utopia on the other side of existence, though it ultimately turned out to be a mirage made of folly.\nToday, that utopia is long gone, and the dreams and oaths, forgotten by the world, are now only found in the mantras inscribed upon these machines. ｜ 失落在荒漠中的古老遗迹的守护者，其力量足以惩罚一切敢于惊扰君王清梦之人。\n统治沙海的烈日之王曾向他的子民许诺过彼岸的乐土，然而事实证明那不过是君王愚痴的妄念。\n如今「乐园」早已湮灭，只有蚀刻在这些机械上的咒文还记录着那些已被世人忘却的梦想与承诺。
- Thank you for your help! This should be enough to fill my stomach... ｜ 多谢您，这些东西就够我填饱肚子了…

- After a Charged Attack hits an opponent, a Sunfire Arrow will descend upon the opponent hit, dealing <color=#99FFFFFF>60%</color> ATK as DMG, and applying the Heartsearer effect to the opponent damaged by said Arrow for 10s. Opponents affected by Heartsearer take <color=#99FFFFFF>28%</color> more Charged Attack DMG from the wielder. A Sunfire Arrow can be triggered once every 10s. ｜ 重击命中敌人后，会向命中的敌人降下阳炎矢，造成攻击力<color=#99FFFFFF>60%</color>的伤害，并为受到阳炎矢伤害的敌人施加持续10秒的灼心效果。装备者的重击对处于灼心状态下的敌人造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>28%</color>。阳炎矢每10秒至多触发一次。
- Aha, and this is where smart, time-saving people show their worth. Now, let me guess what you're up to... ｜ 这就是会节省时间的聪明人讨人喜欢的地方了，让我猜猜你们想要做什么…

- About many things, actually... But there's nothing I can do but just keep my troubles to myself. ｜ 很多事情…只能留存在心里了，这也是没办法的事。
- If you ask me, you really lose out by being the host! Sure, you get the best seat in the house, but do you think I want to be just watching? ｜ 要我说，当主持真是吃亏！虽然能在最佳位置观赛，但我想要的是观赛吗？
- Well, at least we got to say a few words to Mr. Leroy. *sigh* I do hope he gets better soon. ｜ 这次和勒鲁瓦先生说了两句话，唉，希望他的身体快点好起来。

You will have to match the appropriate songs to the right objects for this to work out. ｜ 利用「老旧的诗琴」，在森林中有时能弹奏具有神秘力量的曲调，从而实现特殊的效果。只不过，这些「曲调」与相应曲调的「物件」是具有对应关系的，要发现合适的曲子，并对合适的事物弹奏才行。
- Hi. I was on my way, then I saw Klee. ｜ 嗯。过来路上，遇到了可莉。
- If we water them regularly to soften the soil, one day their branches might reach into the clouds. ｜ 定期浇水松土，总有一天可以长成参天大树吧。
- It's hardly their fault. I was almost drawn in by the Fungi's cute appearance once, too... Luckily, I remembered my family's stern warnings, and the suffering that previous generations once endured, so I kept my distance. ｜ 不怪他们，以前我也被蕈兽可爱的外表迷惑过…好在我还牢记着家族的教诲和祖辈们吃过的苦头，没有贸然接近它们。

- Go for it! ｜ 大胆去做。
- Someone complained that you're too loud. ｜ 有人说你们太吵了。
- The behemoth that once devoured the birthing waters of the planet has departed without a single trace, but those in the know will forever live, surely, in the terrifying shadow of that omen of the end.\nA single shard of shattered spacetime remains in this place, and through it, you may perhaps be able to witness that titanic creature once more. ｜ 曾经吞噬星球胎水的巨兽已经离开，在世界上并未留下一丝痕迹；但末日先兆的余影恐怕会永远笼罩着事件的知情者吧。\n在恶战中破碎的时空似乎有一小片落在了这里，通过它或许能够再度目睹巨兽的影像。

- An illuminated beast that dwells deep within the mountains that can use <color=#FFE14BFF>Hydro</color> and <color=#FFE14BFF>Anemo</color> simultaneously in battle. Render it Frozen while it is gathering <color=#FFE14BFF>Hydro</color>-aligned adeptal energy, before using <color=#FFE14BFF>Shatter, Melt, or other Elemental Reactions</color> to break the ice and cause it to enter an immobile state. When it is gathering <color=#FFE14BFF>Anemo</color>-aligned adeptal energy, use <color=#FFE14BFF>attacks from Elements that can react with Anemo</color> to destroy the Spiritwind Pearls summoned during the process to achieve the same advantage. ｜ 栖息于深山中的仙兽，能够同时驱使<color=#FFE14BFF>水元素</color>与<color=#FFE14BFF>风元素</color>进行战斗。在其汇集<color=#FFE14BFF>水元素</color>的仙力时将其冻结，再通过<color=#FFE14BFF>碎冰或融化等元素反应</color>将坚冰击碎，能使其暂时陷入无法行动的状态；在其汇集<color=#FFE14BFF>风元素</color>的仙力时，通过<color=#FFE14BFF>能与风元素反应的元素类型的攻击</color>，击破其唤出的灵风珠，也能取得同样的优势。

- That's right. Let's begin to leave town and see what happens. I'm sure they'll reveal themselves as soon as we make a move. ｜ 嗯，先从镇子离开。只要我们动身，他们自然就会出现。

- When the wielder is healed or heals others, they will gain a Stoic's Symbol that lasts 30s, up to a maximum of 3 Symbols. When using their Elemental Skill or Burst, all Symbols will be consumed and the Roused effect will be granted for 10s. For each Symbol consumed, gain <color=#99FFFFFF>40</color> Elemental Mastery, and 2s after the effect occurs, <color=#99FFFFFF>2</color> Energy per Symbol consumed will be restored for said character. The Roused effect can be triggered once every 15s, and Symbols can be gained even when the character is not on the field. ｜ 受到治疗或进行治疗时，将赋予一枚坚忍标记，持续30秒，至多拥有三枚坚忍标记。施放元素战技或元素爆发时，将消耗所有的坚忍标记，产生持续10秒的「奋起」效果：每枚消耗的坚忍标记提高<color=#99FFFFFF>40</color>点元素精通，并在效果产生2秒后，每枚消耗的坚忍标记为装备者恢复<color=#99FFFFFF>2</color>点元素能量。每15秒至多触发一次奋起效果；角色处于队伍后台时也能获得坚忍标记。

- A shipment transporting supplies suddenly came under Abyssal attack, becoming trapped as a result. Warriors are on-site to push the monsters back, but things look grim. Immediate help is needed! ｜ 运送物资的小队遭到了深渊魔物的突然袭击，受困于此地。虽有战士在现场进行抵抗，但情况依然不容乐观，急需支援。

- My father once told me that such ores were born from the influence of Ley Line energies, and are more valuable than Crystal Ores by far! ｜ 听我爹说，这些矿石是受到了地脉能量的影响变异而成的，这比水晶矿可珍贵多了！
- Lyney clearly reveals the details of the magic trick. Everyone in the audience is stunned. ｜ 林尼言简意赅地揭晓了魔术的手法，观众无不感到惊叹。
- Do you seriously think this marriage will bring the Kanjou Commission and the Tenryou Commission together? ｜ 难道您真心认为，结婚这件事是让勘定奉行和天领奉行站在一起吗？
- Open 160 chests in Dragonspine. ｜ 在龙脊雪山开启160个宝箱。
- Huh? People outside really thought that it was a precious gemstone? But I've even shown it to my sister before... Humans really are hard to understand... ｜ 欸？原来在外面的人类看来，那是很珍贵的宝石吗？明明我之前都拿去给姐姐看过…外面人类的想法真是搞不懂…

- So you really can do that! Then could I trouble you to bring me one Red Dye? ｜ 真掏啊？那要不然您受点累，再给一份红染料吧。
- I still remember that when that place was completed, I restarted five projects and rebuilt five devices. If I were still in the Institute, my salary would've quintupled... ｜ 我记得那个地方造好时，我足足重启了五项研究，重建了五台装置。要是放在科学院，这足够我的工资翻五倍…
- In that case... ｜ 这样的话…
- I used to think it was idiotic to leave yourself vulnerable in front of others. ｜ 我原先觉得，把自己毫无防备地暴露在别人面前，是件蠢事。
- C'mon, hand in yours first. ｜ 来，把你自己的先缴了。

Attacking and destroying <color=#FFCC33FF>Fluffy Launchers</color> will cause more Adventure Coins to appear on the field.\nDuring the challenge, all party members will not consume Kuugoryoku while in the Windfavored state. ｜ 利用流浪者的元素战技升空并移动，拾取冒险币获得积分。攻击击碎<color=#FFCC33FF>绵绵发射器</color>也可出现冒险币。\n挑战中，队伍中所有角色处于「优风倾姿」状态时将不消耗空居力。

- Wish ｜ 祈愿
- Come on, let's go meet our trading partner for the day. ｜ 我们走吧，去见见今天的交易对象。
- Yes, the researchers are still going over the finer details of production at the Akademiya. ｜ 是啊，教令院的那帮学者还在讨论一些制作细节呢。
- Wait a sec, who the heck are you? And why are you shooing us away? ｜ 等一下，你是什么人，为什么要赶我们走？
- Anyway, I'll find a way to make my diabolical cocktail and keep everyone away from alcohol. Hmph! ｜ 总之，我一定会调出最难喝的酒，彻底让所有人远离酒这种坏东西。
- Chained Reactions ｜ 连环轰隆

- The Doctor, at least. ｜ 至少是「博士」。
- A book? A flower? Toys? Well... let's just put them all in. And, of course, a surprise. A surprise is always necessary... ｜ 书？花？玩具？嗯…干脆都放进去吧，哦对了，还要有点惊喜才行…
- Fully-Charged Aimed Shot|{param6:P} ｜ 满蓄力瞄准射击|{param6:P}
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Detective stories like "Great Detective Hurlock" and "The Case Files of Miss Orith" are really popular in Fontaine.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>They're also pretty complex. Can you even follow the plot?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Don't you underestimate Paimon! If Paimon read any of those novels, she'd definitely solve the mystery before she's even halfway through.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Okay, well if you do, then keep it to yourself. You don't want to spoil the story for anyone else.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Paimon would never do that!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Although you also have to watch out for people who use "no spoilers" as an excuse to shut down discussions, when the truth is, they're just annoyed that a story they can't stand is getting so much attention.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Huh. Well, Paimon doesn't read much, so she wouldn't know anything about that kinda thing.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>You see it a lot when two fans of Onibudou get talking. Someone'll butt in and say something like, "Stop, don't spoil it for me! I'm only up to chapter two of volume one!"\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Chapter two? Hah, yeah, clearly they have no intention of reading any further.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Hey Paimon... You wanna hear a secret?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Um... sure?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Listen carefully...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Mm-hmm?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>...Zhongli is Rex Lapis.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>*gasp* What a crazy twist! Why would you spoil— Wait a second, we figured out that one ages ago! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>《大侦探赫尔洛克》、《奥西兹小姐事件簿》…枫丹很流行这种侦探、推理小说呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>派蒙能看懂吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>你也太看不起我了吧！如果让我来看的话，一定看到一半就猜出来凶手了。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>千万记得不要剧透别人哦。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不会干这种事的啦。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>不过也有一些人，喜欢拿着「不要剧透」的名义打压别人的讨论。其实他们只是自己不想看到讨厌的作品有人气罢了。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我不怎么看书，倒是不太了解这种情况呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>比如说两个爱好者正在讨论《鬼武道》，这种家伙就会突然插进去说「我第一卷第二章还没有看，不要继续剧透我啦！」\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>那不就是根本没怎么看吗！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>我和你说一个秘密哦，派蒙。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>嗯，怎么突然…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>其实…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>其实…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>其实，钟离就是岩王帝君。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>震惊！你居然剧透我——才怪，这不是早就知道了吗！
- "We also have a wide array of guest rooms available, and we can even provide tents for camping if needed, so that guests can enjoy falling asleep to the gentle lapping of the waves, and awaken to the dazzling sight of the dawn rays shining on the sea~" ｜ 「店内设有多种住宿客房，如有需求，还可以提供露营帐篷，以便客人听着海潮的嗡鸣入睡，在海上破晓的灿烂光芒中醒来~」
- I've never met you before, either. But I was sure of it the moment I saw you — you must be Seymour. ｜ 我也没见过你。但是…我一看到你，我就知道，你一定就是西摩尔。
- The fact is, I still do not know him well. It would be meaningless for me to jump to conclusions. ｜ 我对他这个人的确还不了解，妄下定论也没有意义。
- 4-Hit DMG|{param5:F1P}+{param6:F1P}+{param7:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param5:F1P}+{param6:F1P}+{param7:F1P}
- Yeah, we learned a lot about what happened to Childe here. Let's get going. ｜ 嗯，情况我们了解得差不多了，赶快离开这里吧。
- You asked me why I'm scared of Madam Faruzan, right? It's not because I don't know how to respond to her kindness... ｜ 之前你有问我，为什么害怕珐露珊前辈吧？其实比起不知道怎么应对她的好意…
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>Duration (Rounds)</color> ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>持续回合</color>
- Don't worry though, Paimon has full confidence in your abilities! ｜ 放心，我还是很信得过你的实力的！
- Heh, if only it was just a bunch of monsters barring our path... ｜ 呜…如果只是有魔物拦路的话…
- Hey Katheryne! ｜ 凯瑟琳——
- ...I hope you don't end up like me. ｜ …希望你不会像我一样。
- Go to the Grand Bazaar and see the Dance of Sabzeruz ｜ 前往大巴扎观看花神之舞
- Just one look and I can tell if a duelist is hoping to live, or if they're looking to die. ｜ 所以我一眼就能看出来，什么样的人在求生，什么样的人在求死。
- Wow, Mona... you were so immersed in your research that you forgot all about the time, stopped checking your mail, and almost missed out on a huge festival. ｜ 莫娜还真是沉浸在学术研究里啊，忘记了时间，忘记给别人回信，也没注意到这么盛大的庆典。
- Huh? ｜ ……？
- Charged Attack Cyclic DMG|{param5:P} ｜ 重击循环伤害|{param5:P}
- If so, Paimon needs to take a deep breath first! ｜ 先、先给我一点心理准备！
- Suit yourself. ｜ 随你便。
- Let Paimon think... Oh, uh, by the way, the other researchers apologized to you. They hope that you can forgive them. ｜ 我想想。哦，对了，那些学者想跟你道歉，希望你能原谅他们。
- Nonsense! If that were true, he would be sleeping with the fishes by now! The Chief Justice is here to conduct an investigation about a threatening letter written to a certain Melusine... ｜ 「胡说八道！真要是那样，他现在已经跟鱼睡在一起啦！最高审判官大人是为了查案来的，说是有人给美露莘写了威胁信…」
- Oh, and as well as tunes, I also collected all kinds of instruments! You're welcome to try them out any time you want. It'd be great to have another musician to trade tips with. ｜ 除了各地的曲谱，其实我也收集了各种乐器！如果想要试用乐器，请随时来找我，我们也可以交流演奏的心得。

- There is still something I need to follow up with backstage. I am terribly sorry that I cannot escort you to the final stage personally, but... I'll see you there! ｜ 后台还有准备工作需要推进，请原谅我不能亲自引导陪同…就让我们在终幕的舞台再会吧！

### Part 083

- ... ｜ ……
- Was this caused by the accident? ｜ 是事故导致的吗？

- If I do tell you something important, you could make a scary face, say something like "you've outlived your usefulness," and then take me out... ｜ 我要是说出什么重要情报，你们就拉下脸来说什么「是嘛，你已经没用了…」之类的台词，然后把我解决掉…

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nAdventure Rank 12 and above\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Rules</color>\n1. During the event, players can search throughout the world for a merchant named Liben and submit the materials that he requests to him.\n2. Liben will have various rewards prepared, and these rewards may differ across different players' worlds. Players may choose to enter others' worlds to claim different rewards from Boxes o' Marvels.\n3. During the event period, Liben will offer travelers a total of 7 different Boxes o' Marvels.\n4. Travelers can only get up to 1 chance per day to submit materials. Note that when the rewards refresh daily, the opportunity to submit materials, if unused, will be lost.\n5. After trading in materials a total of 5 times, players may open a Mega Box o' Marvels and obtain the reward within. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶12及以上\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n1.在活动期间，旅行者可以在提瓦特大陆的世界中寻找名为「立本」的商人并根据他的要求，上交所需要的材料。作为回报，旅行者可以从立本处获得开启「奇货匣」的奖励。\n2.「立本」在活动期间，会为旅行者准备不同的奖励。且不同玩家各自的游戏进度内，奖励有可能会不同。旅行者可选择进入到他人游戏进度内换取不同的「奇货匣」奖励。\n3.活动期间「立本」会随机提供给旅行者七种不同的「奇货匣」奖励。\n4.旅行者每天最多可以上交一次材料。请注意每日奖励刷新时，上交材料的机会如未使用将无法保留。\n5.活动期间累计上交材料次数达到五次，可开启奇货大礼盒，获得奖励。
- If you like surviving in the wild, deep-water diving, and gliding at breakneck speed, then the Adventurers' Guild needs YOU! ｜ 如果喜欢野外生存、潜水、风之翼极限竞速的话，那就来冒险家协会吧！

- It's actually an old holiday that originally celebrated Greater Lord Rukkhadevata's birthday. When she passed away, the holiday eventually became a celebration of the Lesser Lord's birthday. ｜ 其实这是个很古老的节日，最早是为大慈树王大人祝寿的。树王大人逝去后它被沿用下来，时间就改到了小吉祥草王大人的生日。

- A lonesome lord of seahorses that has gained the form of a fantastical beast and has surpassed almost all other Fontemer Aberrants. The <color=#FFE14BFF>Xenomare Pearl</color> beneath its head is a crystallization of <color=#FFE14BFF>Electro</color> that will allow it to use more powerful elemental attacks and possess stronger defensive abilities. Other than using <color=#FFE14BFF>Elemental Reactions</color> to destroy the Xenomare Pearl, you can also destroy the Resonant Coral Orbs it creates while guiding Fontemer Hoarthunder to deal effective DMG to said Pearl. ｜ 进化成了幻兽形姿，超越了几乎一切原海异种的海马孤王。头部下方的<color=#FFE14BFF>异海珍珠</color>是<color=#FFE14BFF>雷元素</color>的结晶，使其能够进行更猛烈的元素攻击，并且拥有更强的防御能力。除了利用<color=#FFE14BFF>元素反应</color>破坏异海珍珠，破坏它在空中引导「原海古雷」时召唤的共鸣珊瑚珠也能对异海珍珠有效造成损害。

- A flower that blooms even amidst ferocious thunder and lightning. To this day, it still grants courage to travelers in thunderstorms. ｜ 仅于雷霆之怒中傲然盛放的花朵，至今仍能赐予行走在雷雨中的游人勇气。

- *sigh* I only realized that those days of window-shopping and haggling with shopkeepers was "peace" when I experienced Stormterror's attack. ｜ 唉，经历过这次龙灾我才发现，以前那种有空去逛逛街，跟店主议价的日子才是真正的和平啊。

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nThe adventure continues as you and Paimon finally arrive in Fontaine.\nVarious splendid landscapes await you in this nation...\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20 and unlock any Statue of The Seven in Fontaine to take part in the "Relic Records: Creations of the Hydro Nation" event.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nAll exploration quests will be made available on the first day. Complete the exploration quests to claim rewards on the event menu. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n随着冒险的继续，你和派蒙踏入了新的国度：枫丹。\n在这个奇妙的国度之中，诸多绚烂的风物正等待着你们探索…\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20并解锁了任意枫丹区域的七天神像后，可参与「博物通志·水国寻迹」活动。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n所有的探索任务都会在第一天开放。完成探索任务，即可在活动界面领取奖励。
- Have you offered any incense yet? ｜ 你也敬香了？
- Come on then, place your orders, aren't ya here to eat? ｜ 快点菜吧，你们不是来吃东西的吗？
- I prepared three extra vials of bottled flames. As for whether to take them, the choice is yours. ｜ 我多准备了三份「瓶中之火」，看你们的选择。
- Hmm... There's another document mentioned here. Why don't we search that one, too? ｜ 嗯…这上面提到了还有另一份文件，我们也搜索一下那一份吧？
- Oh, rest assured. Your payment is guaranteed. I had it all budgeted out. ｜ 哦，你们放心，给你们的报酬当然是不会少的，这笔预算最早就规划好了。
- Although it only contains papers, it's still pretty heavy. You can't help but to start sympathizing the merchants that deal with them daily. ｜ 装着货单的盒子。虽然都是纸质，但入手后依然颇有重量，让人不由得开始同情起每天都要和它们打交道的商人。
- Well, I did make them myself. ｜ 那当然，我亲手做的。
- "Houilles" ｜ 「维耶」

- Pfft... ｜ 噗…

- Ah, that's good. ｜ 哦，那就好。

- Um... I was thinking maybe we could leave today? ｜ 嗯…要不然，今天就出发？

- \nIt seems that the making of this special medicine has something to do with Aranara memories. This worries me for some reason... ｜ \n似乎调配这种灵药与兰那罗的记忆有关。不知为何有一点担心。

- A Mechanicus: Thundering March can fire off little bolts of lightning that will constantly bounce around, hitting several Lil' Fungi at once. Use a loose formation to decrease the threat of these devices.\nUpon being claimed, the Mystic Blaze devices in this stage will continuously deal Pyro DMG to nearby Mechanici. Utilize these devices to increase your odds of winning the challenge.\n\nWhen you defeat a Mechanicus, you will gain 1 extra Marvelous Gel. ｜ 「棋阵机关·轰霆巡行」可以施放不断弹跳的闪雷，连续攻击多名「小小灵蕈」，使用分散的阵型即可降低这种机关的威胁。\n当前棋阵中存在「奇构·幻喻火」，成功占领后，将持续对附近的「棋阵机关」造成火元素伤害。合理运用这一特性，有助于赢得挑战。\n\n击败「棋阵机关」时，将额外获得1枚「妙妙灵冻」。

- In the Kujou household, normally the only sound to be heard is that of soldiers training in the dojo. But in the Kamisato household, there is the sound of music, dance, bickering, and laughter... I have heard that Miss Kamisato is skilled in the game of Go, and have always hoped for an occasion to pay her a visit, but... I also worry that someone of a serious demeanor like myself may not quite fit in there. ｜ 平时在九条家，只有士兵们在道场训练的声响，而每次路过神里家，总会听见舞乐声、打闹声和笑声。听闻神里家的大小姐棋技了得，我一直等候时机，想要登门拜访，却又担心…像我这般严肃的人，是否会与那般氛围格格不入呢。
- Please, don't get involved with that shameless lump of lard! Someone as honorable as yourself shouldn't even be acquainted with him! ｜ 您可千万不要和那胖子沾上关系。他是个卑劣无耻的家伙！您这样值得敬佩的好人根本就不该结识他。
- You've really thought of everything. ｜ 挺周全的。
- There's something strange about all of this. ｜ 有个很奇怪的地方。

- Now that the Stormterror crisis has passed, it's clear skies above Mondstadt once again.\nHowever, the memory of facing Dvalin in the sky amidst the storms is ever so vivid.\nRelive your memories and once again partake in the battle. Maybe you'll learn something new. ｜ 如今风魔龙的危机已经解除，蒙德的天空终于放晴。\n但面对特瓦林，与暴风共舞的记忆再次鲜明地浮现。\n在回忆中重新演练这场战斗，或许能有新的收获…

- But Chauvigne did not change. He still refused to come out of that pot, and he remains as upset as ever. ｜ 但是…肖维涅却压根没变。他依然不愿意从那个盆里出来，也依然闷闷不乐。
- Its former owner once fell into a cave and found the treasure trove of an exiled royal. This is a souvenir from that incident. ｜ 原本坠入落穴，却是被驱逐的旧宗族藏宝的地窖。是那次经历的纪念品。

- A combination of instruments that sees much use with the Yun-Han Opera Troupe. When important characters take the stage in some productions, cymbals and gongs must be played.\nEarly on in Yun Jin's opera education, she would observe the timings at which these gongs and cymbals would be played to deepen her understanding of how the ambiance of the opera was created. Although some of her most famous operas do not make use of such instruments, she has written others that display a keen knowledge of how to utilize them. ｜ 「云翰社」常用的乐器组合。在一些戏曲中，重要的人物登台时，就需要奏响锣与钹。\n早年云先生学戏时，为了深化自己对戏台氛围的理解，常常坐在这组锣钹旁，观察敲响锣钹的时机。虽说如今云先生最出名的几场戏大多没有用到锣钹，但她也会为「云翰社」写作其他戏曲，一直能熟练编排这些乐器。
- I am Citlali from the Masters of the Night-Wind. I have read the stars and seen the future through the obscuring smoke. You shall be blessed with good fortune and have the aid of powerful allies during your journey. Allow me to join you — Hey, I can be serious! Stop looking at me like that! ｜ 「烟谜主」的茜特菈莉，已经透过迷烟看到了未来的道路。诸恶曜必不会伤害你，诸吉星必环绕你。你会拥有强大的「盟友」。请让我也同行。——呃，见到认真的我很奇怪吗？不要用这种眼神看着我啦！
- You watch as the lady finishes the game in record speed. ｜ 在你们的面前，眼前的人以难以想象的速度完成了对局。
- Hmm... I'll pass by the Guild later and have a word. Even if I don't sign up, I'm sure I could hire an adventurer to escort me... ｜ 嗯…我等会去冒险家协会问问吧，就算不加入协会，雇佣一位冒险家陪我去那边看看也行啊…
- I see... ｜ 原来如此…
- The improved version of the "Truesight Potion." If you drink it, who knows what kind of strange effects you'll feel... ｜ 改良配方之后的「真视药剂」，假如喝下的话不知会有什么奇异的药效…

- Farewell. ｜ 保重。

- Have you scattered the Dandelion Seeds? ｜ 您把蒲公英播撒出去了吗？
- Right, dear guests. Please, take these. I gathered them specially for you. ｜ 对了，两位客人。这些东西还请你们收下吧，这都是我特意搜集的。
- No, no, I'm fine! Y'know, doing the lighting is kinda like designing a fireworks show. It's interesting to imagine what kind of atmosphere the lights will create! ｜ 哦，没事没事，我不忙，灯光布置和放烟花很像，想象着它等下会营造出的氛围，可有意思了！
- Emerald Maple's Mr. Zhu is feeling nostalgic for an old delicacy. He's looking for someone to help bring that flavor back to him... ｜ 翠枫庭的朱老板怀念着一道佳肴，想找人帮他寻回记忆中的味道…
- There was a time when many mortals longed to seek the guidance of the adepti. One knows not how they discovered the location of one's abode, but every other day or so, one would find people leaving offerings of food at the altar on Mt. Aocang... Hmph, why ever would mortals expect an adeptus to interrupt their meditation for the sake of ingesting a mortal meal? Most bemusing. Nevertheless, since their actions were heartfelt, one saw only fit to indulge in— Ahem, to embrace their offerings once they had departed. ｜ 有段时间，璃月盛行寻仙问道之法，也不知道他们如何得知本仙的洞府所在，隔三岔五便有人在奥藏山设坛供奉食物…哼，本仙岂会因凡间美食扰了清修？不过是念在他们一片诚心，才不得已等到旁边没人的时候，略加品…咳，略加回应罢了。
- Well then, shall I tell you now which objects you have on you that are stolen? ｜ 那，要不要我现在说说你们身上，有哪些东西是抢来的？
- That wouldn't be this hilichurl here, would it...? ｜ 不会就是这里的丘丘人吧…
- #{LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_PC#Press}{LAYOUT_PS#Press} DMG|{param3:F1P} DEF ｜ 点按伤害|{param3:F1P}防御力
- "Friends will stroll through the forest again. That which is good will return, and the painful memories will vanish. Just like a stream purifying itself or a withered tree sprouting once more." ｜ 「挚友将再次同行于茂密的森林中。一切美好的事物终将归来，一切痛苦的记忆也会远去，就像溪水净化自己，枯树绽出新芽。」
- You Can't See Me ｜ 「看不见我」
- Well, Eloffe is usually the one staffing the shop... ｜ 毕竟销售交给了爱洛芙…
- ...What's wrong? ｜ …有什么事吗？
- It just won't do, the way he just leaves the winery to its own devices all the time. ｜ 他老这么不管酒庄的生意，也不是个事啊…
- Apologies. I did not mean to let you behold a moment so shameful. But as you might understand, I have reclaimed a portion of my memories. Now, I may guard you better. ｜ 抱歉，让您看到了丢人的东西。但正如您所见，我取回了部分记忆，能够更好地保护您了。
- But Paimon thinks you should look for a safe place. There are still Treasure Hoarders lurking around, after all... ｜ 不过我觉得还是找个安全的地方比较好，毕竟还有盗宝团的人在附近…
- "Welcome to Idukan's Trove. This month's new stock: 'The Case Files of Miss Orith: Night on Cider Lake' and 'Mirage Warriors Special Collection: Volume VII'." ｜ 「欢迎光临『伊杜坎的秘藏』。本月新进书籍：《奥西兹小姐事件簿·果酒湖之夜》、《蜃楼战记特别篇·设定集第七卷》。」
- I've tried to clean the tree up by myself, but I'm not very athletic. Not only did I fail to clean it up, but I got stuck for a long time and couldn't get down... ｜ 我之前也试着自己去收拾过，但我实在不擅长运动，不仅东西没收拾干净，反而因为不知道怎么下来而折腾了好一阵…
- <color=#37FFFF>Kinich:</color> Ajaw loves being antagonistic. Just ignore him when he's mouthing off, don't let him get under your skin.\n<color=#37FFFF>Ajaw:</color> Kiniiiiiich! I dare you to release me and say that to my face! ｜ <color=#37FFFF>基尼奇：</color>阿乔性情乖戾，多数时候，不必听信它的话。\n<color=#37FFFF>阿乔：</color>基尼奇！！你有本事就放我出来——！
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- "...But the focus of my research is on these mechanisms... If I can make some progress here, perhaps I can persuade the Akademiya to open up the subject of Monsterology..." ｜ 「…但研究的重点还是这些机关…只要能够在此处拿出成绩，或许可以说服教令院开设『妖怪学』科目…」
- Hey, you were just doing your duty. It was my fault, really. I should've watched my tone, but I'd had a few too many, and... Anyway, it all worked out in the end. I took Eula back to my ship, showed her my documents, and that was that. Misunderstanding resolved. ｜ 哎呀，你也是职责所在嘛。我那会多喝了几杯，语气也有点冲…后来她陪我回到船上，确认了文件，误会也就解开了。
- You use the Lumenstone once again... ｜ 你再度使用了流明石…
- Ms. Rekhar has gone through a lot in her life, but she told us that she's very happy to live at the theater now. ｜ 你知道吗，里卡尔姐姐虽然很辛苦，但她对我们说，她现在很感谢在剧场生活的日子。
- Using an Elemental Burst regenerates <color=#99FFFFFF>4</color> Energy every 2s for 6s. All party members will regenerate <color=#99FFFFFF>4%</color> HP every 2s for this duration. ｜ 施放元素爆发后6秒内，每2秒恢复<color=#99FFFFFF>4</color>点元素能量，队伍中的所有角色每2秒恢复<color=#99FFFFFF>4%</color>生命值。
- A standard-issue honorary instructor's cap, only granted to those who turn down a promotion. ｜ 制式的教官帽子。是拒绝了晋升的军官才能获得的殊荣。
- Now that Sorush has already put on the Twin-Horned Chaplet, she can connect to the memories and wisdom of the Harvisptokhm using the Chaplet. ｜ 说来斯露莎不是已经戴上了「双角的花冠」吗？只要依靠花冠，便可以连接母树的记忆与智慧。
- He came about as a byproduct of creating the Shogun. Perhaps it's because I feel like I owe him something, but I do not wish to assert control over him. ｜ 那小子是制造将军的副产物。对他不加以管束，应该是因为我内心还是觉得对他有所亏欠吧。
- Hyah! ｜ 落！
- Ah, stable ground is the best ground after all... ｜ 果然还是平稳的土地令人安心…
- Courtyard Wall: Peace Across ｜ 古宅院墙-「阡陌之安」
- A mobile coffee stand of unknown provenance. The entire cart is constructed of sturdy timber, with a bright red tablecloth spread over it. The interior of the cart has been painstakingly set up to ensure that the barista need not move about frequently, and can complete the entire process from taking the order to completing the coffee by simply turning about or moving slightly from side to side. The stand is stocked with a surfeit of ingredients, and much thought has been put into their arrangement, such that the barista may quickly create the caffeinated beverage according to the customer's wishes. The customers themselves may observe the entire magnificent process from the side, enjoying their custom coffee and a lovely afternoon. ｜ 来历未知的流动咖啡摊，全车使用了坚固的木材构件，铺有色泽明亮的红色桌布。车内的布局非常考究——店员无需频繁移动，通过简单的转身和平移就能完成从接单到制作的全部流程。车内备有多种小料，摆放也颇有讲究，使得店员可以迅速按照顾客的偏好定制饮品。顾客们可以一边观看华丽的制作过程，一边享受定制的咖啡，度过一个快乐的午后。
- But some youngsters are too eager for success and end up taking the wrong path... ｜ 不过，也有些年轻人急于求成，走了歪路…
- Energy Regenerated|{param4:F1} per Electro Sigil Absorbed ｜ 雷之印吸收恢复能量|每个{param4:F1}点
- The second principle of performance is to be able to change your emotional expression at will, blurring the line between reality and performance. ｜ 表演之道其二，在于神随意动，似假还真。
- Ah, so the Hydro Eidolon was locked up in that chest. ｜ 啊，水形幻灵原来被关在那个箱子里…
- Hmm, a dish that a cat would enjoy, huh... ｜ 唔…猫也会喜欢的饭吗…
- The Frozen reaction will disable the affected character from making any actions in the current round. ｜ 冻结反应会使受冻结角色在本回合内无法行动。
- Maybe you've taken on a bit too much in one go? ｜ 是不是有点用力过度了？
- A mainspring with an enigmatic metal luster. Its surface is said to have been processed with a secret technique that grants desirable properties to the inexpensive base metal. The method ensures the mainspring's good performance at a low price when utilized in core meka.\nIt can be used to exchange for supplies and unlock rewards in "Mega Meka Melee." ｜ 泛着奇异金属光彩的机械发条，据说采用了秘密的表层处理工艺，使得原本廉价的金属拥有了相当不错的性能，从而为关键机关提供了优良的性能和低廉的价格。\n同时，在「机枢巧物前哨战」中，可以用来换取物资，解锁奖励。
- Ah, I'm sorry, I did a bad thing. ｜ 啊，蒙蒙做错了，对不起…
- Not yet. ｜ 还没有。
- ...4... ｜ …四…
- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- A Harpastum Bomb brimming with Pyro energy. When unleashed, it will burst into violent flame, dealing a small amount of Pyro DMG over a small AoE. It is extraordinarily effective against Cryo shields. ｜ 充满了火元素力量的羽球爆弹。「绽放」时会猛烈燃烧，并在小范围内造成少量火元素伤害，对抗冰元素的防护时更为有效。
- Do come again. ｜ 以后常来。
- Really... So powerful attacks can affect the space itself. I'd wondered if that was a possibility. ｜ 是吗…强力的攻击能影响空间，我也想过这种可能性。
- Annotating or marking a book is not in itself a violation of book-borrowing regulations. But why are all the other marks there? Is there some conspiracy behind them? What do they have to do with Tighnari? ｜ 做标注本身不违反借书规则。但书上有不止一种笔迹，为什么？记号背后是否有阴谋？这些又与提纳里有什么关系？
- How... How could you, catching Paimon out with her own words like that! ｜ 唔…居然拿我说的话来堵我！
- Hmm? Someone's approaching... ｜ 咦？是谁来了…
- Ice Storm Nightsoul Point Gain|{param3:F1} ｜ 冰风暴夜魂值获取|{param3:F1}点
- The imported content will overwrite the current score. Import? ｜ 导入后会覆盖当前曲谱，是否确定导入
- There will be Rolly Bombs in this stage that can be pushed using attacks. Make good use of them to effectively defeat your foes. ｜ 关卡中存在可以被攻击推动的滚滚炸弹，合理运用滚滚炸弹，可以提升战斗的效率。
- Of course. Just ask Ororon or Citlali — a lot of people in their tribe study the art of meditation. ｜ 当然啦。不信你去问茜特菈莉，或者欧洛伦，他们「烟谜主」里有许多人都要专门学习如何冥想。
- These inhuman creatures are truly tough adversaries... inhuman monsters, I should say. Greetings, brave warrior... I am Quenin, a member of this adventure team. My duty is... ｜ 这些非人之物还真是难缠，非人的怪物。勇士啊…我是冒险团的夸恩因，我的职责…

- It should be right over there. We'll be able to find something that'll help us with our search. ｜ 就在那边了，那边有能帮助我们搜寻的东西。
- Feature Activation Material ｜ 功能开启凭证
- But please hear what I have to say, so I can at least give you a broader picture of the issue we are now facing. ｜ 但请给我几句话的时间，让我更加全面地说明如今面临的难题。
- You needn't worry. Once they got wind that I was repairing a Yaksha's temple, the Ministry of Civil Affairs assigned some Millelith to help with security. ｜ 这您不用担心，听说我要给夜叉修庙之后，总务司那边也派了几位千岩军随行。
- Get to the point, please. ｜ 讲重点。
- The popularity of this game... ｜ 居然这么热门…
- Song of Life ｜ 众生之谣
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- Well, I've said enough. Still want to help me? ｜ 好啦，我说的也够多了，还愿意帮这个忙吗？
- Thanks! We haven't left the room for a few days, so we'll head over once we've freshened up a bit. ｜ 嗯，前面在屋里待了好几天，等我们做好准备，收拾一下，随后就过去。
- With the help of the best bard in the world, we are now on par with Dvalin. ｜ 这样就能和特瓦林对等战斗了，天底下最好的诗人前来助拳
- Ganyuuu! ｜ 甘雨姐姐——
- *sigh* We can't just keep waiting around like this. Let's go find Katheryne and pick up some work so we can at least keep ourselves busy! ｜ 唉…一直等下去也不是办法，不如去找凯瑟琳接点工作，先让自己忙起来吧。
- Wait, wait! What will such a huge cannonball be made of? ｜ 等等等等，这么大的炮弹用什么做？
- After many years of researching ancient texts, my grandfather came to believe that the practice of paying seasonal tribute to the Stove God may be best described as a festival — he called it the Stove God Festival. That would make it the forerunner to the Moonchase Festival we know today. ｜ 祖父研究古籍多年，提出过一个假设：对灶神的纪念，可以被称为「灶神节」。这一节日，或许正是「逐月节」的原型。
- Continuous Healing|{param2:F1P} Max HP+{param3:I} ｜ 持续治疗量|{param2:F1P}生命值上限+{param3:I}
- Okay. Well, enjoy your time here. ｜ 嗯，请慢慢逛逛吧。
- Talk to {QuestNpcID} ｜ 与{QuestNpcID}对话
- An iris that was cherished by the guardian. Unfortunately, the chance never came for it to be given to whom the guardian loved. ｜ 守护者珍视的鸢尾花。并没有机会送给倾心的人。
- I was out in the forest at least four days a week back then, thanks to a colossal workload from Master. It wrought havoc on my poor tail... So, I didn't exactly keep up to date with what was going on at the Akademiya. ｜ 那几年老师布置给我的任务可多了，一周至少四天钻在树林里，尾巴毛都乱得不行了…就没怎么关心那些。
- (There's probably nothing to worry about.) ｜ （应该不用太担心吧。）
- This cannon's design is fascinating... Most interesting indeed... ｜ 这门大炮的设计很有意思，很有意思…
- It's good to reminisce on an old tale in a while. ｜ 偶尔重温一下老故事也不错嘛。
- Hey, it's easy to understand the score now! ｜ 这样一看这个乐谱还挺好懂的嘛！
- Windtrace takes its inspiration from this thrilling chapter of Mondstadt's history! And it used to be quite popular, too... ｜ 「风行迷踪」，正是取材于这样史诗一般的真实历史事件！曾经也是很受欢迎的…
- (Passive) <color=#FFFFFFFF>After an opponent's character takes Crystallize reaction DMG:</color> Create 3 <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C116081]</color> and randomly place them into your deck. ｜ 【被动】<color=#FFFFFFFF>敌方角色受到结晶反应伤害后：</color>生成3张<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C116081]</color>，随机置入我方牌库中。
- Our points from today haven't been added yet. ｜ 我们今天的得分还没有加上。
- You don't look so good. Are you unwell? ｜ 咦，是身体不舒服了吗？
- Rotation ｜ 旋转
- In that case, let's just hang it up somewhere high, right now! ｜ 喔！那我们直接把灯挂在高处就好了！
- Nah! Can't be. You're just seeing things! ｜ 不会吧？你看错了！
- Arghhh, Paimon's toast! And sorry! Very sorry! Please don't hurt Paimon~! ｜ 怎么办？怎么办？对不起！对不起！真的很对不起！
- About Wriothesley: Misunderstanding ｜ 关于莱欧斯利自己·误解
- Oh, that's great! Just continue working on your experiment then! ｜ 哦，那不是很棒吗！之后的实验只要接着做下去不就行了！
- What's so funny!? ｜ 有这么好笑嘛！
- Without that power, it's just a normal dye. But, the color it produces is still quite rare. ｜ 失去了记忆的力量，它就只是一种染料。不过，即便只是作为一种染料，它这种炫彩色泽也相当珍稀。
- Bimarstan Notice ｜ 健康之家公告
- 27,000!? You kidding!? Are you here to insult me!? That offer's even lower than before! ｜ 两万七？！开什么玩笑，你们是特意来羞辱我的吗？怎么比之前还少了！
- Well, that's good... Wait a minute, did you say "this station"? ｜ 也算是好事吧…等等，你说「这座站点」？
- This fight is what it takes to survive! It's your only choice to live! ｜ 这场战斗就是你为了活下去而做出的挣扎！为了活下去而不得不做出的选择！
- Eh... If I wasn't here, and with Shriya being such a klutz... who else would be going to take care of these machines!? ｜ 唉，要是没我在，施芮娅又那么笨手笨脚的…还有谁能照料好这些机械啊！
- They say the Sabzeruz Festival was very lively a long, long time ago. ｜ 说起来在很久很久之前的过去，花神诞祭当天可是非常喧闹的。
- #Oh! Paimon recognizes that look! You've got your thinking cap on, don't you {NICKNAME}? ｜ #{NICKNAME}，你在想办法吗？加油啊！
- He's just someone who wants to be rid of work and live a comfortable life! ｜ 更何况，他也只是不想工作，想要过上美好幸福清闲的生活而已！
- Okay, then we're off! I have so many other things I wanna say! ｜ 好耶，我们走吧！我还有好多话要和你说呢！
- No, not at all. When the gulls came for my fries, it turned tail and hid behind me, trembling. ｜ 不，一点用也没有。当紫金渔鸥朝着我的薯条扑来的时候，它毫不犹豫地冲到了我的身后，躲起来瑟瑟发抖。
- You sure you don't want to go with us? ｜ 你真的不和我们一起…
- Head to the yaksha statues after nightfall ｜ 在夜晚前往「夜叉像」处
- And soft, glutinous Tricolor Dango! ｜ 还有软糯弹牙的三彩团子！
- Energy Cost|{param7:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param7:I}
- But that guy did surprisingly well in all the foundation courses. I suspect that he dragged me out of classes on purpose, while he studied by himself at night. ｜ 结果那家伙的基础课成绩却还出奇的好，我都怀疑他是故意拉我逃课，自己在夜里看书。
- To everyone's surprise, he bested every challenge. ｜ 而令人惊叹的是，他赢下了上述的每一次比试。
- A flavorful dish. Juicy chicken is saturated with silky sauce. Every bite orchestrates an "elemental symphony of flavors"... Oops, before you even knew it, you had already emptied the plate. Dip the flatbread in the sauce — every last drop of this must go! ｜ 风味浓郁的菜肴。柔滑的酱料均匀地包裹着每一块软润多汁的鸡肉，入口后丰富多样的调味料又带来了一场「美味元素爆发」…哎呀，不知不觉盘中空空如也，连最后一滴酱汁都被蘸着馕吃光了。
- At least his soul can finally rest in peace now, thanks to your efforts. ｜ 幸好有你们出手相助，塞萨尔的灵魂终于能够安息。

- Klee, you always say that. I hope you will abide by your words this time. ｜ 可莉常这么说，希望你这次要说到做到哦。

- Wahhhhhh!!! ｜ 啊啊啊啊啊啊——————

- This soft yet exquisite Wushou Dance doll vividly reproduces the adorable yet sleepy nature of the animal itself, while adopting the same design as the props and costumes used in Just Wushou Dance!\nWhen it comes to festivals, people often think of a joyful celebration, of not needing to get up early to go to work, so why not be just like this little Suanni and lie down to enjoy a little breather? ｜ 精致柔软的舞兽玩偶，生动再现了猊兽睡眼惺忪的可爱样貌，与海灯节期间「碰碰舞兽戏」所用的道具玩偶服采用了相同的设计。\n提到节日，人们往往联想到欢欣庆祝的时光，或是无需早早前去工作，尽情酣睡一场的闲适。那么，何不就如这只猊兽般躺下，享受一阵安然的小憩呢？

- As the lights in the opera house dim, the curtain falls upon the trial onstage... Clorinde resheathes her sword.\nThe private life of the one known as Fontaine's "strongest" Champion Duelist has always been an enigma to most. None dare to ask, much less to probe too deeply...\nSome claim to have seen her silhouette in the shadows of dark alleys, and others say she hunts phantoms in the woods in her spare time, and still others speak of her often privately patronizing a certain "Tabletop Troupe" club...\nOne can only wonder, just where will the "strongest" Champion Duelist be found today...? ｜ 歌剧院的灯光淡出，舞台上的审判落幕…克洛琳德将手中之剑收回了鞘中。\n这位枫丹「最强」决斗代理人工作之余的生活，对大多数人来说一直是个谜。没人敢问，更没人敢深究…\n有人说曾在暗巷中瞥见其背影、有人说她会在工作之余去林间逐猎魔影、也有人说她其实私下里常光顾一家枫丹的「桌上剧团」俱乐部…\n不知这位「最强」的决斗代理人，今天又会出现在哪里呢…

Get some water to wash it down, then think about what to do with the rest. ｜ 内藏蛋黄的茶酥。拿起的时候，表皮宛如山体滑坡一般纷纷掉落，尝下第一口，黏糊糊、甜腻腻…糟糕，嗓子好像被什么给糊住了。先喝杯水缓缓，再思考该怎么解决剩下的吧。

- An enormous dragon as ancient as the mountains themselves.\nIn an age that has all but faded from memory, he stood shoulder to shoulder with one who ruled over a harbor of stone. But in the end, the two came into conflict, and the dragon was banished to a dark place deep underground. Over the long years of his imprisonment, his power has slowly dissipated. He has also become disfigured from the various kinds of erosion he has been subjected to.\nThe faint rattling of this dragon lord's shackles and his deep, angry growl echo through the bowels of the mountains like memories of a bygone era. ｜ 如同山岳一般长寿的古老巨龙。\n在难以追忆的年月里曾与岩港的帝君并肩，但最终反目，遭镇压于黑暗的地底。在无比漫长的岁月中，它的力量渐渐流失，形态也因各种折磨而扭曲。\n枷锁的隐隐震响与龙祖低沉的怒吼，同记忆一般在山峦间回荡。

- Lightfall Sword Base DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 光降之剑基础伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Wisdom can bring enlightenment to scholars, but can also lead to utter arrogance.\nIn the history of the Akademiya, many researchers have used their "wisdom" to commit crimes.\nFor example, in order to test the limit of the Specters' body inflation, one Amurta researcher adopted an illegal catalyst and created a mega-sized Specter, which later exploded during the experiment and leveled the entire research center. Then, there was a researcher from Spantamad who had aimed to test a Ruin Guard's ability to cultivate fields, but lost control of the modified machine, resulting in the ruin of many farmlands and grave injuries for several farmers. There have also been numerous criminal cases concerning academic fraud and the abuse of intelligence for personal gain...\nSuch researchers, who do not abide by the law and pose dangers to others, will all be pursued and judged by the matra led by Cyno.\nWhen they stand before the matra, these researchers will almost always spare no effort to justify themselves. Their reasons have included but are not limited to suddenly cut funds, the Akademiya's favoritism towards other researchers, the results of their work being stolen... Some may even accuse the matra of stopping them from completing their research out of jealousy of their talents.\nCyno's response to such sophistry is always to stay silent and press forward in subduing all those garrulous criminals and sending them to trial.\nThose who violate the rules can always come up with a million excuses. However, only one ending awaits them. ｜ 智慧能予人启迪，亦能致人傲慢。\n在教令院的历史上，无视教令，因自己的「智慧」犯下罪责的学者并不鲜见。\n例如某位阿弥利多学院学者为了验证飘浮灵身体膨胀极限，用违禁催化剂培养出超巨大飘浮灵，但该飘浮灵在实验中爆炸，导致整间研究所被夷为平地；某位悉般多摩学院学者想要测试一下遗迹守卫耕田的能力，但经他改造后的遗迹守卫失去控制，毁坏了大量农田，还导致了多人重伤；还有诸多学术造假，以智谋私的罪案…\n此类无视教令，危害他人的学者，都是赛诺所统领的「风纪官」们追捕和审判的对象。\n面对着风纪官们，这些学者几乎都会穷尽口舌之能为自己辩解，理由包括但不限于研究经费断绝，教令院故意厚此薄彼，自己的研究被剽窃…甚至会指责风纪官们只是嫉妒自己的才能，所以才来阻止他完成研究。\n对这些诡辩，赛诺做出的回答永远只有沉默向前，将这些喋喋不休的罪人制住送去受审。\n违反教令的人总会为自己找出一万种理由，但是他们永远都只会落得一个下场。

- And lastly, when Sango didn't buy my conclusion and asked me to disclose all related case files from the Police Station, I did exactly as she asked. I didn't hide anything. ｜ 最后，珊瑚社长不信任我的结论，要求我公开奉行所掌握的关于案件的全部资料，我也一一照做了，并没有掩盖它们。

- Uh, I guess I drank a little too much earlier. Why am I even telling you all of this? Well, just laugh if you want to. ｜ 唉，我一定是白天喝多了，跟你们说这些干什么…唔，你们想笑就笑吧。

- Huh, so you need to read as part of tribal life, huh... You've been talking quite a bit about this stuff. ｜ 婕德你在部落生活，也是要读书的吗…听你说了好几遍啦。
