- Level 3 Shattering Pressure DMG|{param9:F1P} Cryo + {param10:F1P} Physical ｜ 三阶高压粉碎伤害|{param9:F1P}冰元素+{param10:F1P}物理
- If I studied architecture, I could explain how the lighthouse works to you... Unfortunately, I didn't. ｜ 我如果是学建筑的，就能给你讲讲这座灯塔的结构了…可惜，术业有专攻啊。
- I'm getting so excited! ｜ 嘿嘿，我开始期待了！
- Yes, that was a commission I sent out. I must say, that was rather quick... ｜ 没错，是我发布的委托，你来得还挺快的…
- When the name "Mavuika" is mentioned, the citizens of Natlan will not be stingy with their praise, for she has proven herself well-qualified and worthy of respect, be it as a leader or Archon.\nShe is the pinnacle of strength in Natlan, and she has the bearing to match. Even newly-arrived travelers need only hear her speak at the Stadium of the Sacred Flame to know that she merits being known as the sun.\nShe is exceedingly awe-inspiring, but is no unsmiling ruler whose ways may as well be set in stone. In informal situations, she is an enthusiastic and friendly big-sister figure, always ready to chat, and ever open to reasonable suggestions.\nOn the eve of the Pilgrimage of the Return of the Sacred Flame, the Weary Inn is often packed with passionate revelers, and Mavuika can often be found there, playing cards or singing songs with everyone, and even if some drunk person splashes their drink onto her, she doesn't mind at all.\nAfter all, for someone who can ignite their hair to dry off said drink, such incidents are small beans. When such levity is hard to come by, why let something so minor spoil the mood?\nBut should the person intend to start a drinking contest, it is Mavuika's desire to win that will be kindled. As the "battle" has begun, there can be no room for retreat or surrender. The victor will be determined, one way or the other.\nSince becoming Archon, her habits have remained utterly unchanged, and this has allowed her to make many friends across the tribes.\nHowever, not everyone possesses the subtle sense of proper propriety for such a relationship. Indeed, she can be too down-to-earth, and with her lack of airs, some misjudge the situation and get the false impression that they can use their friendship with an Archon to their own benefit.\nStrangely enough, though people of this sort are a dime a dozen, they have never caused any major trouble, for Mavuika has never responded to such ridiculous requests — a solemn, icy stare is all she needs to send the other party scampering away.\nThe sight of those ever-burning eyes casting such a frigid gaze wakes those confused fools up in an instant to the fact that Mavuika is still the leader of a nation, a supreme deity.\nA Speaker's Chamber staff member once suggested that she should subject those who so harass her to at least token punishment, lest there be an endless stream of incidents to come, but she refused.\n"Archonhood is status, authority, and a spiritual symbol. But it is not who 'I' am." ｜ 提到玛薇卡这一名字，纳塔的居民绝不会吝啬他们的赞美之词。无论是作为领袖还是神明，她都是称职并受人敬重的。\n她拥有这个国度巅峰级的力量，也拥有与力量匹配的气度，哪怕是刚刚抵达此地的外来者，只要在「圣火竞技场」听过她的演讲，都能理解她不愧太阳之名。\n玛薇卡极具威严，却并非做事刻板，不苟言笑的君王，在非正式场合，她是个热情好客的大姐姐，很愿意与别人聊天，也乐于接受许多合理的提议。\n「归火圣夜巡礼」的前日，「倦意之屋」总会挤满狂欢的人群，玛薇卡经常出现在这里，和大家打牌或唱歌，哪怕是有人喝醉把酒泼向她，她也毫不在意。\n毕竟对她来说，这不过只是需要点燃头发把酒水烘干的小事而已，不至于扫了这难得的兴致。\n但假如来者的意图是拼酒，玛薇卡的胜负欲会在一瞬间点燃，既然「战斗」已经开始，就没有后退或者投降的选择，必须分出胜负。\n无论是在她成神之前还是之后，她的习惯都没有半分改变，这也让她结交了各个部族的许多好友。\n不过，也不是所有人都能把握住这种微妙的分寸感，玛薇卡过于没有神明的架子，某些人会产生他们能用这段友谊谋求一些利益的错觉。\n说来奇妙的是，虽然这种人屡见不鲜，但还从来没引起过大的闹剧，因为玛薇卡从未回应过这些荒唐的诉求——她只需要一个严肃的表情和一个冰冷的眼神，对方就会自觉退缩了。\n时刻燃烧的灼热双瞳，刺出的目光却比深冰更冷，这种温差瞬间就能点醒糊涂的家伙，玛薇卡终究还是一国之领袖，无上之神明。\n「话事处」的工作人员曾建议玛薇卡还是应该略施惩戒，否则像这样的骚扰者将会源源不断，但她拒绝了。\n「神是身份，是权力，是精神象征，但它不是『我』。」
- And it's not just me — I think everyone else here feels the same way. If we're unhappy, we should speak up and let our voices be heard. ｜ 我相信不只是我，其他人也都会这么想。既然不甘心，就应该把声音汇聚到一起，好好说出来。
- The song hidden within the rose can attract Healthy Dendrograna. Follow the mysterious traces with Arama and reach Ashvattha's Concourse using the Rhythm of the Sprout. ｜ 蔷薇中隐藏的歌曲，能够吸引「健壮的草种子」。与兰罗摩一同，循着奇妙的痕迹，利用「新芽的曲调」，前往「觉树之堂」吧。
- At first, I was thinking of quietly sneaking over, but since you were already here waiting for me, I started thinking about how I should phrase my apology... Only to hear you all talking smack about me. Oh, my days... ｜ 想偷偷溜过来，结果人家已经先到了，根本不知道从哪里开始道歉，一来就听到别人在抱怨我，哎怎么办呀…

- As far as food is concerned, I'm fine with anything. If we're counting beverages, though... I'm not very good with alcohol. Don't laugh, and before you say it — yes, I've wondered what this says about my identity as a Mondstadter. But, y'know... too much alcohol is bad for you, anyway. So not drinking is a good thing. ｜ 食物的范围里没什么，但如果饮料也算的话…我不怎么能喝酒。别笑我，我也怀疑过自己是不是蒙德人了。不过…过量饮酒对身体有害，不喝酒，也是好事吧。

- "I resumed growing crops, as I did back when I was a student. In the past, I made lab assistants do all the menial work, but now I have to do it all myself, and to be honest, it isn't too bad." ｜ 「我重新干起了学生时代的活：栽培作物。以前进了研究室，这些活都有助手干，现在非自己干不可了，感觉也不坏。」

- Some people call me "Boss," others "Demoiselle," but none of that does anything for me. My favorite thing to be called is "partner" — but only by you, of course. So, just know that my vainer side would be over the moon if you could indulge me a little more often. ｜ 他们有人叫我老板，有人叫我大小姐，我都无所谓啦。最开心的还是你称呼我为「搭档」的时候，所以请多叫几次，满足我的虚荣心吧！

- Uh, no, that can't be it! My pet snakes' food — that's what's missing! ｜ 不对，不对！是我的宠物蛇口粮，全部不见了！

- In comparison, I still have the idea that I'm their "master." All I could think of was to train with them to better our techniques. I've failed at giving them the care that they needed. ｜ 相比之下，我还带着一点「主人」的心思，只想着和它们一起苦修，磨砺技艺，却没有给过它们足够的关怀。
- Anyway, I think I've given you sufficient details. I'll add your names to the list of participants momentarily. ｜ 就先聊到这里吧。稍后我在名单上添上你们的名字，就算完成报名了。

- Some scoundrels are plotting ill, threatening the safety of the surrounding area. If you can sneak into their encampment and filch their supplies, you are sure to greatly reduce their strength. ｜ 一群不怀好意的家伙出现在野外，威胁着周边区域的安全。如果能潜入营地，取走他们的物资，想必就能大大削弱他们的力量。
- And why won't you go inside? ｜ 为什么不进去？
- "Rock-hard flesh and bamboo bones. Lives in the city with thousands of clones." ｜ 「竹骨石肌一身轻，不听菱歌听衡经。」
- Regardless of whether you're interested in traveling with a caravan, or have some talent in architecture, you're welcome to consider becoming an employee. ｜ 无论您喜欢跟随车队船队四处旅行，还是有着建筑方面的才华，都可以考虑成为和记厅的雇员。
- Help to clean the area around the stall ｜ 帮忙清扫摊位附近
- Aha, and this is where smart, time-saving people show their worth. Now, let me guess what you're up to... ｜ 这就是会节省时间的聪明人讨人喜欢的地方了，让我猜猜你们想要做什么…

- Yeah! How did you know? ｜ 对啊对啊，你很懂嘛…

- Agh, okay, I admit it... ｜ 唉…好吧，我承认…
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- I am aware. And I have accepted it. ｜ 我知道。我也接受了。

- As long as everyone feels comfortable, there's no need to change things. ｜ 只需要维持安逸感就好。
- ...Nope, don't get you at all. ｜ …没听懂。
- After you administer the medicine, Ayo immediately perks up and scarfs down the steak in one bite! ｜ 「队长」的药效果非常好，阿尤吃了之后就恢复了精神，把卡齐娜的肉排吃了个精光。
- Over many long years, this large fungal beast has morphed into a unique form.\nIts intelligence has already reached and perhaps has even surpassed real animals, and it will actively hunt prey to obtain sustenance. Its tail has a lovely jade plumage that seems very similar to that of the ancient sacred beast that the Spantamad school reveres. As far as the logic of mimesis is concerned, it seems quite likely that the two beings once walked the earth together. ｜ 经过漫长的岁月，演化出了独特形态的大型蕈兽。\n智能水平已经接近，甚至超越了真正的动物，会主动捕食猎物以获取养分。尾巴上长有漂亮的翠翎，与素论派尊崇的古代圣兽非常相似。以拟态演化的逻辑来看，想必它们曾经共同行走在大地之上吧。
- I don't believe you. ｜ 我不信。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具

- Although I'd hoped for the Malipo name-bearer to perform this ceremony, that was never anything to do with you. So please don't take it personally. ｜ 虽然之前我一直希望由古名的持有者来主持仪式，但那不是对你们有意见，你们可别有心理负担。
- Don't worry, there's a time and place for exacting vengeance. Besides, I'm not in the mood for any right now, best save it for later. ｜ 放心，记仇是记仇，报仇是报仇。现在不是报仇的心情，所以就先记在心里。
- Why don't you come with us? ｜ 那真君也陪我们走一趟吧？

- Whoa... So that's how the Mingxiao Lantern is built... ｜ 哇…「明霄灯」原来都是这么造的啊…

- Ah... So you still don't know... The price of this rite, do you? ｜ 啊…所以你们还不知道…这场仪式的代价不是吗？
- *ahem* Well, no matter what, that's a job for later... ｜ 呃咳，都是后话了…
- And it's not just criminals. Even with your friends, there are bound to be some topics where you are unable to understand one another. ｜ 不只是犯人，即便是身边的朋友，也一定有无法相互理解的地方。
- Long before you ever met me, you'd already gained the courage to never avoid or run away from your feelings... And all your nightmares had become the fuel for sweeter dreams. ｜ 早在遇到我之前，你就已经拥有了不逃避和不忘记的勇气，你曾经拥有过的噩梦，也早已成为了美梦的底色。

- Play another round. ｜ 再玩一局「小小灵蕈大幻戏」。

### Part 084

Only 1 instance of Tireless Hunt can be gained every 12s. ｜ 获得<color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color>所有元素伤害加成。重击命中敌人后，将获得「无休止的狩猎」：重击造成的伤害值提高，提高值相当于元素精通数值的<color=#99FFFFFF>160%</color>。该效果将在生效12次或10秒后消失，每12秒至多获得一次无休止的狩猎。

- Oh, hehehe! I knew customers with pockets as deep as yours would undoubtedly crave something more profound than ordinary Canned Knowledge. ｜ 喔…呵呵呵呵。我就说嘛，出手这么大方的客人，目标肯定不会是几枚普通的罐装知识。

- (Then that means whatever happened must have happened down below... Oh no, isn't that gate at the very bottom!?) ｜ （那就说明问题发生在下层…梅洛彼得堡的最底层，是那个闸门？！）
- Diona's appearance did indeed have an impact on Mondstadt's alcohol industry.\nThe Dawn Winery's long-held monopoly was broken overnight by this unexpected ambush from Cat's Tail, and the man put in charge of the winery's business, Elzer, found this unacceptable.\nA calculating veteran of many industrial battles, Elzer considered poaching this key figure, never realizing that Diona considered the Dawn Winery a sort of "final boss" to be defeated in her quest.\n"This marvelous and bold method of preparation must be the secret of these flavors, yes?"\nDiona simply looked at the white-haired man who had just sat down in front of the bar, rank displeasure in her eyes.\n"Ah. Simply exquisite. I can just feel your incomparable passion and love for wine."\nDiona's hand started to tremble as it held on to her cocktail shaker, and detecting the change at once with his sharp gaze, Elzer understood immediately.\n"If a brilliant bartender as yourself were to grace the Dawn Winery with your cooperation, we shall be able to bring Monsdtadt's alcohol industry to heretofore unseen heights!"\n...When Diluc questioned Elzer as to the story behind his bandaged hand later, he was uncharacteristically hesitant to say anything.\n"I... I was bitten by a cat." ｜ 迪奥娜的出现，确实对蒙德酒业产生了一些影响。\n晨曦酒庄的产业垄断，有被异军突起的猫尾酒馆所打破的趋势，这是打理酒庄生意的管家埃泽所不能容许的。\n老谋深算的埃泽，开始动起了挖角这位「关键人物」的心思。殊不知，迪奥娜一直把晨曦酒庄当做要打败的「最终Boss」来看待。\n「这奇妙而又大胆的调酒配方，想必就是美味的秘诀吧？」\n迪奥娜抬起头，不悦地瞪视着这位刚刚坐到吧台前的白发男子。\n「嗯，堪称绝味，我品尝到了您对酒无比的热情与厚爱。」\n迪奥娜正在摇酒的手开始微微颤抖了起来，敏锐的埃泽捕捉到了这一变化，直接道明了来意——\n「像您这样优秀的调酒师，如果能赏光来和我们晨曦酒庄合作的话，一定能让蒙德的酒业达到前所未有的繁荣！」\n……\n事后，当迪卢克问起埃泽手上的绷带是怎么回事的时候，埃泽少见地有些支支吾吾：\n「被，被猫咬了。」
- I heard this is the first time we've forged an ancient name for an outlander. Seems like it was a success... What's engraved on it? ｜ 听说这是历史上第一次为外乡人打造古名，看起来成功了。不过上面到底写着什么？
- ...Your rationality is most admirable, too. It is something I lack. But I can't help but worry about you — it must be hard, being unable to speak to those around you. ｜ …你的理性也让我很敬佩，那是我身上缺乏的东西。但我总不免为你担心，和周围人都聊不到一起也很辛苦吧。
- Mm... Kinda. Granny Kulsoom knows everything. I always go to her when I have questions. ｜ 唔…差不多吧，库尔苏姆奶奶知道的事可多了，我经常去找她请教呢。
- Heave ho— Ack!\nA dull crack sounds from near your hip, and you fall to the floor. It is only after lengthy and gentle ministrations on Paimon's part that you are again able to rise...\n ｜ 用…哎呀！\n在腰部一声沉闷的咔吧声中，你趴在了地上。在被派蒙小心地揉了很久的腰之后，你才能正常地站起来…\n

- Wok-fried vegetarian food. The scents of the earth, the cool shade, and the moistness of the mist have all been enjoined into this plate of freshness. Pair it with simple white rice — both your taste buds and your soul shall experience a down-to-earth satisfaction many times over. ｜ 宽油炒制的素食。泥土的芬芳、树荫的沁凉与岚气的润泽，汇聚成盘中之鲜。配一碗简单的白米饭，就能收获令味蕾和心灵都倍感踏实的满足。

- Noelle's petite form does a good job of hiding her great strength.\nThis does not just refer to her resoluteness or her indomitable spirit, but also her physical strength.\nOnce, Lisa accidentally dropped her experimental apparatus under her bookshelf and troubled over whether she could remain decent while bending over to retrieve it. Noelle made it over in the nick of time, lifting the full bookshelf with only one hand — and not a single book fell out between her hefting it and putting it down.\nThere was another incident in which several cargo-bearing carts were attacked by Pyro Slimes as they tried to pass through Mondstadt's side gate. As the owners were all in a panic, it was Noelle again who came to the rescue — hurling the carts — cargo and all, into the Cider Lake, before leaping into the water herself and retrieving every last item.\nRumor has it that when Noelle was studying the blade, she nearly sent Wagner — who prided himself in his forging skills — into despairing seclusion.\nIn all, he forged over ten different swords with different alloy compositions for Noelle, but all would lose their edge after a few uses.\nAt first, Wagner thought Noelle unskilled, but eventually found that the problem was more foundational: the swords just weren't strong enough.\nPutting his reputation on the line, Wagner finally made Noelle a sturdy and heavy claymore that was further reinforced by her affinity for Geo. Only then was her weapon issue (barely) solved.\nBut don't worry, Noelle won't use her superhuman strength unless the situation calls for it, as she is a pacifist at heart.\nThey say, however, that the very day Noelle received her custom-made claymore, she was set upon by a pair of drunken Treasure Hoarders in Drunkard Gorge, who thought her a harmless lamb...\nLet's just hope that no one else will ever be so unlucky. ｜ 诺艾尔看似娇小的身躯中蕴藏着非常强大的力量。这不仅仅是指她意志坚定，顽强不屈，也是指她的力气非常之大。\n有一次，丽莎不小心将实验仪器掉到了书架底下，正在苦恼趴下去捡起是否有失体面。诺艾尔及时赶来，单手举起了装满书的书架。从拿起到放下，书架里的书都没被晃出一本。\n还有一次，几辆送货的货车在经过蒙德城侧门时被火史莱姆袭击，燃起大火。货主手忙脚乱之际，也是诺艾尔赶到，连货带车统统扔进果酒湖，跟着马上跳下水，把货物一个不漏地捞了回来。\n据说诺艾尔练剑时，差点让那位自诩手艺精良的铁匠瓦格纳沮丧到归隐山林。\n他前后尝试十几种矿石配方锻造出的所有长剑，只要被诺艾尔用上几次便会崩刃，无一例外。\n原本，瓦格纳以为是诺艾尔用剑的方法不对，后来才发觉，根本问题在于武器强度不足。\n瓦格纳赌上名誉，为诺艾尔定制了一把沉重又扎实的大剑，配合诺艾尔自身岩元素力加固，这才勉强解决了她的武器问题。\n不过请放心，诺艾尔不会在非必要场合展示她过人的力量，她本人也是暴力的反对者。\n只是听说，诺艾尔刚拿到定制大剑那天，在醉汉峡被两个喝醉的盗宝团成员盯上，当成了手无缚鸡之力的小绵羊…\n希望以后不要再有这样的倒霉鬼出现了。

- I don't know why, but she's always been good at giving people gifts. ｜ 那家伙不知道为什么，从小就对「给人送礼物」这件事特别擅长。
- See that hole over there? Aim at it and discharge the main gun. ｜ 看到那边的那个洞口了吗，瞄准那里释放主炮吧。
- Thanks to Mavuika's intervention, you were finally able to leave the Night Kingdom. Everyone is still somewhat in shock. Go talk to Kachina. ｜ 多亏了玛薇卡出手相助，才能从夜神之国中离开。众人大多惊魂未定，与卡齐娜聊聊吧。

- Continue... ｜ 继续阅读…
- Defeat all opponents within %2% second(s) ｜ 在%2%秒内击败所有敌人

- Honored guest, a moment, if you please. I trust you are the Traveler of whom Miss Kamisato has previously spoken? ｜ 贵客请留步，想必您就是神里大小姐提到的那位旅行者？
- It's right up ahead, but... Let's make sure we weren't followed first. ｜ 就在前面了，不过…先确认一下有没有人跟踪。
- When It Snows ｜ 下雪的时候…
- Never mind the dragon... Say, do you think that the ruins in Stormterror's Lair might contain some great treasure? ｜ 比起龙灾…嘿，你说风魔龙的那个废墟里会不会藏着什么大宝藏呢？
- #{NICKNAME}! And Paimon, too! You really did come! ｜ #{NICKNAME}！还有派蒙！你们真的来了！
- Ask for Arderne's opinion ｜ 询问阿德纳的意见
- Nigredo Realm ｜ 黑土之境
- A meat and vegetable dish. It certainly looks like the complete package, but careful tasting will reveal that there is no flavor of fresh fish in the radishes at all... Wait a minute, what are these fishbones doing in there instead? ｜ 荤素搭配的菜肴。整体造型还算完整，但仔细一尝，萝卜里并没有鱼肉的鲜味…等等，萝卜里的鱼刺是怎么回事？
- Nacker ｜ 纳克
- Go to the tower containing the statue ｜ 前往神像所在的高塔
- (Paimon feels a bit sorry for Miss Sumida...) ｜ （总感觉有点同情墨田小姐。）
- I won't hear of it! You rescued me, it's only right that your kindness is repaid. ｜ 不行不行，你们救了我，一点报酬都不拿怎么说得过去。
- Plunge DMG|{param16:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param16:F1P}
- Well, that's enough. Lutong, can you pay the Traveler first? ｜ 很好，这些就足够了。路通，你能先把报酬付给旅行者吗？
- Dropped by Lv. 40+ Clockwork Meka ｜ 40级以上发条机关掉落
- #Okay, that's the menu for the next meal then! C'mon, {NICKNAME}, let's go place our order with Valerina! You come too, Razor! ｜ #那菜单就这么定啦，{NICKNAME}，我们快去找瓦乐瑞娜下单吧，雷泽也一起来嘛！
- Thank you, Madame Melo! Here's your locket. Let's go now! ｜ 那…多谢梅洛夫人！吊坠还给您…我们现在就出发吧！
- 1,000 Mora? So little!? ｜ 1000摩拉？怎么这么少！
- Undisclosed Distribution Channels ｜ 不明流通渠道
- You said it yourself. The definition of an "adeptus" is... ｜ 况且你也说过，「仙人」的定义…
- Activate the device and, in turn, another machine somewhere within the temple ｜ 启动机关，开启大殿内的某座机器
- Shield Level 2 DMG Absorption|{param4:F1P} DEF+{param5:I} ｜ 二级护盾吸收量|{param4:F1P}防御力+{param5:I}
- A tree lush with leaves the color of the sky when the sun is high. When one looks upon it, it will almost feel as if its leaves are becoming one with the skies, and thus have artists named them Spreading Branches of the Sky.\nHowever, some birds with less than stellar eyesight hold much less love for this tree, for they are wont to mistake its leaves for the sky, thus crashing into its canopy and falling to the earth in disgrace. ｜ 枝繁叶茂的乔木，树冠呈现出明丽的「晴蓝」色，与阳光明媚时的天空如出一辙。仰视它时，偶尔会有叶片与天空融为一体的观感，画家们因而将这种乔木誉为「天空的枝叶」。\n然而，某些视力不佳的鸟儿不太喜欢这种树木——快速飞行的过程中，它们容易忽视天蓝色的叶片，一头扎进树冠，狼狈地摔在地上。
- Seems like we've turned this room inside out... but no key. Time to move on to <color=#00E1FFFF>another room</color>! ｜ 到处都找过了，看来钥匙不在这里…去<color=#00E1FFFF>别的房间</color>看看吗？
- ...Haha, I never thought I'd hear that kind of thing from the Captain of the Special Security and Surveillance Patrol. ｜ …哈哈，真想不到这话会从一位特巡队队长嘴里说出来。
- Bonifaz ｜ 博尼法兹
- Hmm? What kind of good news? ｜ 什么好消息？
- How did you meet Rudolf? ｜ 你是怎么认识鲁道夫先生的？
- *cough* Well, thank you for your hard work, Traveler. Please take these. I— ｜ 咳，这次辛苦你了旅行者，这些东西请收下吧，我…
- Wait, Melusines can see that? Huh, that does sound useful for being a nurse. ｜ 这就是美露莘的视觉吗？的确很适合成为护士。
- This Time, I've Gotta Win ｜ 这一次，我一定要赢
- Tell me about your life as an adventurer. ｜ 关于冒险家生涯…
- The Temple of Buried Dominion ｜ 威权尽葬之殿
- Liyue is home to a time-honored smithy called Hanfeng's Ironmongers. The craft has been passed down for generations and quality is guaranteed. Your ore and billets will be safe in the hands of Master Zhang. ｜ 在璃月港，有一家名叫「寒锋铁器」的老字号铁匠铺。\n店家的手艺代代相传，非常可靠。放心地将旅行中得到的矿石与「原胚」委托给店主老章吧。
- Talk to Madame Ping ｜ 与萍姥姥对话
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- What are you waiting for? We won't hear anything at this rate. ｜ 你在等什么？这样下去可听不到什么消息。

- Mualani copies down the mossy drawing and quietly leads you back the way you came. You then tell the patiently waiting Viramdra and Karya everything you saw and heard. ｜ 将涂鸦临摹下来之后，玛拉妮带领你们悄悄地原路返回，并将所见所闻告知了等待许久的维兰德和卡嘉。
- Besides the Sebastos himself, only said superiors, the Harmosts, could have changed Phobos's melody. ｜ 能够改变「福波斯」旋律的人，除了至尊之外便只有作为上位者的调律师了。
- Facing the Windborne Cliff and City of Flowing Ash ｜ 朝向领风之崖与流灰之都
- Let me negotiate the price for you. ｜ 我来帮你砍价吧。
- Game Preview ｜ 游戏概览
- Wonderful! We'll wait for you here, then. ｜ 那就拜托你了，我们就在这等着你。

- ...So it's a place that even Lisa doesn't know? ｜ …连丽莎都不知道的地方？
- Of course. Now, don't go running off. Hang tight for a moment, and I'll walk you both home. ｜ 嗯，你们先莫要乱跑。一会儿我送你们回家。
- (*sigh* It's so hard to cultivate the rose.) ｜ （唉，这蔷薇可真难伺候。）

- You Came, You Saw, We Co-Oped ｜ 「来坦，来补，来输出」
- No one wants to read about your sopranos or your falsettos. We give the readers what they want! That's how this business works. ｜ 这世上可没人关心你们那什么腔什么调的。多写点儿读者老爷们喜闻乐见的，才叫做上道！

- But... using it as a journal for your wishes is also fine. Carrying them with you and taking a look from time to time can be a good source of encouragement... ｜ 但…把名刻当做「愿望备忘录」也行吧。把愿望带在身边，时不时就拿出来看看，也能起到一些激励的作用。
- Heavy Hit Taken: I ｜ 重受击·其一
- Oh right! Madame Ping, how would you feel about that? ｜ 对哦，萍姥姥怎么看？
- That's not true! This is right! Don't... Don't come back here again! ｜ 才不是！这样才是对的！你们不要回来了！
- He has shown me how some things remain the same even as the world around them changes. ｜ 他让我在巨大的变化中，看到了那些仍没有改变的东西。
- Character Talent Material ｜ 角色天赋素材
- #Well, if it isn't {NICKNAME} and Paimon! Are you here for Shenhe? ｜ #这不是{NICKNAME}和派蒙嘛。你们是来找申鹤的？
- repair the device ｜ 修复装置
- A short table that can be found in Aaru Village and other places. It is made of Athel Wood soaked in dye to raise its moisture content, a process that prevents it from absorbing moisture present in indoor environments. It has a variety of uses. Sundries can be placed in the upper and lower compartments. It can also be used as a coffee table, and, with the aid of a cushion, can double as a chair.\nThanks to its practical design, some Aaru Village residents place sumptuous refreshments on top of this table and store spare tea leaves and water bottles below to receive their guests with the highest courtesy. Of course, according to the rules of some families, a table that has been sat at cannot be used as a coffee table on the same day unless the cushions and tablecloths are replaced. Such families often keep a large number of rugs of different sizes at home and are key customers for merchants. ｜ 可见于阿如村等地的低矮桌台，以浸泡在染液中提升过含水量的「柽木」制成，不会吸收室内环境的水分，还有着多种用途——上下两层空间均可放置杂物，或是当成茶几使用，铺上坐垫后，还能当成椅子使用。\n得益于实用的设计，一些阿如村的住民会在这种家具上方放置丰盛的茶点，下方放置备用的茶叶和水壶，以最高礼节接待客人。当然，按照某些家庭的规矩，被人坐过的桌台，是不能在当天继续当成茶几使用的，除非更换坐垫和桌布。这样的家庭通常会在家中备有大量不同尺寸的毛毯，是商人们的重点客户。
- Let's see... Based on the number of treasure chests and Moonchase Charms you've obtained... ｜ 嗯…按照你找到的宝箱和逐月符的数量来看…
- Mualani, a little help over here? We can't hold 'em back much longer! ｜ 玛拉妮——过来帮忙！这边快顶不住了！
- Additional Elemental DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 附加元素伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Talent Level-Up Material ｜ 天赋培养材料
- A compact, elegant wooden canopy constructed from "White Chestnut Oak Wood" boards. Due to its small size and light weight, it can hang from the edge of a building or the ground without additional support structures. Initially, to better monitor the hot spring area and prevent accidents, hot spring managers used discarded surfboards to create makeshift platforms with basic shading facilities. Unexpectedly, this "uniquely designed" rest area became quite popular among visitors, leading to the surfboard-style base becoming a notable feature of modern rest canopies. ｜ 精致小巧的小型木质凉棚，「白栗栎木」的板材拼接而成。因尺寸小巧、重量轻盈，使其能够无需任何支撑结构便悬挂于建筑或地面之边缘。起初，为了更好能地监控温泉区以预防事故，温泉管理员会利用废旧冲浪板等物品，将它们固定在高处，搭建成简易的工作平台，并配备基本的遮阳设施。出乎意料的是，这种「造型独特」的休憩区域竟然颇受游客们的青睐，并最终促使冲浪板式的底座成为了现今休憩棚的一大特色。
- Zaki ｜ 札齐
- I already see a determination in you that I didn't possess in my time, and the future that it leads you to will be yours alone. ｜ 我已经从你身上看到了当年的我并不具备的意志，它所导向的未来，才是只属于你的命运。
- Sure. ｜ 可以。
- I taught you out of the goodness of my heart, and what did you give me in return? You accused me of not taking work seriously and of neglecting my duties. ｜ 我当初好心教你，可你小子是什么嘴脸？反过来指责我工作不认真，玩忽职守。
- Food ｜ 食物
- Achievement: Nails ｜ 成就·敲针
- Talk to the team members ｜ 与勘探队成员对话
- ...It's a bit far away, and I can't really say for sure from this distance. Perhaps we should ask the villager from before about the "legend" first. ｜ 距离有些远，只是粗看一眼的话，我也不能下结论。不如先找刚刚那位村民，打听一下那个「传说」吧。

- <color=#FFFFFFFF>End Phase:</color> Deal 1 $[K107] to the opposing character that has taken the least DMG. Repeat this once for each stack you have, then reduce 1 stack. <color=#FFFFFFFF>Can stack</color>. ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>结束阶段：</color>对敌方受伤最少的角色造成1点$[K107]，自身每有1层可用次数重复1次。然后减少1层。<color=#FFFFFFFF>可叠加</color>
- Well, guess we sent Charlotte off. Shall we go see how Neuvillette's doing? As long as he's not so busy that he doesn't have time for a chat, anyway. ｜ 送走夏洛蒂了，我们去看看那维莱特的情况吧？希望他别忙到没时间跟我们交流。
- Come again soon! Remember, we stock everything you could possibly think of — and more! ｜ 欢迎下次再来光顾，请记住我们的招牌「天下日用，无奇不卖」！
- Martial Artist's Wine Cup ｜ 武人的酒杯
- Flamestrider Normal Attack 4-Hit DMG|{param7:F1P} ｜ 驰轮车普通攻击四段伤害|{param7:F1P}
- See you. ｜ 再见。
- That should do. Let me heat the pot up... ｜ 这样就可以了，让我热一下锅…
- Hey, this is the mighty Arataki "Above All, Bold-Blooded" Itto you're talking to here! I'm a say-what-I-mean, mean-what-I-say, might-sound-mean-but-I-say-it-anyway kinda guy. And I say, we're gonna have this duel! ｜ 我堂堂荒泷铁血第一斗，行的正站得直，说要决斗，就一定决斗。
- Searing Ember ｜ 炙热余烬
- Equip this to your <color=#FFD780FF>Consecrated Flying Serpent</color> ｜ 装备给我方的<color=#FFD780FF>圣骸飞蛇</color>
- Ah! You there! You look most reliable, good knight. Please, help us! ｜ 啊！看上去很可靠的骑士大人！请你帮帮我们！
- Akram ｜ 阿克拉姆
- She said she just wanted to pick some flowers for our guests. ｜ 我找到妮赫佳的时候，这孩子说，想要给客人做一份礼物，所以就想去采几束漂亮的花。
- (I'm glad that Rana's made new friends.) ｜ （拉娜能交上新朋友，真是太好了。）
- Hmm? ｜ 嗯？
- Frontier Life ｜ 远驻前哨的生活
- Maybe it's time to spread your wings and become learned. ｜ 或许你也该长大求学了。
- Waaah! It's you! ｜ 呜哇！你到了啊！
- Composed ｜ 气定神闲
- But don't you find the work draining? ｜ 不觉得辛苦吗？
- Would you like to have a chat with me? ｜ 想一起聊聊天吗？
- You're right! ｜ 你说得对！
- Defeat Johnnie ｜ 击败尊尼
- Aha! So you are the Akademiya's henchmen! We've tried our best to keep a low profile, but still, you've managed to find our trail... ｜ 果然是教令院的党羽！明明我们已经尽量低调行事，没想到还是被你们寻到了踪迹…
- More About Nahida: I ｜ 想要了解纳西妲·其一
- Well, moving large quantities of cargo through the mountains is always a challenge for merchants who run long routes like we do. Cows are too slow, while mules and ponies carry too little, and arranging for food and drink for porters is too expensive... ｜ 我们长途跑商的人呀，大宗货物走山地总是难题。牛太慢，骡子、矮马载货又少，人工管吃管喝太贵了…
- Hmph! Acting dumb won't save you! Take this! ｜ 哼，装傻也是没用的！看招！
- Sigewinne's Hobbies ｜ 希格雯的爱好…
- Olah!: Series I ｜ Olah！第一辑
- Otherwise, depending on your answer, I could've arrested you on the spot. ｜ 否则…视你们的回答而定，最坏的情况可能会是牢狱之灾呢。
- Character and Weapon Enhancement Material ｜ 角色与武器培养素材
- Back home, whenever I fight, it's to protect the people of the tribe. But here, it's more like... never-ending wrestling training. ｜ 说起来，我在「沃陆之邦」战斗，是为了保护部族；而在这里战斗，有一点像是…无限制格斗练习？
- <color=#00efff>Bonus</color>: Defeat opponents affected by Frozen: #1#/%1% ｜ <color=#00efff>「额外」</color>击败处于冻结状态下的敌人：#1#/%1%
- Those smart higher-ups always say so. I don't really get it, but it's clear to me that they regard building houses to be as important as learning! ｜ 上面的聪明人总把这话挂在嘴边，虽然我不是很懂，但你看，他们把建房子看得和做学问一样重要。
- The primitive wandering inhabitants of Teyvat's wildernesses.\nIll-tempered warriors for their tribes, they are simple-minded believers in the power of brute force. If their muscles grow strong enough and their strength great enough, then one day they too shall raise up a great shield and become a mitachurl... Or will they? ｜ 提瓦特荒野中游荡的原始住民。\n坏脾气的部落战士，朴实地信奉着肌肉的力量。如果肌肉够结实，力量够强，那终有一天也能举起巨大的盾牌，成为「丘丘暴徒」…？
- It's okay, we can cover our own bill... ｜ 我们可以自己付账…
- Obtain {param2} points ｜ 积分达到{param2}
- That information's not reliable at all! ｜ 这不是根本靠不住吗！
- You mean she's sick? How could she be... Oh, wait a minute, could it be because of what Paimon did yesterday? ｜ 她病了？怎么会…等等，难道说是因为昨天我的错…
- Small, cheap, and mass-production-friendly round stone stools that can be found in the Stadium of the Sacred Flame's Chuwen Fair, Xocolatl Beverages, and other places, mostly positioned near a bar or a square table. Some Stadium vendors focus on providing fast-food services, especially on tournament days or during events when customer traffic surges and seating demand increases. To meet this need despite space constraints, they prefer small, cost-effective stools over traditional cushioned or backrest-equipped chairs. They are hardly as comfortable as those decked-out chairs, but they are sufficient for customers who mainly aim to eat quickly and return to watching the event, making the lack of comfort a minor issue. ｜ 成本低廉，可以大量制造的小尺寸石质圆凳，可见于圣火竞技场内楚汶市集、卡考苦饮店等地，多被设置在吧台或方桌附近。竞技场的部分商户以提供快餐式服务为主，尤其在比赛日或活动期间，客流量激增，对座位的需求相应增加，也更需要在有限的空间内提供更多座椅。因此，相比通常的靠背椅，这种占地面积小且成本低廉的圆凳会更受商家们的青睐。虽然这种石质圆凳在舒适度方面可能不如软垫椅或背靠椅，但考虑到顾客们的主要目的是快速用餐后继续观赏比赛，不会在店内过久停留，圆凳舒适度不足的缺点似乎尚可以接受。
- Come on, lighten up! This is the last clue we need to save the kingdom. ｜ 哎呀，你们也放松点。这是拯救王国的最后线索。
- These two good customers wish to buy some Harra Fruit, Miss Dori, and if there's nothing else, I'll just excuse myself. ｜ 多莉小姐，这两位是来买香辛果的客人。人已经带到了，那我就先走了。
- Nuh-uh, skipping out on sleep is not the answer! Wait... How come this conversation is giving Paimon major deja vu... ｜ 不睡觉怎么行！咦？总觉得这对话在哪里发生过…
- Maybe scout the place out in advance next time. ｜ 下次请先勘察好。
- Let me think again... ｜ 我再想想…
- Hmm, to be honest, not many people have. This is a very deserted place, so most people don't know that there is a temple here. ｜ 嗯…老实说，其实没多少人。毕竟这荒郊野岭的，大部分人都不知道这里还有一座庙。
- Without a plan, we should not pull the trigger. ｜ 此时尚未有万全之策，恐怕不宜将那恶龙惊扰。

- Of course! Come with us. Mamesuke is waiting for you! ｜ 当然是真的啦，豆助还在等你呢，快跟我们一起回去吧！

- This time, I plan to stay home and wait for fortune to come to me! Maybe one day I'll dig up some old artifact and I'll be rich! ｜ 这次呢，我就打算窝在家门口守株待兔…说不定哪天挖出个古董家宝、名将具足什么的，我就发达了！
- I refuse. ｜ 我拒绝。
- Help Me! ｜ 救命
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>People in the city keep telling us how Palais Mermonia is a suuuper stressful place to work.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>But when we went to see it for ourselves, it seemed like hardly anyone works there, and the few people who do work there were hardly working.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>In fact, they looked like they didn't have a care in the world... What part of working there is supposed to be so stressful, exactly?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Maybe the work they carry out is essential, but insignificant.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>How can something be both of those things at the same time?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Well... Okay, so imagine that one day, you suddenly forgot how to fly and fell to the ground...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>That'll never happen. Flying's a piece of cake for Paimon.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Probably not — but just in case, we should make sure that there's a cart loaded with cushions ready to catch you at all times.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>The cart would have to be designed to withstand any environment and weather conditions, and the cushions would need to be soft enough to break your fall gently...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>It would need to be built from the sturdiest timber and strongest rope, and packed with plenty of medical supplies and snacks...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>And all because keeping Paimon safe and sound is absolutely essential.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>You really mean that? Aw, thanks, hehe... But there's really no need to go to all that trouble.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Paimon's been flying for a really long time. There's no way Paimon's gonna suddenly drop out of the air. So you don't need to worry about it.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>See? That's why it's insignificant.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>If it ever did happen, the consequences would be disastrous — hence why it's essential to be prepared.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>But practically speaking, the chances of it happening are next to nothing. So it's insignificant at the same time.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>If someone in the Palais Mermonia was assigned a task like that, it'd be up to them to decide how busy they wanna get. Chances are, they'd probably just sit back and do nothing.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>But... What if Paimon really does forget how to fly one day? What's gonna happen when Paimon falls to the ground?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>I'll be here to catch you, no matter what. Because you're not "essential but insignificant" — you're the best travel companion ever! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>说起来，我们在城里总听人说，在沫芒宫里工作的人都很忙。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>但上次去沫芒宫的时候，里面压根没多少人呀？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>剩下的人也一副优哉游哉的样子…真不知道忙在哪里…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>也许，他们都在忙一些「十万火急又无足轻重」的事呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>怎么可能有这样的事情啦，都十万火急了，怎么可能无足轻重呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>有喔，比如说…派蒙有一天也许会突然飞不动，从半空摔下来…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>会这样吗？我飞得还挺轻松的…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>所以我们应该采购一些带软垫的小车，一直放在派蒙的下方。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>这辆小车要足够可靠，能在任何路况下跟着派蒙移动，车上的垫子也要足够软…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>还有牵引绳的质量，小车的材质，也许还要准备一些医疗用品和零食…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>毕竟，为了不让派蒙受伤，这件事当然十万火急。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>是这样吗？嘿嘿…也不用想得这么周到啦。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>但我都飞这么久了，肯定不会突然就不能飞了，不用杞人忧天啦。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>喏，你看，这不就是「无足轻重」吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>如果这件事真的发生了，就会产生很严重的后果，所以「十万火急」。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>但从各种角度来说，这件事都不太可能立即发生，所以「无足轻重」。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>如果一个人被分配去处理这种事，那无论是想要偷懒还是想要忙碌，都由他自己定啦。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>但，但是！如果我真的突然飞不动了，摔下来怎么办？！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那我一定会接住派蒙的，派蒙是我重要的伙伴，可不是「十万火急又无足轻重」的事。

- Chongyun's specialty. Though these springy noodles would be irresistible in the sweltering summer, Chongyun insists on dining on them even in the chattering cold of winter. What a guy. ｜ 重云的特色料理。虽说韧劲十足的面条让人在炎炎夏日欲罢不能，但即使在冬天，重云也坚持食用这样的主食。当真不易。
- Having handed her signed and stamped power of attorney documentation and confidentiality agreement to the Maison Gardiennage officer for perusal, Emile steps over the cordon and onto the scene.\nShe has already been apprised of all case-critical information: the number of deceased, the state of the corpses, and the parameters of the cleanup required. As to other case details, she is neither curious nor inclined to ask further questions.\nThe bodies, as well as severely damaged objects, have already been removed. And so she inspects the area meticulously, making mental notes of things that might be easily missed or difficult-to-clean areas that require extra attention.\nShe has encountered many such crime scenes, and with time, has been able to piece together in broad strokes the sequence of events — through the directions of blood spatter, the traces left by the residue of human tissues, and how objects fell.\nStill, this is not her professional duty. In the most infrequent of circumstances, of course, she will be invited to use this experience to aid the Maison in recreating crime scenes. But this is not one of those special cases. This case is already closed, and as a "forensic cleaner," she needs only draw a line under it.\nAnd so she silently dons her protective clothing and goggles, and gets to work. All goes well. Chemicals dissolve and wash away the rust and dark-brown, even black-colored stains, while sticky tissues and sharp fragments are cleaned separately. The harrowing scene and horrid smells are wiped away, erased like erroneous brushstrokes from a canvas.\nFinally, she invites the Garde, who has been waiting all this time outside, back in. They convey their thanks and bid her farewell, before manually removing the cordon.\nEmilie remains silent as she changes back into her previous outfit. She cannot help but think that though the deceased should already have been buried as those dear to them watched, parts of them have only just now been put to rest.\nShe adjusts her hat, nodding her head slightly toward the clean room, bidding a final farewell to persons completely unknown to her, as if she too were taking some small part in their funerals. ｜ 将签字盖章过的委托书与保密协议交由执律庭的警官过目后，艾梅莉埃越过警戒线，进入现场。\n在此之前，她已被告知事件的必要信息：死者数量、死亡状态，以及需要清理的范围。此外的案件细节，她并不好奇，也不多加过问。\n遗体，以及损毁严重的物件已被移走。她小心地观察着现场，在心中默默记下容易忽略、或者因为难以清除而需要格外关注的地方。\n她见过的事件现场有很多，久而久之，通过血迹溅射的走向、人体组织残留的痕迹、物件倒落的方式，她能够大致推测出此地发生过什么。\n然而这并不是她的职责所在。极偶尔的情况下，她会受邀利用这些经验协助执律庭还原现场。不过这次并非这样的特例。案件已经结清，她作为「现场清理人」，需要做的只是为这起事件画上最后的句号。\n于是她沉默着，穿上防护服，戴上护目镜，开始作业。一切都很顺利。那些锈色，深褐色，甚至黑色的痕迹在化学剂的作用下溶解消散，粘稠的组织和锋利的碎片也被分类清洁。骇人的景象和难闻的气味一起，如同画布上画错的颜料一样，被刮除抹净。\n最后，她再次请来在门外等候已久的警官。警官向她表达感谢，道别，开始着手卸除警戒标志。\n艾梅莉埃依旧沉默着，换回了自己原本的着装。她忍不住想，死者应该已经在亲人的注视下下葬，虽然他们的一部分刚刚才得以安息。\n她整理帽子，微微颔首，对着洁净的房间，向她并不认识的人做最后的道别，仿佛也参与了一部分葬礼的碎片。
- Skill DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param1:F1P}

When consuming Phlogiston, it can also briefly continuously move in mid-air using this method.\nIf necessary, it can also <color=#FFCC33>aim</color> precisely at target points to quickly collect large numbers of Challenge Coins. ｜ <color=#FFCC33>匿叶龙</color>能够用长舌卷住重物或符印，拉拽自身进行移动，快速跨越障碍。消耗燃素时，还能在短时间内以这种方式进行连续的空中移动。\n必要时，可以仔细<color=#FFCC33>瞄准</color>目标点，从而快速收集大量挑战币。

While buffed, your opponents will have increased ATK and All Elemental RES. Find and <color=#FFE14BFF>destroy all said devices</color> to weaken your opponents, then <color=#FFE14BFF>defeat them</color> to complete the challenge. ｜ <color=#FFE14BFF>拟想·持心破敌记</color>\n秘境中存在若干个能强化敌人的增幅器，当敌人处于强化状态下时，其攻击力和全元素抗性都会得到提升。找到并<color=#FFE14BFF>摧毁全部增幅器</color>以削弱敌人，<color=#FFE14BFF>打倒所有敌人</color>方能完成挑战。

- Maybe a day will come when we'll have forgotten about this event and boom! Hajanad suddenly becomes a famous researcher and invites us to visit her! ｜ 没准等到我们都忘了这件事的那天，突然听到消息，哈贾娜德当上了学者，邀请我们去看望她…

- Made from a mixture of Spinel Fruit and Grainfruit, this peculiar Natlan fish bait can maintain its shape even after having been submerged for extended periods of time. By dissipating flavor at a consistent rate, its remarkable power to attract fish continues unabated for a very long time indeed.\n\nSuitable for catching normal Rapidfish, Sunfish, and normal Unihornfish. ｜ 奇妙的纳塔鱼饵，以澄晶实和颗粒果制成，入水后能长期维持形态，并保证风味物质化开弥漫的速度，持久而高效地吸引鱼类。\n\n适用鱼种：普通急流鱼类、翻车鲀类、普通独角鱼类

- And so, the whisper of eternal night summons you back to my side. Splendid! What a blessed reunion, a boon from beyond the eventide! Come, partake of this joy with me, my subjects... ｜ 永夜的絮语将汝召回本皇女身侧，很好，很好。此即祝圣之恩典，至夜之赐福！此等欢愉，当与卿悠然同享…

- If I had some Mora, I would buy three new dresses. One for me, one for Perrie, and one for Mother. ｜ 如果有钱的话，我想买三件新裙子。我一件、佩佩一件，再给母亲一件。

- Dragonfall is an incredibly rare ore used in forging. The majority of regular crystals are formed in high-temperature environments. Dragonfall, on the other hand, is formed as a product of elemental reactions. ｜ 镇龙石是一种罕见的锻造用矿石。常见的水晶多数是在高温环境下自然形成，镇龙石却是元素反应引发的结晶成品。

- Thank you, Ms. Rekhar. ｜ 嗯，谢谢你，里卡尔姐姐。

- After who knows how long, I started to miss my old work, so I decided to build this Crococannon, and a new attraction for the park... ｜ 又是不知道多久过去了，我开始怀念自己的老本行，于是制作了这种鳄鳄炮炮，开始搭建一个新的游乐项目…

Their kicks, delivered from up high, should not be underestimated. ｜ 来自山崖之上的勇士，在陡峭山峰巡游的部族守卫者。\n从飞龙爪击的动作中体悟到运用力量真谛的战士，自高处使用的踢击不容小觑。
- The quality of the rice is key to this dish. Upon one's activation of the Supreme Cuisine Machine, order it one did to search for high-quality rice. The resulting search led one here. ｜ 这道甜品重在「稻米」的品质，本仙当即启动「机关烹饪神机」，令它寻找上等稻米。一路奔波，来到了此地。

- Nemesis of Coppelius: the main lead here is the clockwork meka Coppelius. At the climax of the performance, Coppelius will halt at the center of the dance floor and expose his artificed clockwork component charged with <color=#f39001>pneuma</color>, thereby drastically increasing the efficiency of his exertions, granting him a Ward, and generating three retributive Frosthearts. During this phase, using <color=#f39001>ousia-imbued attacks</color> will effectively break his Ward and overload him, thus progressing the performance. ｜ 「科培琉司的劫罚」：主角为发条机关贵族「科培琉司」。在演出的高潮阶段，科培琉司将停留在舞池的中央，露出能源特征为<color=#f39001>芒性</color>的奇械发条，极大提升出力效率，为自己施加护罩，产生劫罚的三枚霜心。在这一阶段借由<color=#f39001>荒性的攻击</color>，能有效破除护罩，并最终使其供能过载，推进演出流程。

- That's my Uncle Gao! There's no way anyone would ever remotely suspect that we're in cahoots. As soon as they compare our prices, they'll surely think that I'm the only one getting any business. ｜ 高兄就是高！肯定没人能想到咱们是一伙的，别人一看您的价格，再看我这边的价格，肯定就觉得自己赚到了！
- But since the border has been disrupted, fetor is leaking out. We simply need to find where the leak is — that will be your entrance. ｜ 但如今边界异动，死气溢出，必有泄口，我们循迹即可。
- All done? ｜ 做完了吗？

- I will spare the pleasantries, then. May I ask if you two are available to help? ｜ 那我就不跟二位客气了。请问你们现在是否方便？

- It seems that you have obtained one of the Great Songs. It is just as well, then, that I have discovered the locations of the remaining four. ｜ 看上去你们已经拿到了一个「灵光绝唱」，恰好剩下四个「灵光绝唱」的所在我也已经调查清楚了。

- Charged Attack DMG|{param4:F1P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param4:F1P}
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Overflowing Abundance: Event Rules</color>\nDuring the event, using Original Resin to revitalize Domains of Forgery or Domains of Mastery will result in multiplied rewards.\nAll reward options for Domains of Forgery and Mastery will be available until the event ends. Please make sure you complete the challenge in time.\n\nOverflowing Abundance has the following limitations:\n·Using Condensed Resin will not produce these multiplied rewards.\n·A limited number of bonus rewards can be claimed per day. The maximum number of opportunities to claim bonus rewards and the remaining number of claimable bonus rewards are displayed on the Overflowing Abundance event page.\n·Sometimes, the Domains of Forgery that offer this bonus are region-restricted. The applicable region can also be viewed from the Overflowing Abundance event page.\n·In cases where bonus reward opportunities from Overflowing Abundance and Stellar Reunion are both available at the same time, the opportunity with the greater multiplier will be consumed. If both have the same multiplier, the bonus reward opportunity granted by Stellar Reunion will be consumed first. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【盛材移涌·活动规则】</color>\n活动期间，使用「原粹树脂」激活完成指定「炼武秘境」或「精通秘境」时，可以消耗一次「原粹树脂」获得多次的产出。\n活动期间，炼武秘境和精通秘境将全天开放，直到活动结束，请旅行者及时进行挑战。\n\n「盛材移涌」活动具有如下限制：\n·使用「浓缩树脂」时，无法获得此活动提供的多次产出。\n·每日能获得的多次产出机会有限，可用的剩余机会与机会上限以「盛材移涌」活动界面中的条目为准。\n·有时，适用多次产出的炼武秘境会具有区域限制。若存在具体适用区域，以「盛材移涌」活动界面中的条目为准。\n·「盛材移涌」与「星之归还」活动的额外产出同时生效时，获取符合条件且适用的多次产出时，优先消耗倍率更高的机会；倍率相同时，优先消耗「星之归还」活动提供的机会。
- Name cannot be less than {0} character(s) ｜ 字数不能小于{0}个字
- Agafya, Persikov has ordered us to perform some signal reception tests. Looks like all four of us have to go... Chevka will probably get mad at me. ｜ 阿加霞，佩尔西科夫大人让我们去做信号接收测试，是让我们四个一起去…叶夫卡要是听到这件事，又得生气不可…
- So strong... ｜ 你的力量…
- Can be added to Supporting Cast ｜ 可以编入助演角色
- Leave Uther's factory ｜ 离开厄舍的工厂

- A peculiar mask featuring a pair of golden eyes, elegant and graceful in bearing, bright as the full moon. It is said to have been inspired by one of the Eight Adepts, the Gold-Eyed Celadon Mare. ｜ 双目金黄，宛如明月的奇特面具，姿态优雅且清丽。据传，该面具造型的灵感来源于八奇之一的金目乘黄月驹。
- Sold at shops ｜ 商店购买
- Flight Master ｜ 飞行大师
- You see, appearing before your eyes... the figures of heroes who have come before.\nA man with flaming hair whose smile beams brightly, a travel-worn youth whose eyes smolder like the sunset, a child with an Iktomisaurus whose brow is furrowed in thought...\nAnd there, a familiar silhouette. She pauses but for the briefest of moments, then plunges resolutely into five hundred years of solitude.\nSome faces appear solemn, others mournful, while some still carry a flicker of anger, despite arriving at this place.\nYet without exception, they all stand there. Without exception, they have all ended up leaving "themselves" in this place... ｜ 那是浮现在眼前的…诸多曾到达此处的英雄的身影。\n发如烈火的男人露出爽朗的笑容，风尘仆仆的少年双瞳如夕阳般赤红，身侧跟着暝视龙的年幼孩子露出思索的神色…\n甚至，那个你熟悉的身影。她在此短暂驻足，又义无反顾地将自己投入五百年的寂寥。\n有的人表情肃穆，有的人哀伤，有人即使到了此处依然怒发冲冠。\n但无一例外的，他们伫立在此，无一例外的，他们最后都将「自己」留在了这里…
- Treasure obtained (2/3). The hunt continues... ｜ 已获得宝藏2/3，请继续寻宝
- Adan ｜ 阿丹
- Complete {param0} Sentou Trials ｜ 完成{param0}次千灯试炼
- No Observers ｜ 暂无观看者
- If you bring a little sweetness into people's lives at a time like that, they'll never forget it once they turn over a new leaf and get out of this place. Don't you think? ｜ 这时候如果能给这些人一点甜头，今后他们改过自新离开这里了，也一定忘不掉这一点。你说是吧？
- That's what I did, anyway. As soon as the food came out, I set a few mushrooms to the side, so they wouldn't soak up too much oil. ｜ 我是这么做的，食物刚上桌的时候，就要把一部分蘑菇挑出来，不要让它们泡在油里。
- Go to the nearby transaction site ｜ 前往会场附近的交易地点
- Paimon draws four circles on the map as instructed. ｜ 派蒙按照提示在地图上画出了四个圈
- Hmph, well let's see how long that false bravado of yours will last. ｜ 哼，怕你嘴硬得了一时，嘴硬不了一世。
- ...Thank you. ｜ …多谢。
- I appreciate the understanding, and don't worry — I'll find a way to help her ease this burden. Anyway, I need to get going. Enjoy the celebration. ｜ 感谢理解，也不用太担心，我会想办法帮她分担更多的。那我走了，你们好好庆祝。
- Relax? You find the idea of a tournament relaxing!? This girl is crazy... Ugh... ｜ 放松？可怕的女人，竟然称大赛为放松…唔…
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- Defeat a Cryo Hypostasis that has revived three times. ｜ 击败一个复苏了三次的无相之冰。
- Lesser Lord Kusanali embraces Greater Lord Rukkhadevata tearfully. At this sorrowful moment of parting, the last consciousness of the Greater Lord gradually dissipates into beautiful light that illuminates the night sky. All dreams shall now be returned to the people of Sumeru.\n"We all nestle under the great tree of wisdom, peering out to perceive the world."\n"From the earth, and from the rain, we perceive its wonders until we become a white bird to perch atop a branch..."\n"And finally snap off the most important leaf."\n"Once upon a time, I alone dreamed in this world."\n"In my dreams, everybody would also dream after they fell asleep."\n"Wild and wonderful thoughts would emerge from their minds."\n"Some tumbled to the ground, and others floated to the sky."\n"Connecting all things in the world into one dazzling net."\n"Amongst the plethora of worlds were numerous smaller worlds."\n"All of fate finding within the tapestry their brilliant glow."\n"I gradually understood that these indescribable and constantly changing things."\n"Are the most profound things in the world."\n"Only they can completely repel the madness."\n"Only dreams can awaken consciousness from the deepest darkness."\n"I'm the one who posed this question, yet also the one who sought a solution"\n"Saving the world with the dreams of the people used to be my answer."\n"And now you've also found your own answer."\n"And I shall return all the dreams to the people."\n"Goodbye, people of Sumeru."\n"May you be blessed tonight with the sweetest of dreams." ｜ 纳西妲含着泪水抱住了大慈树王。在悲伤与不舍中，大慈树王最后的意识逐渐溶解，化作美丽的光芒照亮了夜空。一切梦境最终都归还给了须弥的民众。\n「我们都栖息在智慧之树下，尝试阅读世界。\n「从土中读、从雨中读，尔后化身白鸟攀上枝头…\n「终于衔住了至关重要的那一片树叶。\n「曾经，我是世上唯一能够做梦的个体。\n「在我的梦里，所有人入夜后也都会进入梦乡。\n「人们的脑海中飘出奇思异想，\n「有些滚落地面，有些浮到天上。\n「它将所有事物连接成一片万分夺目的网。\n「三千世界之中，又有小小世界，\n「所有命运，皆在此间沸腾。\n「我逐渐明白，这些不可被描述而又恒久变化之物，\n「才是世间最深奥的东西。\n「唯有它们，才能彻底驱逐那些疯狂。\n「唯有梦，才能将意识从最深沉的黑暗中唤醒。\n「我乃命题之人，亦是求解之人。\n「以世人之梦挽救世界，曾是属于我的答案。\n「而今，你们也寻到了属于自己的答案，\n「我会将所有的梦归还世人。\n「须弥的子民啊，再见了。\n「愿你们今晚得享美梦。」

She can throw 1 White Jade Radish this way once every 0.6s. ｜ 处于<color=#FFD780FF>玉颗珊珊月中落</color>的桂子仙机状态下时，当瑶瑶进行冲刺、跳跃或处于奔跑状态下时，将不断向附近的敌人投掷白玉萝卜。每0.6秒至多通过这种方式投掷1枚白玉萝卜。

- I often try to forge small ornaments with complex structures to hone my precision-crafting skills. For example, a web-like pendant, or woven scroll earrings... Once I finish a product, I usually give it to one of my friends or neighbors.\nOh? Can I make rings? Of course! Just the other day, I made a ring in the shape of a Brilliant Chrysanthemum. The design schematic alone took me quite a bit of effort.\nOh, you'd like one? Sure. Let me see your hand. Once I've measured your finger, I can forge one for you in no time. ｜ 为了锻炼精细加工的能力，我经常会尝试锻造一些带有复杂结构的小型饰品。比如编织网状的吊坠，织卷形式的耳环，做出来之后，我一般就会把这些小饰品送给朋友或者邻居。\n会不会做戒指？当然会做啊，前几天我刚做出了一枚灼灼彩菊式样的戒指，光是画设计图就费了我不少功夫。\n你想要？行啊，把手伸出来，我给你量一下指围，花不了多少时间就能做好。

- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 3 attacks that deal <color=#80C0FFFF>Hydro DMG</color>.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nConsumes a certain amount of Stamina to smack a Pufferball into the air that deals <color=#80C0FFFF>AoE Hydro DMG</color> upon landing.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nGathers the power of Hydro and plunges towards the ground from mid-air, damaging all opponents in her path. Deals <color=#80C0FFFF>AoE Hydro DMG</color> upon impact with the ground. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多三段攻击，造成<color=#80C0FFFF>水元素伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，向空中击出坠落时会造成<color=#80C0FFFF>水元素范围伤害</color>的水豚球。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n凝聚水元素的力量，从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成<color=#80C0FFFF>水元素范围伤害</color>。
- Ningguang ｜ 凝光
- And if they were to run into the tingly, zappy place, the hair all over their bodies will stand on end. I would not see those little rascals experience something so terrible. ｜ 如果跑到酥酥麻麻里面去，还会弄得全身的毛都竖起来。这种滋味，奴家可不希望小家伙们也体会到。
- "Cocouik" ｜ 「绿松石」
- Wolves of the Rift ｜ 兽境之狼
- Shogunate Samurai ｜ 幕府军士
- Oooh, yay! Klee wants to see Dodoco going on adventures in all kinds of places! ｜ 好耶！我还想看…嘟嘟可去其他地方冒险的故事！
- Heavy Hit Taken: I ｜ 重受击·其一
- Hold Skill DMG|{param3:P} ｜ 长按技能伤害|{param3:P}
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- No matter. I've heard that you've had a lot of very important things on your plate recently. Maybe you'll be willing to come try it out when you have the time. ｜ 无妨，听说你近来每日都有要事在身，说不定等到闲暇时，会有兴致稍作尝试。
- Why? You can just take some. It's not like I'm going anywhere, right? ｜ 哥哥？给我干什么？你有就好了呀，我又不会走掉。
- C'mon, I'll take you to my favorite barbecue place. ｜ 那就去我平时最常去的店里吃烤肉吧。
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>When Action Phase begins:</color> $[K56] a maximum of 2 cards with the highest original Elemental Dice Cost in your Hand. For each card you $[K56], this card accumulates 1 <color=#FFFFFFFF>Memories and Dreams</color> point (maximum of 2).\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>When your character uses a Skill:</color> If you haven't played an Action Card this round, consume 1 <color=#FFFFFFFF>Memories and Dreams</color> point, and this Skill costs 1 less Elemental Die. ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>行动阶段开始时：</color>$[K56]最多2张原本元素骰费用最高的手牌，每$[K56]1张，此牌就累积1点<color=#FFFFFFFF>「记忆和梦」</color>。（最多2点）\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>我方角色使用技能时：</color>如果我方本回合未打出过行动牌，则消耗1点<color=#FFFFFFFF>「记忆和梦」</color>，以使此技能少花费1个元素骰。
- Of course, in a minor sense, they've been affected too. But that counts for nothing compared to what I've been through. ｜ 他们当然也受到了一些轻微的影响，但是跟我所经受的相比又算得了什么？
- An insignia that marks the owner's identity. If it's been left here and no one thought to look for it for a long time, perhaps the owner didn't care about it very much. ｜ 标识着主人身份的徽记。既然被落在这种地方却许久没有被找回，看来主人并不在意它。
- Paimon's sure that it must have been because of a fervent desire for knowledge that they became Sumeru's first true scholar. ｜ 在这种求知欲的驱使下，渐渐成为第一位真正意义上的学者…
- Echoing Conch ｜ 回声海螺
- A secret, huh? Now Paimon really wants to know what it's all about! Paimon promises to drop by next time! ｜ 说得这么神秘，我也开始好奇了呢…就先答应你好了！
- Boss, Cat's Tail ｜ 「猫尾」老板娘
- Check the map and select a hotspot to reinforce ｜ 查看地图，选择支援地点
- I suspect not. But once in a while, I too would guess that if wishes were like the clouds in the sky, they will one day return to the earth as raindrops... ｜ 我想不能。只是偶尔我也会猜想，假如愿望是天空中片片云朵，终有一日化作雨水落回大地…
- Whew, look at her go. Seems like somebody's trying to convince us that she's the best at what she does. ｜ 突然就变得滔滔不绝了，她好像要证明自己在这方面做得最好呢。
- When Overloaded is triggered, an Energy Blast will occur, dealing DMG to surrounding opponents. ｜ 引发超载反应时，会释放能量冲击，对周围的敌人造成伤害。
- Chasca throws the malfunctioning trackball into the distance... Moments later, a huge explosion rings out over the ocean. ｜ 恰斯卡将濒临爆炸的控制球抛向远方…随后海面上响起巨大的爆炸声。
- Rock Shieldwall Mitachurl ｜ 岩盾丘丘暴徒
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:P}
- Elite Flying unit that will <color=#FF8126FF>take flight</color> after being deployed. Charges to attack enemies in the air and swoops down to attack enemies on the ground, dealing Cryo DMG. ｜ 精锐空中单位，部署后<color=#FF8126FF>升空</color>，平飞冲刺攻击空中的敌人，俯冲攻击地面的敌人，造成冰元素伤害。
- Huh, I never even thought of trying that... ｜ 原来还能这么解决…这种方法我想都没想过。
- So that's the "cave of ill fortune" Granny Komaki talked about, huh? Nothing scary about it! ｜ 原来小卷婆婆说的「有厄运的洞」是这里呀…这有什么可怕的啦。
- A new future deserves a new meaning, a chance to take a definitive step forward. ｜ 既然我们已经创造了新的未来，就该让这个未来拥有新的意义，而并非原地踏步。
- Affirmative. I am... *garbled mechnical noises* prototype, with a large number of bold design elements. ｜ 肯定。我是…（嘈杂的机械音）的试做产品，拥有大量大胆的设计要素。
- Wandering Fowl Warm and Cool ｜ 游禽蕴温凉
- A masquerade mask worn by the old aristocrats of Mondstadt. Its hollow eyes are fixated on the golden days of the past. ｜ 曾经属于旧日蒙德贵族的舞会面具，那空洞的眼眶依旧凝望着昔日的盛景。
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- The Seal of Chymical Marriage was an ancient Fontainian ritual meant to seal off the source of life. Now it has been reversed, and all has been set free once more! ｜ 「密合之约印」是古代枫丹文明封住生命之源的仪式。现在逆转之后，一切得以解放！
- Making dog-ears on pages, stuffing roses into books, putting them onto shelves the wrong way... These are definitely violations of the library rules. ｜ 折坏书页、塞玫瑰花进书里、把书倒着插进书架…肯定算是违反了图书馆的规则吧。
- Ancient Chronicle of the Dreamseeker Priest (II) ｜ 古寻梦祭司的记录·其之二
- Oh dear me, this film doesn't seem to have come out right... ｜ 哎呀，这样拍出来的「映影」可不太对。
- Wait, but Marcel's pretty old... Has this case been going on for so long that he's Vacher and Vigneire's grown son? ｜ 不对啊，玛塞勒年纪那么大，他是瓦谢和薇涅尔的儿子的话，少女失踪案有那么长历史吗？
- Quicksand Eel ｜ 流沙鳗鳗
- Go to the underwater Faded Castle ｜ 前往水下的「褪色城堡」
- #*sigh* Oh, what are we going to do about Yakov... Do you have any clues, {NICKNAME}? ｜ #唉，雅科夫，雅科夫该怎么办啊…{NICKNAME}，有什么头绪了吗？
- "Rules, logic, and exceptions... Once I've grasped these three major aspects, there's no match I can't take with ease!"\nHint: Yanfei's deck is based around Food and Charged Attacks. She will attempt to make full use of low-cost Food and deal high DMG with characters who use Charged Attacks. ｜ 「规则、逻辑、特例…搞明白这三大要点后，无论是多复杂的牌局，我都能轻轻松松拿下它啦！」\n【提示】烟绯的牌组以「料理」和「重击」为主题，在充分发挥低费「料理」效果的同时，由多位角色进行「重击」以造成高额伤害。
- 1-Mirror Projection Attack DMG|{param4:F1P} ATK+{param5:F1P} Elemental Mastery ｜ 1枚光幕攻击伤害|{param4:F1P}攻击力+{param5:F1P}元素精通
- Hehe, you guessed it! My family runs a huge orchard. ｜ 嘿嘿，是的，我们家有好大一片果园呢。
- About Amber ｜ 关于安柏…
- Hmph. Seriously, between the two of you talking over each other, your report was as clear as mud. But don't worry, I got the gist of it. ｜ 哼，两张嘴还讲得乱七八糟的，不过我大概听懂了。
- Sure. ｜ 好啊。
- Uhh... I take it you're "Uncle Kimosi"? ｜ 咦…「基莫西叔叔」？

- The boundary between medicine and poison seems to have blurred, as has the line between life and death... Where can one find a truly perfect remedy, or does it exist at all? ｜ 毒与药的界限已经模糊，生与死的边界也在动摇…问世间何处能求万全之方？
- Just leave it to me — I'm a professional. ｜ 届时交给我来确认就行了，我是专业的。
- Garvipidam seems to be feeling better. Paimon even saw him crack a smile when he was playing just now. ｜ 伽吠毗陀好像释怀不少，和你打牌时，我还看见他笑了呢。
- #Let's go, {NICKNAME}! Let's hustle and get the job done pronto! Just have to collect enough Anemo Particles so these Keepers can keep their home! ｜ #我们走吧，{NICKNAME}，快快干活，早早收工！找齐足够的「风之微粒」，帮这些守望者保住小镇！
- Quick Concoctions ｜ 快速炼制
- That is, in fact, my name... ｜ 这倒确实是我的名字…
- Our shop specializes in jewelry and antiques. Please inquire the shop owner about the list of items on sale. The stock is limited, so please make your decision before we run out! ｜ 本店主营珠宝古董，在售珠宝清单请询店主。货源紧俏，欲购从速！
- The Domain may have various challenge objectives that must be completed, and the various areas within the Domain themselves may also contain challenge objectives. ｜ 秘境之中可能存在各种需要完成的挑战目标，同时，秘境中的各个区域也可能存在着挑战目标。
- No more than {param2} Lil' Fungi retreated ｜ 小小灵蕈退场数量不超过{param2}
- Err? ｜ 嗯？
- Guest Challenge: Timaeus ｜ 来客挑战：蒂玛乌斯
- Um, you could say that... Kind of. Hehe. ｜ 嗯…可以这么说吧…哈哈…
- Huh? You did that on purpose! ｜ 咦…好呀，你故意挑拨我！
- I sense it too... There's a soul nearby — almost a complete one. ｜ 我也有感觉，附近有一个接近完整的灵魂。
- Speaking of which, why did you choose to leave the desert, father? You rarely mention your past, so I see all this very differently from Tirzad... ｜ 说起来，老爹当初又是为什么选择了离开沙漠呢？都是因为老爹很少提起自己以前的事，我和提尔扎德的感受完全不一样…
- I'm sorry, my lady, but this is just the kind of man he was. He probably saw this box as some kind of personal trash heap, and dumped any and everything in here... ｜ 对不起，小姐，他就是这种人。估计他把箱子当成垃圾堆了，什么都往里放。
- Food ｜ 食物
- Noailles ｜ 诺瓦勒斯
- Can Ascend ｜ 可突破
- The Inazuman florist Sakuya wants to promote her shop, "Sakuya's Flowers," so she is organizing a new promotional activity... ｜ 稻妻的花匠咲耶为了推广自己的「咲耶花屋」，正举办着一场全新的推广活动…
- A smirking woodcarving head that can be used to assemble an "Aranara Carving." It is unpainted and has the unique texture and aroma of logs.\nA fairy tale writer wrote several fairy tales about the mischievous Aranara who used to be pranksters and eventually admitted their mistakes. Unfortunately, these fairy tales have inspired more naughty children... ｜ 嚣张坏笑着的木刻脑袋，可用于组装「兰那罗木刻」。未经上色，拥有原木的独特质感与香气。\n有一位童话作者，编写了数篇喜爱恶作剧的兰那罗改正错误的童话，成功让调皮捣蛋的邻居家小朋友认错。不幸的是，这些童话启发了更多的顽皮小朋友…
- During the joyous festival, some involved with the filmmaking industry are wearing frowns. You and Paimon encounter an unfortunate contracted employee... ｜ 欢快的节庆之时，也有映影行业的相关人士愁眉不展，你与派蒙就在会场附近找到了一位倒霉的乙方员工…
- ...That way, I can... become "myself" again... ｜ 我就能…变回「我自己」…
- So if we're in the remaining consciousness of Greater Lord Rukkhadevata, and it's also been affected by forbidden knowledge pollution, then does that mean, in order to save us, Greater Lord Rukkhadevata... ｜ 那既然这里作为大慈树王残留的意识，也受到了禁忌知识的污染，那是不是说大慈树王的死…
- W—We did it... The two Shadow Pins have been plunged back into the earth. ｜ 成、成功了…两根浮起来的「小缝影针」都重新钻入地中。
- As long as you understand, we're good, in which case, I won't take up any more of your time. ｜ …明白了就好，我就不耽搁你们时间了。
- This is all of them, right? ｜ 这些就是全部了吧？
- A favor? Haha, well sure! How can I help? ｜ 帮忙？哈哈，可以啊，请问是什么事需要我帮忙呢？
- Master Diluc isn't all about money. I think he would prefer to see people drinking in moderation than chase bigger profits at any cost. ｜ 老爷不是计较那一点小钱的人。也许，相比毫无节制地增长营收，他更希望人们都能适度饮酒。
- Good morning, Freminet. ｜ 早啊，菲米尼。
- No, you're not fine. Captain, you may not be aware, but Masashi previously fainted on the front lines. The doctor thought that it might be a neurological condition caused by overstimulated emotions. It's pretty serious. ｜ 你好什么呀好，队长你不知道，将司之前在前线突然晕倒，医生说可能是情绪太激动导致脑子出了问题，很危险的。
- Listen to the voices in the corridor ｜ 聆听走廊中的声音
- I'm quite content with my life right now. ｜ 对于现在的生活，我可是很知足的。
- Come see me or my chief secretary for any questions regarding trade. ｜ 如果有什么关于贸易的问题，来找我或者我的秘书官都可以。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Observe Teacup ｜ 观察茶杯
- A knife just needs to be two things: sturdy, and sharp. ｜ 选刀，只需要坚硬、锋利。
- That's right! Haha. ｜ 是的，哈哈！
- I'll prepare some food and juice. ｜ 我去准备些料理和果汁。

- He sure did win them over, huh... ｜ 真够死心塌地的啊…
- Increases Elemental Mastery by <color=#99FFFFFF>150</color>. Gain the "Mirror of Night" effect within 15s after the equipping character creates a shield: The current active party member deals <color=#99FFFFFF>42%</color> increased DMG to nearby opponents. You can gain the "Mirror of Night" effect once every 14s. ｜ 元素精通提升<color=#99FFFFFF>150</color>点。装备者创造护盾后的15秒内，获得「照夜之镜」效果：队伍中自己的当前场上角色对附近的敌人造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>42%</color>，每14秒至多获得一次「照夜之镜」效果。
- Rocksteady ｜ 不破础石
- Defeat all %1% opponents ｜ 打倒所有%1%名敌人
- You find the masterless ninken that Thoma mentioned, but its attitude is a bit strange... ｜ 找到了托马所说的那只无主的忍犬，但忍犬的态度似乎有些奇怪…
- Your uncle? ｜ 你的叔叔？
- Yes, this slightly chubby build I've got is what the heroes of old would've had — a body that balances impact and agility. ｜ 我这样微胖的体型才是过去英雄们的体型，兼具冲击力与灵活性的体型。
- Sakujirou ｜ 朔次郎
- Recipe: Minty Fruit Tea ｜ 食谱：薄荷曼果茶
- I believe the story was called "The True Heart of Darkness: Secret Tales of the Yellow Rose." ｜ 最后出了一篇名叫《黑暗深处真正的心脏——黄玫瑰秘事》的报道。
- An artificed Hydro Mimic Frog that looks much the same as those normally encountered... ｜ 被拟想而出的「幻形蛙·水」，看起来似乎和寻常所见的「幻形蛙·水」并无太大差别…
- Kaeya ｜ 凯亚
- #Ah, {NICKNAME} didn't get to that part? ｜ #原来{NICKNAME}还没有将此事向您讲明吗？
- I don't know much about rocks though, and even less when it comes to mining big lumps of Magical Crystal Ore. If you're interested, go take a look. ｜ 我对石头研究不深，也不擅长采集大块的魔晶矿。你感兴趣的话，可以去这里看看。
- These herbivores, which often dwell close to the water, are famous for their steely, stoic "won't even twitch if lightning strikes right next to their toes" disposition. Tourists consider them to be the paragon of animal friends.\nWhen first arriving in The Realm Within, these Capybaras often appeared as if frozen in place, leading Tubby to mistakenly believe they were ill, causing a great deal of confusion. Over time, however, the Capybaras in the Serenitea Pot seem to have grown much livelier, at least taking occasional leisurely strolls... ｜ 栖息在水畔的食草动物，以稳定到「落雷砸在脚边都不会被惊动」的性格闻名，被游客们评为模范级的动物朋友。\n在刚来到壶中洞天时，豚兽们经常发呆，像是石头一样完全一丝不动，这让阿圆误以为它们生病了，忙乱了好一阵子。随着时间的推移，如今生活在「尘歌壶」中的豚兽性格似乎变得活泼了许多，至少会每隔一段时间，慢慢地散一会步…
- Return to the venue and keep playing "Marechaussee Hunter: Judgment Day" ｜ 返回游戏场地，继续游玩《逐影猎人：审判之时》
- Help Tang Wen ｜ 帮助汤雯
- Did you forget about what had happened to him? ｜ 凯亚之前是忘记了吴船长的事吗？
- When it comes to appraising treasure and collecting antiques, my sole objective is to surpass Father. Then there will be no one better than me. ｜ 在宝物鉴定和古董收藏方面，我唯一的目标就是父亲大人。只要能超过他，我就是最厉害的人了。
- What do you mean? ｜ 什么意思？
- Well, okay. Sweep away the leaves for me, and I'll be gone. ｜ 好了，等落叶打扫完之后，我就会离开了。
- Cabinets ｜ 立柜
- Though I've never tried before, I've read a lot of information and theoretically should be able to properly control it. Let me give it a try... ｜ 我查阅过很多资料，虽然尚未实践过，但理论上不会出错的。先让我试一下…
- Destroy Stormterror's crystal in the Temple of the Falcon ｜ 破坏西风之鹰的庙宇中的风龙结晶
- The tycoon of a winery empire in Mondstadt, unmatched in every possible way. ｜ 坐拥蒙德大半酒业的贵公子，财力、人望、能力都令人无法小觑。
- Curve, what do you think? ｜ 曲线，你怎么看？
- Equipment Card ｜ 装备牌
- Oh, except, if you're into the same kind of stuff as Ixtelo, I don't wanna hear about it. ｜ 哦，不过你要是有跟伊柯特洛差不多的嗜好那我可不奉陪。
- Alright. I'm counting on you all. ｜ …好吧。那就拜托了。
- If we were looking down from on high, I wonder whether we'd find that the Ley Lines are just the reflections of the stars upon the earth? ｜ 从高处往下看，会不会觉得地脉就是倒映在大地之中的星辰呢？
- Windtrace Coin bonus for attaining "Recon in Force" ｜ 达成「强行侦察」的「迷踪币」加成
- You read me like a book. Very impressive! Huh, looks like I'll need to work on some new techniques... ｜ 完全被你看穿了，真是厉害！唔，看来下次我得换一种手法了…
- Sharky's Bite Base DMG|{param1:F2P} Max HP ｜ 鲨鲨撕咬基础伤害|{param1:F2P}生命值上限
- Head southwest and you'll eventually reach Tatarasuna. Jade Steel, Inazuma's pride and joy, is produced there. ｜ 往西南方向可以前往踏鞴砂，稻妻引以为傲的玉钢就产自那里。
- "Called In For Cleanup" ｜ 「清洁工作」
- Spike placements found: #1#/3 ｜ 找到光钉安置点#1#/3
- You already know of my past circumstances. ｜ 我之前的情况，都和姨说过。
- Actually, I already have someone in mind. Do you still remember that female scholar named Setaria? ｜ 其实我已经有人选了，你们还记得一个叫塞塔蕾的女学者吗？
- Rest well, then. ｜ 你先好好休息。
- Yunning, when can we arrange the next interview for? ｜ 韵宁，我的下一次采访，可以安排到什么时候？

- You old thief! How dare you call my Glaze L... I mean, Qingxin! How dare you call them mushrooms and just... pick and eat them! ｜ 你这老贼，上来指着我种的琉璃…我种的清心，说是蘑菇，摘了就往嘴里送！

- Let's continue exploring. Maybe we'll find some way to break this magical bubble. ｜ 总之，我们一边继续探索，一边看看有没有什么解开这个魔法泡泡的线索吧。
- My brother always wanted to travel... But I fell ill, and he had to stay back to take care of me. ｜ 哥哥他之前一直想出去旅行的，可是…因为我生病了，他必须留下来照顾我。

- What the...!? Did someone take all the materials related to Curve!? ｜ 这…难道谁把曲线的资料拿走了吗？！
- As it turned out, it was just some ordinary ore. Not that having a place to replenish resources is a bad thing, of course. If you wanna have a look, it should be in... this direction. ｜ 结果只是普通的矿产罢了。也好，算是一处可以用来补充资源的地方。你要去看看吗？大概是这个方位。
- Or rather, as a means to occupy Amenoma Yuuya's body. ｜ 不，应该说是「占据」了天目优也的身体。
- Don't forget about us when you're famous. ｜ 希望成名以后不要忘了我们。
- Come on, he isn't you. ｜ 他毕竟不是你啊。

### Part 085

- Ah! Have you tried using your elemental power with food? I don't mean for cooking as such — rather, channeling your power into the ingredients themselves. ｜ 对了，你有尝试过用元素力做菜吗？不是说烹饪，而是把元素力放进菜里。
- But who? ｜ 究竟是谁呢？

- We'll just have to roll with the punches... ｜ 只能见招拆招了…

- A small timekeeping gadget. On moonless nights, it was the only way its former owner could know the time. ｜ 展示当前时间的小道具，在没有月亮的黑夜里是唯一的时间参照。

I want to live up to the same standard... but it seems that the harder I try to follow in his footsteps, the more overwhelmed I get and the more mistakes I make... ｜ 帝君的决断，总是能够为璃月的多数生命带来福祉。我很敬佩这一点，也很想像他一样…但有时，越想着要去追赶帝君的脚步，就越容易紧张得出错…

- It's a travesty not to be able to share this fine drink with someone else... ｜ 有这种酒喝，却不能和人分享…真是太遗憾了。

- When a party member triggers a Vaporize, Frozen, Electro-Charged, Bloom, Hydro Swirl, or a Hydro Crystallize reaction on opponents, 1 stack of Past Draconic Glories will be granted to Neuvillette for 30s. Max 3 stacks. Past Draconic Glories causes Charged Attack: Equitable Judgment to deal 110%/125%/160% of its original DMG.\nThe stacks of Past Draconic Glories created by each kind of Elemental Reaction exist independently. ｜ 队伍中的角色对敌人触发蒸发、冻结、感电、绽放、水元素扩散或水元素结晶反应时，将为那维莱特产生持续30秒，至多叠加3层的「遗龙之荣」效果，使重击·衡平推裁造成原本110%/125%/160%的伤害。\n每种元素反应产生的「遗龙之荣」分别独立存在。

- Eh!? ｜ 欸？！

- A mini Seelie that shines with brilliant colors, and which can move freely underwater. ｜ 拥有着璀璨色彩的迷你仙灵，在水下环境中依然可以活动自如。
- Talk to the tribespeople ｜ 与前来的部族人对话
- Oh, come to think of it, Xingqiu mentioned that he'd like to thank you for finishing the illustrations on time. He said they looked amazing despite the time you had. ｜ 说起来行秋之前说过，他很想向你道谢，能在那么短的时间画出笔触丝毫不见仓促的插图。
- The things are practically invulnerable! I've seen my betters using real-deal Iron Points against one... ｜ 玄文兽几乎刀枪不入，之前有位前辈用上好的「铁尖枪」对付它…
- Wow, smells good. I'll take them. ｜ 嗯…闻起来真不错，这三份野菇鸡肉串人家就收下啦。
- You are correct. I am looking for the master I should protect, Ma— ｜ 没错，我是在寻找我应该保护的主人，玛——
- Traveler ｜ 主角
- Cat's Tail Message Board ｜ 猫尾留言板
- Different items may appear within the area to help you rid it of Forest Boars. The Hunter's Shield allows you to damage Forest Boars, and it will also restore Stamina to characters. Traps can also expel all Forest Boars within a fixed AoE. ｜ 区域内可能出现不同的道具，协助驱逐野林猪。「猎人护盾」可以对野林猪造成伤害，并为角色恢复体力。「诱捕装置」则可以同时驱逐一定范围内的所有野林猪。
- Lacerating Slash ｜ 裂爪横击
- As expected of the great hero of Liyue and the esteemed guest of the Tianquan — your words exude confidence. ｜ 果然是璃月港的大英雄，天权大人的座上宾呀，嘿嘿，三言两语，都带着一股豪气。
- ??? ｜ ？？？

- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸

- My dear familiar... ｜ 吾之眷属…
- I, uh... haha. ｜ 这…
- I don't think I'm heavy enough. Maybe Paimon should also... ｜ 我的重量应该不够，要不派蒙也…
- The Last Day of Remuria ｜ 雷穆利亚的最后一日
- Traveling Doctor's Medicine Pot ｜ 游医的药壶
- Ei ｜ 影
- Good. In that case... I'll take some time for myself now. ｜ 那么，接下来…是私人时间。
- Wicked Dragon ｜ 恶龙
- The caravan from my tribe should have brought some firewood... I think starting a bonfire might help. ｜ 沃陆之邦带来的物资中应该有木料…我在想，点起篝火说不定会有效果。
- Food ｜ 食物
- Go back to the café, now! I must have put the score on the table! ｜ 快回去！快回去咖啡馆！我准是把乐谱放在桌上了！
- Well, now that we've seen you repair Seymour and take us to help Puca and such, Paimon's sure that your Father must be a decent person! ｜ 嗯，不过既然见识了玛梅赫修好西摩尔，也看到玛梅赫依照指引带我们来帮助芙佳她们，看来这个玛梅赫爸爸是个好人！
- No matter how the environment changes, a warrior's fighting spirit burns eternal, and the pursuit of martial perfection knows no rest.\nFollowing in the wake of time and tradition, "Baraka" Xilonen of the Nanatzcayan, "Malipo" Kinich of the Huitztlan, and "Vuka" Chasca of the Tlalocan — great warriors all — have designed a whole new set of Tune-Up Goals, to guide us on the path to prowess and self-betterment. What's more, these challenges have been granted the highest recognition from the most venerable Tumaini!\nWarriors! Great heroes have gone before you, now follow their examples and strive to break the limits of the horizon. ｜ 不论环境如何变化，心中的斗志都该恒常燃烧，磨砺武艺的步伐也不应放缓。\n遵照惯例，以「纳茨卡延」的「巴莱卡」希诺宁、「维茨特兰」的「马力卜」基尼奇和「特拉洛坎」的「武卡」恰斯卡三位大师为主，三部族的著名强者一同设计了全新的砥砺目标，为我们指明了锤炼自我的方向。同时，殊为可敬的「杜麦尼」为这些挑战予以了最高的认证！\n战士们！榜样在前，拿出气势，不断冲击地平线上的新记录吧！
- To fight back against their oppression, a group of brave citizens came together and formed an underground resistance. ｜ 为了反抗贵族们的种种暴行，有一群勇敢的蒙德人聚集了起来，形成了一个秘密的反抗组织。
- Frozen: Divergence ｜ 冻结·分支
- Master Kaeya, if you have time, why not go talk to him about it? You're probably the only person he'll listen to besides Master Diluc. ｜ 凯亚少爷，你要是有空去看看特纳，可以跟他提一提这个情况吗？现在除了老爷，就数你在他面前说话最管用了。
- Zhongli ｜ 钟离
- So, there's information that even you can't get a hold of, huh? ｜ 就算是厉害的凯瑟琳小姐，也有没法掌握的情报呀！
- Not high enough, huh... I guess that means we need a more powerful source of heat. ｜ 温度不够高，那看来得用更厉害的手段才行。
- Neuvillette ｜ 那维莱特
- As long as the conch doesn't object, why not? ｜ 海螺没有说不愿意，那应该就是可以吧！
- Do you really believe that by kidnapping the scholars, you'll be able to negotiate with the Akademiya? ｜ ——你觉得，单凭那批学者，你就能跟教令院谈判吗？

- Something to Share ｜ 有什么想要分享…
- Perhaps you could enlighten me then. Whence should said amusement be derived? ｜ 你倒说说，这妙趣在哪？
- Chat: Managing the Orchard ｜ 闲聊·经营果园
- That's right! Paimon's sure you can handle it and everything, but if something this heavy lands on you, you're gonna get yourself hurt, no matter who you are. ｜ 没错！就算是申鹤，被这么沉的东西砸一下也会受伤吧。
- I will say, I never thought you'd be so easygoing outside of work, Clorinde. ｜ 说起来，我以前也没想到克洛琳德小姐私下里讲话这么轻松呢！
- Impossible! I wouldn't even be able to put food on the table at that rate! Can't do it, nope! ｜ 不卖不卖！这简直…简直亏得我身上的眼镜片都剩不下来啦！绝对不卖！
- Volcano Kablam DMG|{param5:F1P} ｜ 「大火山崩落」伤害|{param5:F1P}
- Mona ｜ 莫娜
- $[K1]: When your active character is <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[A2201]</color>, equip this card.\nAfter $[A2201] equips this card, immediately use <color=#FFD780FF>$[S22014]</color> once.\nWhen your $[A2201], who has this card equipped, uses <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S22014]</color>: All of your Summon(s) gain +1 $[K3].\n(You must have $[A2201] in your deck to add this card to your deck.) ｜ $[K1]：我方出战角色为<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[A2201]</color>时，装备此牌。\n$[A2201]装备此牌后，立刻使用一次<color=#FFD780FF>$[S22014]</color>。\n装备有此牌的$[A2201]使用<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S22014]</color>时：我方所有召唤物$[K3]+1。\n（牌组中包含$[A2201]，才能加入牌组）
- Skill DMG|{param1:P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param1:P}
- I won't disturb you then. ｜ 不打扰你了。
- This ancient aggregation of machinery hails from the desert and has quirks that modern-day civilizations cannot comprehend. In battle, the Algorithm of Semi-Intransient Matrix of Overseer Network will fire its components out while its core enters an "invisible" state that hides it and increases its RES. <color=#f39001>Use Catalyze reactions to strike this core, or use Electro attacks on it during such times as the fired components have been destroyed and need to recover</color> to cancel this invisibility and cause the core to be immobilized due to overclocking. If you fail to cancel the core's invisibility for too long, the Algorithm of Semi-Intransient Matrix of Overseer Network will begin to display its power by using a mighty overclocked attack... ｜ 来自沙漠的古代机械集合体，拥有现今文明无法理解的特性。在战斗中，半永恒统辖矩阵会将其元件投射出去，核心会进入「不可视」状态，隐身并且大幅提升伤害抵抗能力。<color=#f39001>使激化反应波及其核心，或是在元件被破坏后恢复期间利用雷元素攻击</color>，能够破除半永恒统辖矩阵的不可视状态，并使其进入超频过载的瘫痪状态。如果长时间无法破除核心的不可视状态，半永恒统辖矩阵会施展威力强大的超频冲击…
- The monsters let out a terrifying roar of anger and resentment, before dissipating into thin air. ｜ 魔物发出一声可怕的怒吼，带着愤怒与不甘的执念，消失在了你们面前。
- Paimon doesn't get it... Won't we look even more suspicious going around saying we're Akademiya students AND asking about the stolen item? ｜ 如果东西是教令院丢的话，装成学生来探听消息难道不会更可疑吗？
- Complete the challenge with no less than {param2}s remaining ｜ 完成挑战且倒数计时不小于{param2}秒
- Apparently, I'll have to show a little more of my true capabilities. I did not realize that you had such a penchant for getting into dangerous situations. ｜ 看来需要拿出些真的本事了。没想到你这么容易身处险境。
- #I can get over there, easy, even with {REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]} in tow. ｜ #就算是带上{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}，飞到那边也是轻轻松松。
- Why do you think? Obviously, because I possess superior skills and am always one step ahead of the competition... Well, when you're the competition, at least. ｜ 那还用说？当然是因为我本领高强，永远快人一步…哦不，应该说是快你一步。
- #*sob* {NICKNAME}, Paimon... He's trying to kick me out again...! ｜ #呜呜呜…{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}，派蒙姐姐…哥哥又要赶我走…
- Talk to Katheryne in Inazuma City ｜ 与稻妻城的凯瑟琳交谈
- Rhinedottir... Master... Is this your creation, the giant dragon Durin? ｜ 莱茵多特…师父…这就是你曾经创造的巨龙「杜林」吗？
- Alright, then let us go our separate ways for now. ｜ 好了，那我们暂且别过吧。
- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "Halcyon Times." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含旋律为「宴语韵悠悠」。
- Yeah! You even took off your uniform. ｜ 对呀对呀，你连警服都脱了。
- · An all-round developed Onikabuto-shaped machine\n· Extremely powerful in combat at all ranges\n· Can attack with consecutive earthquakes\n· Can attack with various Electro attacks\n· Enhanced resistance to interruption\n· Medium movement speed ｜ ·全能鬼兜虫型机关\n·全距离战力极强\n·连续震地攻击\n·多种雷元素攻击\n·抗打断强化状态\n·行动速度适中

- We must hurry. ｜ 要赶快过去。
- Come on, Liyue is full of famous cuisine. You just haven't found one that suits your preferences yet. ｜ 怎么可能，璃月港里可是有很多名菜的，是你还没吃到合自己胃口的菜而已。
- Unleashes cone-shaped flames, dealing Pyro DMG to opponents hit. ｜ 向前方喷射扇形火焰，对命中的目标造成火元素伤害。
- Someone mistook me for a researcher earlier and directed me toward a place full of Condessence Crystals. ｜ 似乎有人把我误认作了科研人员，给我指了一处萃凝晶富集的地方。
- Can we keep the outfits? ｜ 新衣服会送我们吗？
- Thank you for your concern... I can still manage for now. I'm merely venting because of my sore legs. ｜ 谢谢关心…目前暂时还撑得住，只是腿还在酸，有感而发。
- As the primordial sea returns once more, and as the devourer of all darkens the sky, only he who is whole unto himself may survive. ｜ 在原初大海重新归来、吞吃星辰者让天幕黯淡时，唯有自体自身的他可以存活。
- A "Spiritsoul Purge" centered around your active character that deals AoE DMG will be unleashed. This can occur once every 1.5s. ｜ 以当前场上角色为中心，释放一次「灵性斥逐」，造成范围伤害，此效果至多每1.5秒触发一次。
- The hands of time will never come to an end, but the same cannot not be said for those cherished years of the young maiden's life when she was doted upon. ｜ 指针的旋转不会有尽头，但少女受人宠爱的岁月则相反。
- I've marked <color=#00E1FFFF>Ms. Zhiqiao's</color> location on the map for you. Hopefully, you won't have any trouble finding her. ｜ <color=#00E1FFFF>芷巧</color>小姐的住址，我已经给你们标记在地图上了，要找的话就快过去吧。
- Protect the Ley Line Monolith ｜ 守护地脉镇石完整
- Quit Match ｜ 退出游戏
- Where's the circle? ｜ 圈呢？
- In the Desert ｜ 在沙漠的时候…
- Accursed angels, banished ■■ — you should have long since ■■■■! ｜ 天使，被贬谪之■■，早应■■■■！
- No problem! Just sign here, and I'll sign too... Okay... Now, write your address here, and then sign on this page as well... ｜ 没问题！来来，先在这扉页上签字，我也得签一下…嗯…这里写上你的住址，还有这一页也得签名…
- Shenhe lifts up the Plaustrite and leaves. ｜ 申鹤扛着浮生石离开了。
- It'd be such a beautiful moment. ｜ 想到那副画面，可真是美好。
- Any other questions? ｜ 难道有，其他的，问题？
- ...Wow! It's changing back! ｜ …噗！回来了！
- If you have free time, we can go to Liyue Harbor together... ｜ 若你有空，可否一同前往璃月港内…
- To be honest, this image seems a bit weird... ｜ 总觉得是有点奇怪的影像呢…
- If only someone would set up a special training school for actors! I need someone who not only knows how to fight, but also how to control their expressions and inject emotion into their lines. In short, I need someone who can do it all! ｜ 要是有人专门办一所培养演员的学校就好了！我实在需要又能打，又能好好管理表情，用充沛的情感演绎台词的万能演员。
- Never thought that I'd travel this far one day... ｜ 真没想到，我也会有离乡远行的一天…
- Sure. What are we playing? ｜ 好，我们来玩点什么？
- As for me, I was just an average merchant. I would wake up early and travel all around to make a profit, but the Mora was still nowhere near enough. I could only watch my daughter's health deteriorate day by day. ｜ 而我呢，原本只是个小商人，起早贪黑、东奔西走，赚到的那点钱远远不够，只能一天天地看着她越来越虚弱。
- Traces of the Adventurers' Guild can be found across all Teyvat, even amidst the most dangerous places... ｜ 冒险家协会的足迹遍布大地，即使是极端危险的地方也一样…
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- Urgent Neko Parcel Hit DMG|{param7:F1P} ｜ 猫箱急件冲撞伤害|{param7:F1P}

- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- It's conceivable that our group of serious offenders somehow found a way to switch places with inmates who are about to be released, so they can walk out right under our noses. ｜ 也许这些重犯设法将自己和即将出狱的一些犯人掉了包，想借此越狱。
- Hangout Event ｜ 邀约事件
- A plain porcelain goblet that was once brimming with joyous brews. ｜ 朴素的白瓷酒杯，曾经盈满了欢愉的酒水。
- Because of Mondstadt's most powerful treasure? ｜ 难道是因为「最强的宝物」？
- Oh no. Looks like they've caught on to some kind of weakness! ｜ 糟糕了呀…好像被对方抓到什么破绽了！
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- The Echoing Conch has discovered the trail of "Iridescent Glory" near the Court of Fontaine Region. The abilities of Armored Crabs may be of some use here... ｜ 回响海螺在枫丹廷区附近的海域发现了「虹彩荣耀」的踪迹。据说，「异色重甲蟹」的能力似乎在此处派得上用场…
- #Let's hurry over to the Institute. {NICKNAME} needs to participate in the final qualification review, after all. ｜ #我们还是快点去枫丹科学院，让{NICKNAME}参加最终资质审核吧。
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Have you noticed the... makeup that Natlanese people wear? Or body paint, or tattoos, or graffiti, or whatever it's called — anyway, it looks really cool!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> I have noticed! "Body paint" is right, although it's not just any old paint. Apparently, it contains phlogiston.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Wow, really?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Yep. If you're interested to try it out, I'm pretty sure they offer a body painting experience specially for tourists — but they just use normal paint for that.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Ooh! Well, since we're here... why don't we try it? All part of the experience.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Sure thing. You'll need to pick a color palette and a motif first though. Each tribe has its own style.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Alright, Paimon chooses, uh... Paimon chooses... Ugh! They all look so cool! Choosing between them is impossible.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Meh, choosing is losing! Paimon will take them all!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Wow... Today I learned that Paimon is a maximalist... Well, I'm sure some people would say "less is more," but I say — you do you, Paimon!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> What are you talking about!? Paimon never said anything about using them all at once! She just wants options, so she can switch up her style every day!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> ...Oh. That's too bad... I woulda loved to see Paimon with an elaborate arm-tattoo...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Stop! Nope! Stop it! No imagining Paimon with an arm-tattoo! Not allowed! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>说起来，我发现纳塔人身上都有些不同纹样的…呃…油彩？涂鸦？虽然看不懂，但看上去好酷！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>我也发现了！听说是用涂料画上去的哦，这种涂料用燃素为原料制成，跟普通涂料不太一样呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸？居然是这样吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>但如果派蒙也感兴趣的话，我记得有专为游客提供的涂鸦体验服务哦，会用普通涂料来替代。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>真的吗真的吗？正所谓「来都来了」…不如…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>好啦好啦，可是不同的部族喜欢用的色彩和纹样风格都不一样，那派蒙选一个喜欢的吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>那我选…呃，选…哎呀！各有各的特色，根本选不出来嘛！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>哼。小孩子才做选择，派蒙我全都要！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>哇哦…想不到派蒙现在的审美风格是「极繁主义」…虽然不清楚别人会不会觉得奇怪，但我一定会支持你！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我又没说要同时画在身上，我的意思是一天换一个，六天不重样啦！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>哦。好可惜…看来花臂派蒙只能靠想象了…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不许可惜！还有快停止这种奇怪的想象！
- Hilichurl ｜ 丘丘人
- Hmm, Paimon wonders whether there's anything similar in the other places round here? ｜ 不过，别的地方会不会也有这样的东西呢？
- Temple of Silence ｜ 缄默之殿
- Yay! ｜ 好耶！
- I was just thinking of hiring someone to help out for a few days when you came along. ｜ 正想雇个人帮几天忙，恰好碰上你。
- Huh? Oh, ah, it's nothing. Just one of those Mora-spouting weasel thieves passed by is all. ｜ 没什么，刚才有只会撒金币的「盗宝鼬」跑过去了。
- Tell me about your work. ｜ 关于工作…
- You're leaving already? ｜ 这就要走了吗？
- Anyways, Mr. Elchingen said it best! He said that those capable should take on more responsibility. I'm more than willing to give my all to a boss like him. ｜ 总之，埃尔欣根先生也说过，能者多劳，我愿意为这样的老板尽全力。
