- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "Guhua's Legacy." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含旋律为「王山遗威」。
- The final verdict: The Iudex and the Oratrice Mecanique d'Analyse Cardinale judge that the two defendants are guilty of multiple counts of the crime of burglary, and will be sent to the Fortress of Meropide to serve their sentences. ｜ 最终裁定结果：最高审判官与「谕示裁定枢机」裁定此二人犯有「盗窃」等多项罪名，判决遣送至「梅洛彼得堡」服刑。

- Ah, the Oni King's Right Hand. Would you like to have a beetle battle with me? ｜ 「鬼王的左膀右臂」殿下，要和我来一场斗虫推演吗？

- Although the assassination did not go as Vacher expected, he was able to turn Callas into the murder suspect by dissolving the assassin he sent to the scene. ｜ 最后虽然在实行中出了意外，但凭借将行凶者溶解的办法，他让卡雷斯成为了杀人的嫌疑者。

- You go first. No need to wait for me. ｜ 你们先出发吧，不必等我。

- Naturally. One may not delight in social interactions, but that does not mean one lacks said faculties. ｜ 那是自然。本仙不喜交际，又不是不会交际。
- It's a shame you can't make bookmarks out of Dandelion Seeds... ｜ 可惜了，蒲公英籽不太合适用来做书签…
- Well, aren't you a talker yourself? You're welcome to try! ｜ 你的口气也不小啊，想要斩我的话，就自己来试试吧！
- A forest boar that dwells in the rainforest. This creature has developed a certain marvelous symbiosis with the Shroom-Kin.\nAccording to researchers' studies, Shroomboars rely on the parasitic mushrooms perched on them for natural camouflage, which allows them to evade predators and survive in the jungles.\nIf kept in a space with lush vegetation, perhaps these forest boars can attract butterflies and birds with their unique appearance and form mobile gardens in the Realm Within. ｜ 生活在雨林之中的野林猪，在演化过程中与蕈类形成了奇妙的共生关系。\n根据学者的研究，蕈猪依靠寄生其上的蕈类作为天然的迷彩，可以有效地躲避捕食者，更容易在丛林中存活下来。\n若是生活在植被茂盛的壶中洞天，这种野林猪或许能凭自己独特的外形吸引一些蝴蝶与鸟雀，成为移动花园般的存在吧。
- Impale the Night Healing|0%/{param6:F1P}/{param8:F1P} Bond of Life ｜ 贯夜治疗量|0%/{param6:F1P}/{param8:F1P}生命之契
- Lisa ｜ 丽莎
- And it's such an important task, so naturally I must ensure that it all goes without a hitch... ｜ 这么重要的任务，我当然要确保万无一失了…
- The Fountain of Lucine is where all of Fontaine's waters converge. It is the vessel of countless memories and emotions. ｜ 露景泉是枫丹所有水流的交汇处，里面沉淀着数量众多的回忆与情感。
- Well, you've also got blond hair. Best you leave, or you might be mistaken for that wanted fugitive. ｜ 看你模样，也是金发，说不好会被误认成通缉犯，还是早点回家吧。
- "...Nameless Passerby A, sacrificed. Gongozaemon, 30 years old (?), sacrificed. Yamada, 23 years old, sacrificed..." ｜ 「…无名过客甲，祭献；权五左卫门，约30岁（？），祭献；山田，23岁，祭献…」
- Enhances the performance of the alchemy cauldron, expanding the area into which ingredients may be placed when making potions. ｜ 改进炼金釜的性能，扩展炼制药剂时放置药材的区域大小。
- Nayram ｜ 奈兰
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- 4-Hit DMG|{param5:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param5:F1P}
- With the real one buried here, we can sell the fake, and no one will be the wiser! ｜ 哼，我们把真的埋这，把赝品给卖了，根本就是天衣无缝！
- I feel that if Hibiki wanted it, it must be good. As such, I ask you to have one such stone made. ｜ 奴家觉得，阿响想要的，一定是好的。所以，汝等帮忙弄个石头吧。
- ...Boss Thoma... will eat us... ｜ …「托马老大」…会吃了我们的…
- The purpose of work... Paimon thinks that's a pretty complicated question... ｜ 工作的意义…总觉得这是个好复杂的问题…
- The situation in Fontaine varies from region to region, so in order to both maintain public order as well as sustain a battle-ready force in the long term, the Palais Mermonia does not station permanent Maison Gardiennage staff in the countryside, instead sending them out on regular patrols to eliminate any dangers to public safety. As a result, monsters and persons of ill intent may be found around the country during the periods between regularly scheduled patrols...\nEuphrasie, the Chief Editor, collects intel from Adventurers and the Maison Gardiennage, and adds these objectives to her Bounty list.\nIf you can track these targets down, destroy them in time, and report your success to Euphrasie, your Reputation in Fontaine will increase.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Bounties: Intel</color>\nThrough eyewitness reports, target reports and the unique characteristics of each Bounty, one can track down the targets' whereabouts, target their unique characteristics and thus make proper preparations for their hunt.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Bounties: Time Limit</color>\nIf you cannot defeat Bounty targets within in a short period, they will flee, causing the pursuit to fail.\nIf you fail in your hunt, you can return to Euphrasie to re-accept the Bounty.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Bounties: Limits and Resetting</color>\nYou can only accept a certain number of Bounties every week.\nYou can check the number of Bounties you've completed this week in the Reputation Menu.\nThis limit is shared among all cities.\nNew Bounties will become available every Monday.\n\nOnce your Reputation reaches the maximum level, you can no longer accept new Bounties. ｜ 枫丹各地的情况各不相同，出于维持整体治安和长期战力的考虑，沫芒宫不会让执律庭的主力常驻在野外，持续执勤，而是会定期进行巡逻，清除威胁。因此，在执律庭两次出勤期间，偶尔会有漏网的魔物和恶人活跃…\n欧芙主编负责收集执律庭的侦察人员和冒险家们的情报，将这些目标列入「讨伐悬赏」的名单。\n如果能及时追踪、消灭这些目标，并向欧芙回报的话，就能提高在枫丹的声望。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【讨伐悬赏：情报】</color>\n通过悬赏的「目击者情报」、「目标情报」与「目标特点」，可以了解目标出现的地点、以及目标的类型，以及其特性，以此做好讨伐的准备。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【讨伐悬赏：时限】</color>\n如果无法在短时间内击败悬赏目标，悬赏目标就会逃跑，导致讨伐失败。\n讨伐失败后，可以在欧芙处重新领取。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【讨伐悬赏：接取限制与刷新】</color>\n每周能完成讨伐的数量是有限的。\n本周已完成的数量可以在声望界面查看。\n所有城市共享数量限制。\n每周一都会出现新的讨伐悬赏。\n\n声望等级达到上限后，无法继续接取新的讨伐悬赏。
- Let me get ready first... ｜ 我先准备一下…
- Oh well. Let's just wait for him at the Winery this time. ｜ 这次就在酒庄等等他吧。
- Remember, get the relics and get out. ｜ 记住，拿到文物后马上离开。
- Not out of a selfish desire for glory, but to lend our strength to a greater cause. ｜ 这不是什么自私的想法，只是我们都想贡献自己的力量而已。
- #Arasudraka has learned why Nara {NICKNAME} entered Vanarana. Your and Arana's friend will be fine. ｜ #兰修提袈听说了，那菈{NICKNAME}进入桓那兰那的原因。你们重要的朋友、兰拉娜重要的朋友，一定没事的。
- Oh? Interested in their special cocktails, are you? ｜ 哦？是对这家的特调感兴趣吗？
- I've heard about the previous iterations of the event. Weren't they all named after your big bro Itto? ｜ 我听说过以前的斗虫大赛，冠名的不是你那位「荒泷」大哥吗？
- Yes, that's her. ｜ 对，就是她。
- Concentrates the power of the winds to break free from the shackles of the earth, dealing <color=#80FFD7FF>AoE Anemo DMG</color> before leaping into the air and entering the Windfavored state.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Windfavored</color>\nThe Wanderer cannot perform Plunging Attacks in this state. When he uses Normal and Charged Attacks, they will be converted into Kuugo: Fushoudan and Kuugo: Toufukai respectively; the DMG they deal and their AoE will be increased, and their DMG will be considered Normal and Charged Attack DMG respectively. Kuugo: Toufukai will not consume Stamina.\nThe Wanderer will hover persistently during this time. While this state is active, the Wanderer's movements gain the following properties:\n·Persistently consumes Kuugoryoku Points to maintain this hovering state.\n·When sprinting, additional Kuugoryoku Points will be consumed for the Wanderer to accelerate mid-air. Holding sprint will cause persistent Kuugoryoku Point consumption to maintain speed. This effect will replace his default sprint.\n·Jumping expends extra Kuugoryoku Points to increase hovering height. Holding jump will cause persistent Kuugoryoku Point consumption to keep increasing hovering height.\n\nRunning out of Kuugoryoku Points will end the Windfavored state.\nA second cast during the duration of Windfavored will also end it.\n\n<i>"The world dances in a weightless whirl, presenting a secret that can only be found in the flowers."</i> ｜ 凝聚大气的力量，借此摆脱大地的桎梏。对周围造成<color=#80FFD7FF>风元素伤害</color>并跃升至空中，进入「优风倾姿」状态。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>优风倾姿</color>\n流浪者在这种状态下，无法进行下落攻击，进行普通攻击与重击时，将转为进行空居·不生断与空居·刀风界，造成的伤害与影响范围提高，伤害分别视为普通攻击伤害与重击伤害。进行空居·刀风界将不消耗体力。\n流浪者在这种状态下将持续悬浮在空中。此时，流浪者的行动具有如下特性：\n·将持续消耗「空居力」，维持悬浮状态；\n·进行冲刺时，将额外消耗空居力在空中加速；长按冲刺时，将持续消耗空居力以维持快速移动。该效果将替代冲刺；\n·进行跳跃时，将额外消耗空居力抬升悬浮高度；长按跳跃时，将持续消耗空居力以持续抬升高度。\n\n空居力耗竭后将结束该状态。\n在优风倾姿持续期间再次施放将结束该状态。\n\n<i>「浮世倾舞，秘则为花。」</i>
- So you're... ｜ 那你这是在…
- Zandik's Note ｜ 赞迪克的笔记
- Show me. ｜ 给我看看。
- As you can see, I'm ambling the streets at my leisure, enjoying the sound of people chattering and birds chirping. ｜ 如你所见，闲游市井，听听街头巷尾的人声鸟鸣。
- Let me guess what you're thinking. ｜ 让我来猜猜你的想法吧。
- A flower that blooms even amidst ferocious thunder and lightning. To this day, it still grants courage to travelers in thunderstorms. ｜ 仅于雷霆之怒中傲然盛放的花朵，至今仍能赐予行走在雷雨中的游人勇气。
- Listen to me, Inayah. ｜ 听我说，阿娜耶。
- Crowd ｜ 众人

- Now, the Tonic will flow into everyone's cups without getting stuck, right? ｜ 嘿嘿，这样就能保证魔水顺利流到大家的酒杯里了吧？
- Wish ｜ 祈愿
- All party members will receive a buff when <color=#FFCC33>Elemental Bursts</color> are used, in accordance with their greatest wishes. Use Elemental Bursts as much as possible in this trial. ｜ 使用<color=#FFCC33>元素爆发</color>时，所有角色会因大愿的回应获得强化。尽可能多的使用元素爆发吧。
- Alright. Let's go and discuss the rest of the details with Matriarch Babel, then. ｜ 好啦，接下来我们去跟芭别尔主母细谈吧。
- Feiyun Commerce Guild only ever does legal business. ｜ 「飞云商会」只做合法生意。
- So, who's getting the credit? ｜ 关于功劳…
- Is that so? Haha! Well, don't let me slow you down, then! ｜ 这样呀，哈哈，那就别让我耽误你们的路程了！
- Yep, yep! I'm making the juice as we speak... Oh, right! The ice! ｜ 来了来了，稍等，正在准备果汁！哦对了，还有冰块！
- Crystallization Transmitter ｜ 结晶响振晶
- #Name: Fengyan. Occupation: Millelith Sergeant. {F#Ma'am}{M#Sir}. ｜ 逢岩，千岩军的一员，位居教头。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making "Prince's Weeping Fish."\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『小王子的大哭鱼』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Rules</color>\nThe vast majority of Domains serve, in essence, as the sites of trials, and all sorts of challenges can be found within.\nIf you complete these challenges, you may use Original Resin and Condensed Resin to revitalize the Petrified Tree at the end of the Domain and obtain its gifts.\nIt usually requires 20 Original Resin to activate Domains of Blessing that contain Artifacts, Domains of Forgery that contain Weapon Ascension Materials, and Domains of Mastery, which contain Talent Enhancement Material. Condensed Resin can also be used to obtain rewards equivalent to two normal challenges at once.\nDomains of Forgery and Mastery will produce different materials at different times of the week. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【规则】</color>\n大部分秘境的本质是试炼的场所，其中存在着各式各样的挑战。\n如果能完成这些挑战，就能利用「原粹树脂」、「浓缩树脂」激活终点的石化古树，获取馈赠。\n激活藏有圣遗物的「祝圣秘境」、武器突破材料的「炼武秘境」、天赋培养素材的「精通秘境」中的石化古树，通常需要20点原粹树脂，也可以通过使用「浓缩树脂」以便一次获得完成两次挑战的物资产出。\n炼武秘境与精通秘境在一周中不同的时间，会产生不同的物资。
- Ah, I'm looking forward to it already. ｜ 已经开始期待了。
- And even if it managed to figure out a way to take the books without leaving any record, it's possible that someone would come looking to borrow the books before the Seelie returned them. ｜ 其次，就算它掌握了某种办法可以把书带出去，也无法保证这段时间没有人想要借这两本书。
- You've finished making the dish already? You must be skilled indeed. ｜ 您做好了？真是厨艺不凡啊。
- Defeat all opponents ｜ 击败所有敌人
- Yasmin's here again! ｜ 雅丝敏姐姐又来了！

- *sigh* My father asked you to come, didn't he? ｜ 唉…一定是我父亲叫前辈过来的吧…
- Duration|{param4:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param4:F1}秒

- A furious Qucusaurus is confronting some merchants. Looks like things could kick off ay any moment... ｜ 一只愤怒的绒翼龙正在和商人们对峙，形势一触即发……
- No more than %2% character death(s) ｜ 角色倒下次数不多于%2%次
- (It's time for Natlan to enter a new era, and I know she wants to fulfill her duty as a "leader," but...) ｜ （纳塔确实应该走进新的时代，她想做出符合「领袖」身份的表率，但…）
- These lanterns can be found in Tenshukaku and at the Royal Hot Springs. The fabrics have not been dyed per se, but have been coated by soaking them in a solution created by dissolving trace amounts of Amethyst Lumps and Electro Crystals in water. They say that this coating is not only able to increase the brightness of such lanterns, but can also protect them from lightning. ｜ 可见于天守阁和御温泉的灯笼，布料未染底色，而是以少许紫晶块和电气水晶粉末配制的药剂浸泡，具备特殊的镀层，据说不仅能大幅增强灯笼的亮度，还能保护这种灯笼，防止它被雷击破坏。
- Madame President, it seems that we must finish up here as soon as is humanly possible, so that we may head back to the Club to check on things. ｜ 会长，看来咱们得尽快结束研究，回去俱乐部看看情况。
- (The enormous Iktomisaurus stands majestically, sometimes glancing over at the flickering flames.) ｜ （威严静立的巨大暝视龙，不时观察着跳动的火焰。）
- ...Again! ｜ …再来！
- If he hadn't found the blueprints to Ochkanatlan, we'd probably still be wandering lost through some sewer. ｜ 要不是他找到了那幅奥奇卡纳塔的工程设计图，我们说不定还在下水道里面兜圈子呢。
- You bring Orqo back up, and explain the situation... ｜ 带奥尔科一起回到了地面，并且说明了情况…
- Punched tape collected in accordance with Sevigne's request. The data recorded within can only be deciphered using specialized machinery. ｜ 应瑟维妮请求回收的打孔纸带，其中记录的数据似乎需要专门的仪器才能解读。
- Time Trekker (III) ｜ 旅时者·第三卷

- ...Oh... ｜ …啊…
- Kiminami Restaurant Advertisement ｜ 「木南料亭」广告
- In this world, there will always be information you cannot obtain from the Akasha, and things you can never accomplish. Knowing when to yield is a form of wisdom. ｜ 毕竟在这个世上，总有些知识是你从虚空申请不到的，也总有些事是你做不到的，放下也是一种智慧。
- Hmph, and now you pretend to be a good person... Wait, what do you mean, "pretending to know"? ｜ 哼，这时候你倒是充好人来了…不对，你说谁不懂装懂？！
- Defeat the suspicious person ｜ 击败可疑人士$UNRELEASED
- I'll be sure to let the Abyss Order know that their blatant disregard for Mondstadt... ｜ 我要让它们明白，不论深渊教团再怎么无法无天…
- Um... ｜ 呃…
- Hey! Not funny... ｜ 这…请你别开玩笑了。
- That's why I seek out all manner of texts — to uncover what help they may be to my study of alchemy. ｜ 所以我才会寻找各种资料，从中发掘能为炼金术提供帮助的知识，推进我的主要课题。
- Delicious Tuna Sushi ｜ 美味的金枪鱼寿司

- To instigate a revival, you need to inject some fresh blood, but it's hard to attract budding young talent to a dying art... And so it becomes a vicious cycle. ｜ 振兴山门要靠新鲜血液，但若是一直衰落下去，就永远吸引不来人才，这是个恶性循环。
- I'm sure Sister Barbara has her reasons... Will you be accompanying her? ｜ 不过，芭芭拉小姐应该有自己的考量吧…你是会和她同行吗？
- I've got other things to do right now... ｜ 暂时有别的事…
- Hmm, yes. This stone is good, but we must dress the shrine's surroundings up a bit, yes? ｜ 对了，可不能只是把那块石头敲好，还得再把神社周围打扮打扮才行呐。
- I've marked the locations out on your map. If you check those spots out, you're bound to reap quite the harvest! ｜ …我在你的地图上画出来了，你去这些地方找找看，保准有收获！
- But this only prolongs their suffering. Judging by their current appearance, they seem to have nothing left but the bitter memories they have to endure alone. ｜ 但这也不过是延长了她们的痛苦，看她们如今的样子，估计除了需要独自忍受的苦痛追忆外，早已什么都不剩了吧。
- Finally, people would be forced into relying on machines just to survive. And that's when the Fontaine Research Institute, who develops all kinds of meka, would swoop in to save the day and turn a huge profit in the process. ｜ 到了这一步，人们就不得不借助各种机关造物生活。由此，开发各种机关造物的枫丹科学院就可以大赚一笔了。
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:P}
- Perhaps she went to pick some flowers on the way home. You know how she loves flowers. ｜ 可能是绕路去采花了吧，母亲她喜欢花。
- From before? ｜ 之前？
- Failing the defense will cause the challenge to fail ｜ 守护失败将导致挑战失败
- Brr... If someone lives here, then why is it so chilly? ｜ 呜…怎么感觉凉飕飕的呀…真有人住在这里吗？
- I made him his favorite soup. It smelled so good that it made my mouth water, but he remained unconscious. ｜ 我给他做了他最喜欢喝的汤，味道香得我自己口水都要流出来了，可是他还是没醒。
- Give the rope to Allan ｜ 将绳索交给艾伦
- I know everyone on this island. I've never seen you before. So, you must have come here after my arrival. ｜ 这座岛上的每个人我都认识。我之前没见过你，你一定是在我后面来的。
- Meet Diluc at the Winery ｜ 去酒庄找迪卢克
- I'm doing fine. But I'd like to ask you for another favor. ｜ 我这边也还不错，不过还有件事想要拜托一下。
- Outstanding employees will be recommended by the official to receive further education at the Akademiya. ｜ 工作认真突出者还能由本官推荐获得进入教令院进修的资格。
- What are you planning? ｜ 你在谋划什么？
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- You know, just some dreams that I have for the future and things I'd like to accomplish one day. ｜ 哎呀，其实就是一些对于未来的期许，还有一些想要在未来完成的事情。
- What about our compensation? ｜ 我们的报酬呢？
- Everyone's letter was different, and yet all of them drew us to this archipelago. ｜ 每个人收到的来信内容都不同，但都能吸引人来到这片群岛。
- Not a drop of effort! ｜ 一点力气也没出呢！
- Ah... ｜ 咕…
- Welcome to Qingce Village, Traveler. You'll have to forgive us if it's not all too lively around there. ｜ 欢迎来到轻策庄，旅行者。这里可能有些死气沉沉的，真是不好意思。
- They're all in the Collector. ｜ 全在收集器里了。
- Huh? Me!? But I... I'm more of a commentator... I... ｜ 欸，我？！呃，那个，我其实只会点评…我…
- So I'm sure Mom's friend will be super happy if I show up to visit and bring a whole bunch of friends with me! ｜ 妈妈的朋友见到那么多哥哥姐姐和我一起去，一定会非常开心。
- If only you listened to me from the very beginning... ｜ 要是当时一开始能听我说话…
- Well then, Traveler, let's get this started! To the ship! ｜ 旅行者，我们赶紧开始吧，快快快！
- Sooner or later they'll grow old, and then it'll be too late... ｜ 等到它们都老了，肯定也就来不及了…
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 5 ｜ 好感等级达到5后开启
- Thundersoother's Plume ｜ 平雷之羽
- (Why is curry shrimp more popular than curry fish?) ｜ （为什么咖喱虾比咖喱鱼受欢迎呢？）
- There is much work for a gem artisan like myself that cannot start without source materials. ｜ 毕竟我是宝石工匠，有很多工作得有了素材和原料才能开始。
- This should do the trick, hold on a moment... ｜ 我这就给你治疗，请稍等一下…
- Cowell's Plan and the Situation Inside the Tunnel ｜ 考威尔的作案计划与地道内的状况
- Give the bait materials to Kayvan ｜ 将鱼饵的材料交给凯万
- Besides this space, which our members use to rest and relax, we also have an entertainment room, a fitness room, and a self-study room. ｜ 除了各位所在的休息处，我们还设置了娱乐室，保健室，自习处等多个房间。

- Back when I was a kid, no hilichurl would ever dare come near any settlement. But things have changed these days. Why, just yesterday while I was out for my walk, I overheard some young fella say, "Yesterday, while I was {0}, I ran into a mitachurl with a big stone shield. I was scared stiff!" To think that young people these days would be afraid of hilichurls... Things sure ain't the same as they used to be. ｜ 哼，我年轻的时候，根本没有任何丘丘人敢靠近有人的地方。但这时代，已经不一样啦。昨天散步的时候，居然听边上的小伙子说：「昨天，我{0}的时候，突然看到一个拿着石头大盾的丘丘暴徒，太可怕了。」现在的年轻人居然会为丘丘人感到害怕，这真是一代不如一代！

However, snowmen with such eyes are always the last ones standing. - Prince's Country ｜ 王子的国度
- Are you here to explore the Snowy Mountain too? ｜ 你也来雪山探险吗？
- Once I meet that successor and have a chance to exchange knowledge with them, I should be able to read your fate more accurately. ｜ 等我见到那个继承者，就有机会与她互相交流知识，你的命运我就能看得更清楚了。
- Listen to the voice coming from the confinement room. ｜ 倾听禁闭室里传来的言语声。
- I once saw one of our prop people make something similar. It looked really cool, so I took some time during my break to learn the basics. It's not a bad way to stave off sleepiness, either! ｜ 以前看到负责舞台道具的伙伴折过类似的东西，我觉得很有趣，就借休息时间学了学。这也是我平时驱散困意的好方法哦！
- Duration|{param4:F1}s/{param5:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param4:F1}秒/{param5:F1}秒
- Oh, Paimon sees... Then, is it only the two of us...? ｜ 这样吗…难道只有我和旅行者才有…
- The awakening is coming... ｜ 待苏醒之时…
- That explains a lot... ｜ 所以愤怒的原因还有…
- Energy Cost|{param20:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param20:I}
- Nameless Tablet (III) ｜ 无名的石碑·其三
- But no matter! Allow me to introduce myself — Heinry, a member of the Fonta development team, at your service. ｜ 无论如何！向您自我介绍，我叫安里，是枫达开发组的一员。
- I've never felt like I truly deserve to be at the Institute. And that feeling is getting stronger. ｜ 我之前就觉得自己，不太配在院里工作，现在这种感觉更强烈了。
- Not to mention how he gets far too excited each time he talks to me... Meow, meow... ｜ 而且奴家每次和他说话的时候，他都很激动…喵喵…
- There was once, when I simply left my crowbar at my side for a moment, and some passer-by just... took it! ｜ 有次我就把撬棍放在身后一小会儿，就被路过的人顺走了！
- Just accept that you're not getting out of this. ｜ 你就认命吧。
- Look for Chilled Meat ｜ 寻找「冷鲜肉」
- Oh, Paimon gets it now! But according to Arama, the problems we solved were outside the dream. Was that even helpful? Helpful to Ma... Mahavana... ｜ 原来如此原来如此。不过，依照兰罗摩的说法，我们解决的是梦境之外的问题，有帮助吗？对于玛…玛哈桓那…
- I remember her; she's a courteous girl. I've only been to the Grand Bazaar a few times, but she's already remembered my name and face, and she's even tried to get the others to stop arguing with me. She really gets it! All youngsters should be more like her. ｜ 有印象，是个有礼貌的姑娘。去了大巴扎几次就把我记住了，还劝别人不要和我吵架。说的很对嘛，现在的年轻人啊，就该多向妮露学习。
- Wangshu Inn's chef, Yanxiao, is in need of several ingredients for his dish, and he's looking for someone to help him... ｜ 望舒客栈的厨师言笑做菜缺了几种食材，正在为此犯愁…
- Anyway, now's not the time for that! Nahida, this doesn't seem to add up with what we were expecting. ｜ 不对，不是说这些的时候了。纳西妲，和我们的推断有点对不上吧。
- Food ｜ 食物
- With all of that said, I realize the name of the young lady from the funeral parlor is still unknown to me. ｜ 话说回来，那往生堂小女，姓甚名谁，我倒还不知。
- About the Vision ｜ 关于「神之眼」…
- Not that I hope to make too much Mora this way, but I do hope to make others' lives better. ｜ 也不指望靠这个赚多少钱啦，只为给邻里乡亲提供些生活便利。
- A group of Eremites is skulking out in the wilds, and they're up to no good. Defeat this threat to ensure the safety of the surrounding areas. ｜ 一群不怀好意的镀金旅团出现在野外，威胁着周边区域的安全，前往将其消灭。
- The monsters inside are all targets created using adeptal energy, and will act in set ways similar to those of the creatures they're based on. Their combat abilities aren't anywhere close to the originals, though... ｜ 里边的魔物都是洞天仙力拟造出来的标靶，会根据现实的原型采取一定的行动，不过战斗力肯定不能相提并论…
- Bountiful Year ｜ 丰年有余
- I... had dreams too, once... ｜ 我…其实…也梦想过…
- Reach a score of {param0} to obtain the namecard ｜ 积分达到{param0}以领取名片纹饰
- If I see something <color=#00E1FFFF>black</color>, I will be able to mix a color as radiant as the sun... ｜ 有了「<color=#00E1FFFF>黑色的</color>东西」，就可以调配出「像太阳一样璀璨的色彩」了…
- A few days ago, we received a letter from the representative of the wine merchants' association in Sumeru. It was thanks to your on-the-spot decisions that further losses due to continued delays were avoided. ｜ 驻须弥的酒业商会代表前几天来信了，多亏有你现场决断，再拖下去损失只会越来越大。
- Particles Collected: #2#/%2% ｜ 收集数量：#2#/%2%
- There is nothing else left of those hilichurls. Nothing besides the curse itself. ｜ 那些丘丘人身上，除了诅咒，本就已经什么都没有留下了。
- Let's go have a look, then... ｜ 那就去看看…
- Will of the Rock ｜ 八方之岩
- Never mind that. Where did you find this ring? ｜ 算了，你是从哪里拿到这枚戒指的？
- Proceed unto the Chamber of Deliberation to submit an application, and then wait for the permit to be issued. ｜ 请前往「审议之庭」进行申请，并等待许可的下达。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Rejoice! For to join the Prinzessin der Verurteilung on her majestic mission for but a fleeting moment is surely cause for an eternity of elation! ｜ 雀跃吧！能与断罪的皇女菲谢尔一同踏上征途，你之余生都应为此感到骄傲！
- Nahida ｜ 纳西妲
- They ruined the Fontaine Research Institute's reputation, little by little. ｜ 枫丹科学院的名声，就这样被他们一步步糟蹋了下去。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Originally designed to hold drinking water, this cup was stained black after a scholar used it to wash their paint brushes. ｜ 原本是饮水用的容器，因为常用来洗笔而被染黑。
- Time Remaining: #1#s ｜ 剩余时间：#1#秒
- Each time you start this game mode, each stage will feature different <color=#FFE14BFF>Regimens</color> that represent different challenges. Before you enter each stage, you can pick a Reminiscence Buff from a list of them that will provide buffs for the <color=#FFE14BFF>current stage</color>. ｜ 每次开启玩法时，各个关卡都将随机决出不同的<color=#FFE14BFF>练行项目</color>，带来不同的挑战。而在进入每个关卡前，玩家可以从各自的待选列表中选择一条追想助益，为<color=#FFE14BFF>当前关卡</color>提供辅助效果。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙

- You were getting so worried about the situation with The Balladeer... ｜ 你因为担心散兵的事…

- Look at her walk down the street. She seems so confident, but everyone around her is looking at her all funny. Paimon wonders... Eh, never mind. ｜ 她走路的样子倒是很潇洒啦，但周围的人都在用奇怪的眼神看她。唉，不管了…
- Angry Tribal Warrior ｜ 暴躁的部族战士
- I wish you well on your travels! Liyue always welcomes you! ｜ 不过，希望你们的行程愉快！璃月欢迎你们！
- As such, please take them with you. ｜ 劳烦汝将之取走。
- We'll charge right through this puny whirlpool! ｜ 区区漩涡，直接冲出去就好了！

- So that was a Tepetlisaurus egg... ｜ 没想到蛋里的也是一只嵴锋龙呢…
- For 12s after using <color=#FFD780FF>Inuzaka All-Round Defense</color> or <color=#FFD780FF>Juuga: Forward Unto Victory</color>, increases the CRIT DMG of all nearby party members' <color=#FFE699FF>Geo DMG</color> based on the buff level of the skill's field at the time of use:\n· "Standing Firm": +10%\n· "Impregnable": +20%\n· "Crunch": +40%\n\nThis effect cannot stack and will take reference from the last instance of the effect that is triggered. ｜ 施放<color=#FFD780FF>犬坂吠吠方圆阵</color>或<color=#FFD780FF>兽牙逐突形胜战法</color>后的12秒内，依据施放时的领域等级，提高附近的队伍中所有角色<color=#FFE699FF>岩元素伤害</color>的暴击伤害：\n·「坚牢」：提高10%；\n·「难破」：提高20%；\n·「摧碎」：提高40%。\n\n该效果无法叠加，以后生效的为准。
- Liyue Ministry of Civil Affairs Announcement ｜ 璃月总务司公告
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Mondstadt House With Overhanging Attic.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「悬挑阁楼的蒙德民居」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Let's hope it didn't spew out anything too weird this time... ｜ 现在应该不会有奇怪的东西掉下来了吧…
- Two Fingers Recommended ｜ 推荐双指
- Alright, got it... ｜ 嗯，我知道了…
- Once we got here we decided to split up. I was searching this area. ｜ 到这里的时候，我们决定分头搜索，我就来这边搜索了。
- And you are... ｜ 你是…
- Namecard style.\nAs long as you believe in the path you are walking, then everything you encounter on your journey will be a source of happiness. ｜ 名片纹饰。\n只要相信自己行走的道路，那么这漫长旅途中遇到的一切都将是令人愉快的。
- New Available Items at Card Shop ｜ 卡牌商店已新增商品
- What are you talking about? I'm not even close to losing! ｜ 这才哪到哪啊，离输还远着呢…
- My apologies, Miss. I prioritized the search for the stone tablet. Allow me to conduct a scan now... ｜ 抱歉小姐，刚才把寻找石碑的优先级提到最高了。现在请让我来进行扫描…
- Mona's actually super rich — it's just that astrology research is really expensive. ｜ 莫娜她其实很有钱的啦，只是平时研究占星术的开销比较大而已。
- Ah, I'm sorry. I'm an artisan — whenever I see ornaments and such that I've never seen before, my mind jumps right to "How do I make that"? ｜ 啊，抱歉，毕竟我也是一名工匠，看到从前没见过的饰品，就会忍不住在心里揣摩打造的方法。
- You may be talented, but you lack practical battle experience. With all the elite beetle battlers here, I'm afraid to say you're a small fry. ｜ 虽然你的确很有天分，但没多少实战的经验，在我们这一群斗虫强者中间，只能算是呆瓜。
- An Adventure With the Oceanid Ann ｜ 与纯水精灵安的冒险
- A new life form that arose from the dispersed Tainted Hydro Phantasm. It is trapped inside a bottle.\nThe life contained within the waters is formless, and formless life is born of water and gains water's shape. ｜ 击散浊水幻灵后，即将再度升起的新生命体，被装在了禁锢的瓶中。\n水中所蕴含着的生命是无形的，而无形的生命也寄于水中，借由水之形诞生。
- (But there's nothing here on Vacher's true identity...) ｜ （但这里没有和瓦谢身份相关的线索…）
- Hello, have you come to see these children too? ｜ 你好，你也是来看这些孩子们的吗？
- Seriously? You want Jean... to help you look for your cat? ｜ 什么？！找猫这样的小事都要拜托她吗？！
- Hiiragi Chisato ｜ 柊千里
- Ahem. So, you're the only ones that showed up today, huh? ｜ 咳咳，今天只来了你们几个？
- Hah. It's my shrine. If I say you're qualified, then you're qualified. ｜ 呵，在我的神社里，当然是我说了算啊。
- Veronique ｜ 薇若妮卡
- But the people upstairs weren't going to believe that, and so according to regulations, someone must reproduce the experiment to verify the data he obtained... ｜ 不过上面的人可不会相信这些说辞，所以按照流程，就得有人再次进行重复实验，以验证他求得的数据…
- In the letter, the ordinary man named Wang Ping'an repents sincerely. He is determined to fulfill his oath through self-improvement, and by forsaking evil and doing good, such that he may become a true adherent of the adepti.\nHe has returned the money he gained dishonestly while pretending to be an adeptus, and has returned the Sigil of Permission that his grandfather left behind to you. He has even left you what possessions he has on his person that he deems useless to his penance... ｜ 信中，名为王平安的普通人向你们真诚悔过。他决心通过修行践行自己立下的誓言，弃恶扬善，成为真正合格的仙人「信众」。\n他假冒仙人骗取的钱财已经归还，而那张爷爷留下的「百无禁忌箓」则随信赠与了你们。他甚至还舍弃了于修行无益的个人财物，全部送给了你们…
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- Jack, I'm telling you, adventuring is something you need to go out and do for yourself... ｜ 杰克，冒险呢，是要亲身去进行的…
- Prince ｜ 小王子
- Hmm, your presence... I'm sure of it. You're a big boss here on business, aren't you? ｜ 这个气势…您八成也是来这边做生意的大老板吧！
- Well, let's get back on track. Come see me if you need any help from us. ｜ 那么，言归正传。如果有什么需要烟谜主帮忙的地方，可以来找我。
- When it gets hot, we'll go to the Snezhnaya that Alphonso talked about, where it snows! When it's rainy season, we'll go to Valuka, where Granny Jehiet is from! ｜ 天气热的时候，就去艾方索哥哥说的，有好多雪的「至冬国」！老是下雨的时候，就去婕叶奶奶来的地方，到「巴螺迦」去！
- Yes, best of luck! If you run into any difficulties, come and find us. We'll be only too glad to help! ｜ 加油啊！要是遇到麻烦，可以回来找我们帮忙！
- Jean: Serious ｜ 琴·认真
- Could you demonstrate your manner of fighting to me? Perhaps I might discern something that can be used to refine my thesis... ｜ 你可以再向我展示一下你的战斗方式吗？说不定，我能找到一些有用的细节，完善我的那篇论文…
- Great! The more the merrier! ｜ 好，那就一起走吧，人多也热闹。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 2 ｜ 好感等级达到2级后解锁
- No... ｜ 你…

- Just now, someone from the Tenryou Commission came to post a notice on the bulletin board saying our festival has to be suspended. ｜ 就在刚才，天领奉行派人过来，在留言板上贴了一张告示，说是要暂停我们的祭典。
- Spell of Unity ｜ 团结的魔法
- Ms. Lyudochka, we're back! We've done it! You're safe now! ｜ 柳达希卡小姐，我们回来啦！事情全摆平啦，你现在已经安全了！
- Time to clean up... ｜ 该打扫了…
- Lyney seems to be thinking pretty hard about something... ｜ 林尼好像在认真地思考什么问题呢…
- With no one around, one's heart will naturally calm. ｜ 四下无人，内心也会自然而然地平静下来。
- "What on earth happened that Acting Grand Master Jean is going to the tavern?" "Calm down, it's the Acting Grand Master we're talking about. Besides, she wouldn't be there if something bad were really going on." ｜ 「就连那位琴团长都去酒馆了？到底发生了什么事？」 「慌什么，那可是琴团长。再说，真要有大事就不会去酒馆了。」
- Kimono patterns? Haha, I'm not exactly an expert on that. ｜ 着物上的纹样？哈哈，我可不太了解这方面的事。
- 简体中文 ｜ 简体中文
- 2 × 2 × 2 ｜ 2·2·2
- Deplete as many boss HP bars as possible within the time limit. ｜ 限定时间内尽可能多地击穿强敌生命值
- "Hmm? Someone's here to rescue me...? Oh my... Thank you, you kind soul! Thank you, thank you!" ｜ 「嗯？好像有人来救我了…？啊啊，谢谢恩人，谢谢你！」
- Are you here for the opera? I'm sorry, but my throat's not feeling so swell... ｜ 您是来听戏的吗？不好意思，我的喉咙不太舒服…
- Perfect Finale ｜ 「完美终章」
- Cyno: Serious ｜ 赛诺·认真
- Fun and food in one place! ｜ 好吃的和好玩的！
- Don't say that! You're not a monster, you're my friend. ｜ 不是这样的！你是我的朋友，不是怪物。
- CD|{param7:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param7:F1}秒
- ...Maybe it's because I've been around cats for so long, but I've also stopped liking milk myself. Here, you take them...ACHOO! ｜ …可能是跟猫待久了，我也变得不爱喝牛奶了，这些牛奶就送给你好…阿嚏！
- Ooshima ｜ 大岛
- Have a safe trip! ｜ 一路顺风！
- A box with some leaves inside. Something feels unusual about it when you hold it in your hand, and you can't help but feel a little uneasy... can this box really contain these leaves? ｜ 装有树叶的盒子。捧在手里的时候有一股不同寻常的感觉，让人不由得担心，这些树叶真的能装在这盒子里吗？
- "Madam Kujou Sara is also a good commander... although she is famously strict with her soldiers, at least she is fair and no selfish motives." ｜ 「裟罗大人也好…虽然她治军严苛得出名，但绝对能做到赏罚公正，没有私心。」
- When it comes to other people's affairs, don't insist on meddling until after you've got the full picture. ｜ 别人家的事情，你还没弄明白之前不要总想着乱掺和。
- Thanks. ｜ 多谢。
- I brought you here because... because I genuinely wanted to spend time with you. ｜ 我…嗯…我…是真心要和你一起来的。
- Scholar's Bookmark ｜ 学士的书签
- A feather-shaped brooch that symbolizes someone's yearning to defend others like a shield. ｜ 象征着某人「渴望成为坚盾」的羽形别针。
- Strongest Single Strike ｜ 最强一击
- Kamisato Ayaka - for CB1 ｜ (test)神里绫华-cb1用
- Yes, of course my lady. I—It's just that... Well, we don't know who this— ｜ 小姐，您的意思我们明白，可唯独这位…
- Book Checkout Logs ｜ 书籍的借阅情况
- I know, that's why it's a garnish — I would never marinate the meat in it! ｜ 我知道的哦，但这清心花不是肉排的香料，而是配菜。
- "Borderland"? ｜ 边域？
- Report back to Augustus ｜ 向奥古斯都回报
- Talk to Ella Musk ｜ 与艾拉·马斯克对话
- Hmm... Now who does that remind me of... ｜ 嗯…总感觉是某人经常做的事情呢。
- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "Echoes of Solitude." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含的旋律为「孤独的回响」。
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- Kujou Masahito ｜ 九条政仁
- In terms of practical applications, this Numbering Machine still has many great things to accomplish! ｜ 但在应用领域，这台「推数机」可是大有可为。
- Let me think again... ｜ 我再想想…
- That's the silver lining. Were we in Fontaine, it could take a month for a sum this size to find its way to your pocket. ｜ 这是唯一一件我庆幸的事。如果在枫丹，这笔钱至少得走一个月，才能到您的手里。
- Regenerates <color=#3399CCFF>450–790</color> HP every 5s for the next 30s. ｜ 并在之后的30秒内，每5秒恢复<color=#3399CCFF>450-790</color>点生命值。

- ...Miss Yingzhu, I regret to inform you that I shall be canceling my commission with the Adventurers' Guild with immediate effect. ｜ 盈珠小姐，抱歉，拜托你们搜索碎片的委托我希望取消。

- *sigh* To tell you the truth, a miner from our camp went missing. ｜ 唉，实不相瞒，营地里有个矿工失踪了。
- Oh, y'all are back. ｜ 啊，你们回来了。
- Hehe, maybe I should say instead that you've come at just the right time. ｜ 不过，哼哼，应该说你来得正好…
- Right, that's it! It's about focusing on what's important and necessary! ｜ 对对对，总之就是抓重点的必要性！
- You attacked the Pyro Archon in broad daylight, and I used my spell to save you. A single glance was likely all it took for her to recognize my tribe. ｜ 你公然在竞技场袭击火神，我出手相助，用了我拿手的法术，她一眼就能认出来这种法术来自烟谜主。
- Let me adjust my deck first... ｜ 先调整一下卡组…
- I have another idea, Sayu. ｜ 我还有一个好办法哦，早柚。
- On my side, we wish to model the might of a Champion Duelist, and so we will need you to complete some feats of combat prowess. ｜ 我这部分的数据收集，是为了模拟决斗代理人的战斗力，所以需要老爷完成一些战斗的项目。

- That simply won't do — especially since, I imagine, you still have a very long journey ahead of you. ｜ 之后你们肯定还要旅行很长时间，老是这样也不行。
- After some time, the Charcoal-Baked Ajilenakh Cake is served... ｜ 等了一段时间后，「椰炭饼」被端了上来…

- Hahah! I'll have a medium Birch Sap. ｜ 哈哈，来一杯中杯的桦树吧。
- There you go! The next two portraits should be ready in no time! ｜ 太好啦，这样就能一下子完成两幅画了！
- Maybe we can help you. ｜ 说不定我们能够帮你。
- "We often hear dull thudding, and the ground will tremble slightly from time to time... Is it some sort of earthquake? Or is the building going to collapse?" ｜ 「我们总是能隐约听见闷响，地面也有微微的震感…不会是要地震，或者是楼要塌了吧？」
- Ugh, I'm sorry. You should be celebrating your victory, not listening to all this somber talk! ｜ 啊，真是不好意思。明明你们才刚经历大战归来，我就又说起这些严肃的话题。
- Given the current circumstances, we are probably in for some long-term cooperation. ｜ 就现在的情况来看，咱们估计真的要长期合作了。

- My new life here is not easy, but thanks be to the Dendro Archon — I'm still filled with hope. ｜ 新的生活虽然也不容易，但草神大人保佑，一切都充满希望。

- Y'know, you've got a point. Maybe the wish of those who buried the treasure, that someone should find it someday, was affected by the machine... ｜ 嗯，也可能是藏下秘宝的人，希望秘宝被找到的想法，被机器影响了呢……

- Well, friends, I would say we've earned ourselves a nice meal for our efforts! Let's go! Spina's treat! ｜ 什么嘛，既然在这里的大家都是朋友，不如就待会儿一起去吃一顿吧！记在「刺玫会」的账上！

- The trespassers seem to have unique habits — they patrol around large quantities of supplies and often engage in activities surrounding specific objects such as cooking pans and bonfires. This is an opportunity to observe their behavioral patterns. - It would be unfair to other people if you got everything you wanted for no reason. ｜ 平白无故得到一切的话，对其他普通人是不公平的。

- In cat language, you should call for it like this... "Meow, meow meow meow, meeeeow!" ｜ 用「猫语」呼唤它的话，应该是…喵，喵喵喵，喵——

- Even if he knew the truth, he'd still find someone to blame. He might think Yelena was forced into using a Delusion to cultivate Auguste... or something like that. ｜ 就算知道了这些，他也会把姐姐使用邪眼的事归咎给别人吧。认为是别人逼迫姐姐培育了奥古斯都花…之类的。

- What for? Surely you don't think my old friend might still be alive... ｜ 你保管来做什么？你不会是想，也许我的那位老朋友没死…
- I made a few new test dishes and I was hoping everyone could try them and give some feedback. Traveler, you wanna be the first? ｜ 我试着做了一些菜品，想请大家试一试，给些意见。旅行者，你要先来一口吗？

- Quickly, let's get you out of the wind! I'll make some sweet tea for you... ｜ 师兄，我们快点去那边避避风，我煮点热糖水给你喝…
- Mona buys some supplies, thanks you profusely, and leaves with Fischl and Oz, feeling very satisfied... ｜ 莫娜买到了理想的物资，郑重道谢后，与菲谢尔和奥兹心满意足地离去了…
- Chuychu hoped I'd become a hero. So... I can't give up. I have to stay strong, for her sake...\nBut when the relic exploded, and Coya dove in front of me, I... the same fear of losing my sister came flooding back again...\nSorry, I just don't really know who I can talk to about this kind of stuff. I usually push it to the back of my mind... But I feel much better now.\nSince I can't forget that fear, I guess I'll try the opposite: remember it, own it. And eventually... transcend it. ｜ 葵可她…希望我成为「英雄」，所以我不能为她停下脚步，不能让自己变得软弱…\n可在「遗物」爆炸，姐姐冲到我面前的时候，我…我还是忍不住会想起，失去家人的恐惧…\n…抱歉，这些话我不知道能说给谁听，一直试图留在脑后…不过现在我感觉好多了。\n既然忘不掉这份恐惧…那就试着记住它，然后…「超越」它吧。

- Hey—! ｜ 喂——！

Max 3 stacks. Each stack's duration is counted independently. This effect will be cleared if the character leaves the field. ｜ 当前场上角色的下落攻击命中敌人后，该角色的<color=#F39000FF>下落攻击伤害提升20%</color>，持续8秒，该效果每0.1秒至多触发一次，至多叠加3层，每层独立计时。角色退场时，该效果将被移除。

- "The Seneschal called upon all his oratory powers in his appeal to the people to repair the holy sanctuary.\nHe would speak differently to different congregations.\nTo the old, he spoke of the divine might and saving grace. To the young, he painted a picture of prospective prosperity that would be purchased by the planned procurement of the property.\nTill at last, the repairs were agreed upon by all."\n— Tales of the Holy Place\n\nThe road ahead is a tangle of unexpected circumstances.\nSticking to dusty old strictures will only lead to further difficulties.\nAs such, be adaptable — use different strategies tailored to your situation to achieve victory. ｜ 「为了号召人们修建这座圣堂，主教充分发挥了他演说的天赋。\n面对不同的信众，他总会采用不同的说辞。\n对于老人，他会宣讲神迹的伟大与救恩，而对于青年人，他则着力描绘圣堂建成后将会带来的繁荣与前景。\n终于，建造圣堂的计划获得了信众们的一致同意。」\n——圣堂春秋\n\n在前进的道路上，总会遇到种种难以预料的情况。\n倘若拘泥于旧日的陈规，往往就要陷入困境之中。\n针对不同的情况，活用不同的对策才是取胜之道。

- Aha! I have it. I know what we can do to keep Cyrus safe and make a living at the same time! ｜ 太好了！我想到了，我想到了一个既能保证塞琉斯的安全，又能挣到钱的谋生途径了！

- Talk to Yves ｜ 与伊维斯对话
- No problem! I hope the Shadow Lantern shows you something truly spectacular. ｜ 没问题！希望「藏影灯」也能让你看到奇妙的影像。
- A signboard made of sturdy Linden Wood that is a common sight in the Court of Fontaine. They say that this sort of wooden board originates from the discussion boards that opera enthusiasts would put up before the doors of the Opera Epiclese to use as discussion boards. But so impassioned was the discourse, and so many were the participants, that the Maison Gardiennage was forced to spend several months dismantling them all to keep public order.\nHowever, despite the removal of a vast majority of the boards, this method of communicating through announcement boards continues to persist in the Court of Fontaine. Following the principle of "establishing a semblance of order no matter what," the Palais Mermonia made revisions to city ordinances, regulating the locations and manner in which such boards could appear.\n...But when they were done, and announced the measures to the public, they found that the phenomenon then significantly decreased throughout the Court. How very strange indeed. ｜ 在枫丹廷内寻常可见的告示牌，由耐用的「椴木」板材制作而成。据说，这种木牌最早可追溯至小部分戏剧狂热爱好者设立在欧庇克莱歌剧院门前，用来彼此交流的讨论板。因为讨论太热烈，参与人数太多，讨论板很快在花坛旁插的遍地都是，为了保持市容秩序，执律庭接连不断地工作了数月，将讨论板全都拆除了。\n不过，即使告示牌被拆除了很大一部分，这种依靠着告示牌彼此交流的方法依然在枫丹廷存在着。秉承着「无论如何也要有秩序对其进行管理」的原则，沫芒宫迅速对市容管理条例进行了修订，规定了此类告示牌可以出现的地点和方式。\n…但是，当沫芒宫将条例修订完毕，并就此事对外宣布后，枫丹廷内用告示牌进行大量交流的情况却明显减少了。真是一件奇妙的事。
- Adventure Item ｜ 冒险道具
- A band of rogues has appeared out in the wild, threatening the safety of the surrounding area. Head over there and take them out. Who knows — you might make wondrous use out of the nearby Thunder Sakura Boughs and Thunder Dwellings. ｜ 一群不怀好意的家伙出现在野外，威胁着周边区域的安全。前去打倒他们，充分利用四周的雷樱枝条和雷灾磐座或许有奇效。
- For {param1}s after using, the Elemental Burst DMG of all characters in the party is increased by {param2}%. When characters have less than {param3}% Elemental Energy, their Energy Recharge is increased by {param4}%. ｜ 施放后的{param1}秒内，队伍中所有角色的元素爆发造成的伤害提升{param2}%；角色的元素能量低于{param3}%时，元素充能效率提升{param4}%。
- Complete "The Vengeful Wood" without having more than 3 Elemental Types in the party. ｜ 通过「仇忌森动之寮」，且队伍中角色的元素类型不超过3种
- Taste Tester Royce ｜ 试菜员罗伊斯
- Pyro ｜ 火
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making Jubilant Posture.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『放欢的形姿』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- That's an awesome name. ｜ 这名字太酷了。
- I'm feeling refreshed! ｜ 疲劳感已经消失了！
- Oh, so that's what this is all about... ｜ 原来问这些的目的…
- You rummage through the box and find yourself a bundle of Embercore Stems... ｜ 在箱子里翻找了一通，顺利地找到了一捆烬芯花茎…
- "...and cultivated by time"! ｜ …「时间使之发芽」！
- Light and fluffy milk foam is slowly injected atop milk tea, as if giving it a lovely and pure white ceremonial hat. ｜ 在奶茶顶端，缓缓注入轻盈蓬松的奶泡。如同为饮品盖上一顶洁白纯净的礼帽。
- Th—Thank you so much! ｜ 谢谢、谢谢你们！
- Based on our current financial position, we can rule that out. ｜ 以我们现在的经济水平，还是不要考虑了吧。
- *sigh*... There's always next time... ｜ 唉，看来只能下次再来了…
- Cabin is a fair and kind person with a good temper. Be it man, woman, or anyone else, Cabin would never allow anyone to offer a tribute to it. ｜ 小屋大人脾气好，为人公正又厚道，无论好汉还是妇女，无论是谁要跟它奉献，它准不允许。
- What a shame, I can't use this material either... ｜ …这个也不能作为写作素材，可惜了。
- Go to the ruins of the Fontaine Research Institute ｜ 前往枫丹科学院废墟
- But let's get back to business. Because my... work schedule for inspecting the quality of spices has been too tight, the spices are consumed rapidly. ｜ 我们说正事，因为我…调查香料的工作排期安排得太紧，所以材料的消耗量也很大。
- Oh, right... If it took an entire day to reach the docks, then it would have been pouring rain at the time they saw the top of the mountain! ｜ 啊…对哦，如果靠岸花了一整天的话，大家看到山顶那时候，海上应该还正在下着大雨才对！
- Caterpillar ｜ 卡特皮拉
- No treasure areas nearby ｜ 附近没有藏宝区域
- I did come across some of the Flower-Feather Clan's warriors on the battlefield, but that was hardly the time for a chit-chat. ｜ 之前在战场上倒是见过花羽会的战士们，但那时哪里顾得上闲聊。
- Connoisseur Catalog ｜ 珠钿舫鉴珍录
- What are we going to do? If we don't have the test data, I can't report back to the Institute... ｜ 这可怎么办，要是没测试数据，我可怎么回院里做报告…
- About Skirk ｜ 关于丝柯克…
- Don't go too far, Blanche! Don't leave our sight! ｜ 布兰奇，别跑远了啊！不要离开我们的视线！
- Well, you could certainly do it, given your strength. ｜ 你的力气的确很大，这一点我对你有信心。
- As you grip your weapons, you can almost feel the will of past Hunters coursing through your being. It's a feeling of courage, determination... a silent vow passed down from generation to generation that says, eradicate the monsters no matter the cost. ｜ 猎人们握紧手中的武器，感受着它们传来的意志…那代代相传的，誓死要将魔物斩除的意志。
- The gods of this world have never stood with humanity... Not even for a moment! ｜ 这世上的神明，从没有一瞬间站在过人类这边…
- You are currently in {0} and your trial progress is {1}.\nRestarting will clear your current progress and award you the following: ｜ 当前位于{0}，试炼进度为{1}。\n重新试炼将清除进度，并获得以下奖励：
- The Brown Deer is a creature with a reddish-brown body, but its fiery passion is only shown when wrestling with its own kind. Under most circumstances, this animal is peaceful and will not attack other creatures without good reason.\nUpon entering The Realm Within, the Brown Deer's distinctive antlers, resembling tree branches, became an ideal perch for various birds. In this peaceful setting, the competition among Brown Deer shifted from the splendor of their antlers to the number of birds that perched upon them, for in the tranquil Realm Within, popularity equates to strength... ｜ 通体棕红如火的兽类，但其如火的热情仅在与同类角力时才会展现一二，大多情况下，这种兽类性情平和，不会轻易攻击其他生物。\n当它们来到壶中洞天后，棕鹿那标志性的鹿角因形似树杈，而成为了各类禽鸟理想的歇脚之所。在这样的环境下，棕鹿内部的竞争也从鹿角的华丽转变为角上歇脚禽鸟数量的多寡，毕竟在和平的壶中洞天中，越受欢迎，才越有力量…
- Charged Attack DMG|{param7:F1P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param7:F1P}
- How can I help you? ｜ 有需要效劳的吗？
- I... I failed that mock exam. ｜ 结果…结果考下来，我不及格…
- Bye. Mind your step in the dark. ｜ 嗯，走夜路要小心。
- Awaken the Residual Pari in the Fravashi Trees ｜ 唤醒「灵谷木」中的残灵
- There's a famous saying: "If one pack of charge won't do, try two." Have you heard of it? ｜ 「一份装药搞不定的问题，就用两份装药」——这句名言，不知道您有没有听说过呢？
- Do those two things have anything in common? ｜ 陆鳗鳗养殖和射箭有什么关系吗？
- Make a Satisfying Salad and give it to Sara ｜ 制作「满足沙拉」交给莎拉
- What a pain! We've come all this way, and now we need to start solving riddles. ｜ 讨厌死啦！都走到这里了，怎么突然要开始解谜了呀！
- Eremite Scorching Loremaster ｜ 镀金旅团·炽沙叙事人
- ...Hold on, I need a moment. I'll be right back... ｜ 稍等，我先准备一下…
- Sacrificial Fragments ｜ 祭礼残章
- A pile of clothing was found at the scene. The Gardes once believed they were used by Jacques as a costume to disguise himself... ｜ 案发现场留有一堆衣物，警备队员曾认为那是雅克用于隐藏身份的道具…
- Yes, it's a deal. Thank you, Alkami. ｜ 好的，多谢学长。
- Tsk, name your price. ｜ 啧…开价。
- I am by no means certain. And I didn't have any other clues except for this one. ｜ 并非断定，而是除此以外，我没有任何线索。
- Cassandra Lee Morris ｜ 卡桑德拉·李·莫里斯
- Duration|{param2:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param2:F1}秒
- Wow, so many people have shown up to welcome the Anemo Archon. ...Huh? Why is everyone crowded around the Angel's Share stand? ｜ 好多人啊，大家都来迎接风神了呢。咦，怎么都围在「天使的馈赠」摊位前？
- Let's join this tradition. We can bury a story here that belongs only to us, then we can think about what Memento and cipher to leave while we search! ｜ 也来延续这种习俗吧，在这里埋下只属于我们的故事。我们就一边寻找宝藏，一边想想要留下什么「见证物」和暗语好了。
- But Wushou dancing, on the other hand... I can happily practice away all night long, and still be bouncing off the walls in the morning as I get ready to head out for dim sum... ｜ 相反，舞兽的话，练通宵都不觉得困，第二天还能龙精虎猛地去喝早茶…
- <color=#FF5E41FF>Pick up Energy Blocks generated during the battle</color> to charge the Neo Akasha Terminal and activate the Elemental Matrices ｜ <color=#FF5E41FF>拾取战斗中产生的能量块</color>为新式虚空终端补充能量，以激活各元素矩阵
- Icewhirl Brand DMG|{param3:P} ｜ 冰涡之剑伤害|{param3:P}
- Food ｜ 食物
- Prospect of the Brave ｜ 勇士的期许
- *sigh* Why haven't we received notice yet... ｜ 唉，怎么还没有个准信…
- Even if it's the simplest of scenes, you must carefully determine the actors and props required. ｜ 哪怕构筑一个很普通的情景，也要仔细确认每位演员的，用到了什么道具。
- I'll go and ask at the Guild a little later. I'm sure I saw something about adventurers for hire... ｜ 我等会去冒险家协会问问好了，我记得，那边好像能雇佣冒险家来着…
- Echoing Conch ｜ 回声海螺
- Okay, task for the day — meet the tribespeople and take some heat off of Kinich's back! ｜ 今天我们去悬木人部族逛逛吧，帮基尼奇吸引一下「火力」！
- That's right, that's me! We work in logistics, in the rear-line, so it's normal that you haven't heard of us. What we do is develop and test experimental equipment. ｜ 是的！我们的工作职责偏向后勤，您没听说过也是正常的！所谓「武器官」，就是对实验性装备进行开发与测试的骑士。
- Could it be that he's insinuating I should read more!? ｜ …难不成，是这混蛋在暗示我多读点书？！
- Restores 30% of Max HP and an additional 600 HP to the selected character. ｜ 为选中的角色恢复生命值上限的30%，并额外恢复600点生命值。
- Investigation of the Northern Barbarians ｜ 关于北境蛮族的考察
- Oh, that's not correct... I remember now. I'm not here for my son. I'm here for the personal items he left behind. ｜ 哦，不对…我想起来了，我不是来找儿子的，而是来找儿子的遗物。
- The square makes it possible to connect the living to the Night Kingdom. If the Abyss starts to corrode that area, its forces could once again surge into the land above. ｜ 广场是他们的意志连接夜神之国的关键场地，如果深渊侵蚀了那里，很可能再度从纳塔的大地涌出。

- Oh... Yeah, The Withering. ｜ 啊…对，就是死域。
- "Curve" ｜ 「曲线」
- Okay! ｜ 嗯！
- Plans... not a notion that can be easily applied to me anymore. I am a man of leisure. I simply go wherever I am inclined, wherever that may be. ｜ 安排二字，并不适合我。我是个闲人，行走随心，想去哪里都是可以的。
- When Cesar passed away, all the stolen goods discovered in his home were confiscated and returned to their rightful owners. But Lorenzo was the only one privy to all his magic secrets, and he inherited his craft. ｜ 塞萨尔去世后，从他家里搜出来的赃物被警方查封，悉数还给了失主。而塞萨尔生前积攒的魔术机密，则全部由洛伦佐继承。
- "Where merchants flock, and all ships dock, and to all four corners flows our stock."\nLiyue prides itself on its intricate landscape and prosperous people.\nBut it is that very intricacy of terrain that allows many monsters to hide from the Millelith, and the Ministry of Civil Affairs also lacks the time to listen to all the peoples' requests.\nIf you can complete the requests from Liyue's people and destroy these dangerous monsters, you may yet earn the favor of Ms. Yu from the Ministry, and the trust of Liyue.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Reputation: The Liyue Ministry of Civil Affairs</color>\nThrough Ms. Yu, you can access the latest Bounties and Requests, and you can also collect Reputation EXP for World Exploration and Liyue Quests.\nIn addition, you can also check your Reputation EXP and Level and obtain the rewards related to increasing your Reputation Level.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Reputation: Levels and Rewards</color>\nWhen your Reputation Level goes up, you can obtain the corresponding rewards.\nOnce your Reputation has hit the maximum level, you can no longer accumulate Reputation EXP. ｜ 「万商云来、千船继至；宝飨七国，钱遍六合。」\n土地广袤、人民富足，这是璃月港的骄傲。\n但正因土地广袤，所以隐藏着千岩军无暇讨伐的魔物。而总务司也难以同时聆听所有人的请求。\n如果能完成璃月居民的委托、剿灭危险的魔物的话，或许就能得到总务司干事小雨的青睐，以及璃月的信任。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【声望：璃月总务司】</color>\n通过小雨，可以接取新的「讨伐悬赏」、「居民请求」任务，也能领取「世界探索」与「璃月任务」带来的声望值提升。\n除此之外，也可以确认自己的声望经验与声望等级，并领取声望等级提升带来的奖励。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【声望：等级与奖励】</color>\n声望等级提升时，可以领取对应的奖励。\n声望等级达到上限后，无法继续获取声望经验。
- "Infinitesimal" ｜ 「微末」
- You think it's too quiet here? I find it quite to my satisfaction. It is an ideal place to rest and enjoy a little leisure time. ｜ 太安静了吗？我倒觉得刚好。适当地停下脚步，给自己安排一段悠闲的私人时间。
- Shogunate Announcement ｜ 幕府通告
- See what your Saurian buddy has found ｜ 看看龙伙伴发现了什么
- 2-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param3:F1P}
- Matriarch Babel trusted her so much. I—I—I adored her as well. She was like a l—little an—antelope, hehe... But that northerner said, he said... ｜ 芭别尔主母那么信任她，我也很喜欢她，像个小、小、小羚羊一样…但那个北方人说、北方人说、说…
- Did you discover any clues about why it suddenly became active? ｜ 不过关于它到底为什么会突然启动，你们在遗迹巨像里面有发现什么线索吗？
- Charge, little Tatankasaur! ｜ 冲呀，小突角龙！
- That's actually what I think, too. That's precisely why it's such a miracle that we even found the Fantastic Compass to begin with. ｜ 其实，我也这么想。可正因为是这样，我们能找到太威仪盘就是一种奇迹。
- An appetizer served with a green dipping sauce. The crispy balls are first deep-fried, then stuffed with a delicious filling through a hole on the top. The bite-sized snack is a common street food in Sumeru. ｜ 蘸汁食用的小吃。用热油先炸好脆球，戳个洞塞入配料，搭配绿汁一起食用。大小适中，一口一个，是须弥街头常见的特色小吃。
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Why did you not ask me to protect you like the last time? ｜ 不像从前一样，要我「守护」…
- Thank you. ｜ 谢谢您。
- Mighty Bathysmal Vishaps that use different elements in battle to vent their great rage. After entering battle, they will use the powerful Cleansing Shower attack. Characters hit by this ability will <color=#FFE14BFF>lose a certain amount of Energy</color>. If the character lacks sufficient Energy, they will <color=#FFE14BFF>lose HP</color> instead.\nIf you are unable to <color=#FFE14BFF>defeat</color> the Frostshrieker Bathysmal Vishap and the Blitzroarer Bathysmal Vishap <color=#FFE14BFF>consecutively within a short time</color>, the Bathysmal Vishap you first defeated will be <color=#FFE14BFF>revived</color>. ｜ 强大的深海龙蜥之群，操持着不同的元素，向着来者宣泄它们的愤怒。进入战斗后，会使出威力强大的「涤魔喷吐」。命中角色后，角色将<color=#FFE14BFF>流失一定元素能量</color>。若角色的元素能量不足，将<color=#FFE14BFF>损失生命值</color>。\n若未能在<color=#FFE14BFF>短时间内连续击败</color>深海龙蜥·唳霜与深海龙蜥·啸霆，先击败的深海龙蜥会<color=#FFE14BFF>复苏</color>。
- Really? ...Are you sure? ｜ 真的…没关系吗？
- No! Ahem... I mean, absolutely not. ｜ 那可不行！咳…那可不行呀。
- In any case, I will continue to help improve this piece of equipment until it is suitable for becoming standardized equipment or proven to be unsuitable. ｜ 无论如何，我都会一直参与这套设备的改进工作，直到它完成列装，或被证明彻底没有列装的可能。
- Dainsleif ｜ 戴因斯雷布
- She sounds professional enough. She is a captain, after all. I have no objections. ｜ 能请到专业人士我当然没意见，更何况还是队长级别的。
- But uh, it turns out the other members weren't as pumped about the event as me... ｜ 却没想到本大爷的那些小弟，好像对试胆大会不怎么感兴趣。
- Collection Not Started ｜ 未开始收集
- Two things I've learned from the story of Vishaps are: ｜ 我从龙蜥的故事里学到的两个经验就是——
- Hey, I brought the cores you wanted... ｜ 你要的核心…
- I beg you: As an old partner, can you let me fulfill my last wish? Just this once? ｜ 哪怕是作为曾经的搭档，恳求你满足我最后的心愿，也不能通融一下？
- "Axeress Marie" ｜ 人称「大斧玛丽」
- A strange key. Who knows what lock it opens... ｜ 一把奇特的钥匙，不知道可以打开哪里的锁…
- Obviously, the person who stuffed him in the barrel is also participating. So if he beats you, it'll be his chance at revenge in the ring. ｜ 显然，把他塞进桶里的人也来参加拳力斗技的娱乐赛了，如果他赢了你们，就有机会在拳场上给仇家一些颜色瞧瞧。
- Great thinking, Cyno! So... Where do we think the culprit's at right now? ｜ 还是赛诺周到呀！不过，犯人现在会在哪里呢？
- Woohoo! That sure did work out! ｜ 很顺利呢，太好啦！
- Paimon is well aware just how awesome we are! But Mr. Lafeinte, Paimon has no idea what you were trying to say! ｜ 虽然我们的确很厉害，但勒非尼先生，你说的话好复杂，完全不明白是什么意思啦！
- Ahahahaha! Paimon almost feels bad for Erge! ｜ 哈哈哈哈哈哈哈！二哥也太惨了吧！
- Energy Regeneration|{param4:F1} ｜ 元素能量恢复|{param4:F1}
- Uhh... ｜ 唔…
- I fear that I shall be of little help. Come back once you have defeated that traitor. ｜ 现在老夫也帮不上什么忙…等你们打败了那个叛徒，再来找老夫吧。
- We feel much better. How about you? ｜ 我们好多啦，你呢？
- Raptor? Is that a new species of game bird? ｜ 怪鸟？那是什么新品种的猎物吗？
- Hmm... Speaking of which, what does the name mean anyway? ｜ 唔，话说回来，「王山厅」到底是什么意思啊？
- Observe Stone Tablet ｜ 观察石碑
- ...But w—we're done here, no? Is there a problem? I—I haven't done anything... ｜ 有完没完…你想干什么？我又没犯什么事…
- #When we see {M#her}{F#him}, Paimon will help you talk {M#her}{F#him} around. After all, {M#she}{F#he} only has a single mouth, but we have two! It's two against one! ｜ #等下次见到{M#她}{F#他}，我就帮你说服{M#她}{F#他}，毕竟{M#她}{F#他}只有一张嘴，我们可有两张，是一比二哦！

- Good to see you again! ｜ 好久不见！

- A handy tool used to locate nearby chests and relevant clues. For some people, the significance of life lies in exploration and discovery. Upon reaching each destination, there is always bountiful treasure awaiting.\nTravelers on the road will one day find their destiny, and the experiences, stories, and riches that they leave behind will become riches that those who come after will seek. ｜ 能寻找附近的宝箱和宝箱相关线索的便利道具。对一些人而言，生命的意义在于探索与开拓吧。而在探索与开拓的终点，往往有着丰厚的宝藏等着他们。\n旅途当中有的人最终会寻得自己的宿命。而他们留下的经验、故事与财富则成为了后人追寻的宝藏。
- Anyway, I digress. This is the symbol of the cross-border criminal organization you know as the Treasure Hoarders. ｜ 回到正题吧。这是跨国犯罪组织「盗宝团」的符号。

- The following labor shall be little, but it is still a radiant shard. Yasnapati mine, record it down with a reverent heart, and use even this mote of shattered light to grace your mighty hymn. ｜ 接下来的功业虽小，但也是光辉的破片，「谒颂主」可要怀着虔敬之心好好记录，以便将这零碎的光彩点缀于吾之颂诗之上啊。
- Ah... ｜ 啊…
- You'll grow strong and bear fruit quickly, Paimon. ｜ 派蒙要茁壮成长早日结果啊。
- What it's trying to say is that as long as family members get along well, then nothing else matters. ｜ 它的意思是，家人之间互相喜欢就够了，其他的都不重要。
- When a character takes the field, they will gain 1 Fortitude stack every 2s. This will <color=#F39000FF>increase their ATK by 20%</color>. Max 3 stacks. When characters with 3 Fortitude stacks hit opponents with Charged Attacks, a <color=#F39000FF>shockwave will be unleashed</color> at the opponents' position, dealing True DMG. A shockwave can be unleashed in this manner once every 2s. When the character leaves the field, all their Fortitude stacks will be cleared. ｜ 角色登场后，每2秒获得一层「奋勇」效果，<color=#F39000FF>攻击力提升20%</color>，该效果至多叠加3层。处于3层「奋勇」状态下的角色在重击命中敌人时，将在敌人的位置<color=#F39000FF>释放冲击波</color>，造成真实伤害，每2秒至多通过这种方式释放一次冲击波。角色退场时，将清除所有的「奋勇」效果。
- Sometimes, when I'm taking a rest up in a tree, I overhear the shrine maidens talking about him. Sounds like he's pretty important and super busy most of the time. I don't get it, though — it's only work, or whatever, so why doesn't he just... not do it? ｜ 我在树上休息的时候，经常会听到巫女姐姐们在聊他，似乎是一位工作很忙的大人。真是奇怪，工作什么的明明旷掉就好了…
- This area's combat effects are unknown. ｜ 此地存在的战斗效果未知。
- Have "Kururuk" take some medicine ｜ 喂「咕噜噜」吃药
- What!? ｜ 啊、啊？
- Purifying? ... Indeed. ｜ 净化…的确如此。
- Either way, ordinary humans don't live that long. It's been several hundred years, so they're probably not the same person, right? ｜ 不论怎么说，一般人活不了那么久。经过了数百年，她们应该不是同一人吧。
- You may wish to pay attention to these few details. Here, for example... Alright, try it again. ｜ 你可以注意一下这么几个细节，就像这样…来，拿去试试吧。
- Head Nurse, I've done a final headcount of our team and the criminals. Everyone's here and doing fine. We're ready to escort the fugitives back to the Fortress of Meropide. ｜ 护士长，我已经清点了队员和犯人，大家都没事，可以把这些逃犯押回梅洛彼得堡了。
- Alright, looks like we're all here. ｜ 嗯，人都到齐了。
- Seems to me like whatever these things are, they aren't visible to the naked eye... ｜ 总觉得，是一些肉眼看不见的东西…
- A standard-issue honorary instructor's cap, only granted to those who turn down a promotion. ｜ 制式的教官帽子。是拒绝了晋升的军官才能获得的殊荣。
- A lightning-infused flower, somehow spared the fate of being trodden underfoot or reduced to ash by the furious purple fire, making it the sole survivor on the day of disaster. ｜ 在劫难之日侥幸免受纷乱的践踏与紫之火的忿恨之摧，于惨象中幸存的雷色之花。
- Don't get the order wrong, or it may cause problems, which will affect our customers' impression of us. Our future business is at stake... ｜ 千万不要记错了，否则不仅可能发生意外情况，更会影响顾客对我们的印象，以后的订单就悬了…
- Generally, kids going through a rebellious phase will resist the care of their parents and try to assert their independence. That's what Paimon's heard anyway. ｜ 简单说，叛逆期的人类小孩会反抗平日照顾自己的大人，并且提出一些自己的主张。我是这么听说的。
- Fresh and flavorful fruit juice made from a variety of ingredients. Its invigorating and healthy properties have made it a firm favorite among the fitness-obsessed tribespeople of the Collective of Plenty, who often recommend drinking two glasses a day. ｜ 鲜醇的果汁。由多种食材混合制成，有着浓厚的风味。不仅能提神，对健康也颇有益处，因此「沃陆之邦」的许多健身爱好者几乎每天都会来上一两杯。
- He throws you the hardest work. After you're done pulling all-nighters, he struts around with your research data and takes credit for it. ｜ 他把最困难的工作丢给你做，让你昼夜不得休息，然后大摇大摆地拿着你的研究结果，声称这是他自己做的。
- "Zakhar, don't push yourself. Look, there's a cave over there..."\n"Let's go and rest for a while..." ｜ 「扎哈尔，别勉强了，你看，前面那个山洞…」\n「我们先去那边休息一下吧…」
- Lady Ningguang is simply brilliant. Once again, she has blown my mind. ｜ 凝光大人真厉害，又一次感受到她的过人之处了。
- I'm a wholesaler of fruits and vegetables. ｜ 我是卖蔬菜水果的批发商。
- Having entered The Chasm's lower layers, you can see the great infrastructural works within and comprehend how lively this place must once have been, despite its current desolation... Regardless, it is an adventurer's duty to explore the area. ｜ 进入了层岩巨渊的下层，自周围的工事可看出层岩曾有的热火朝天的景象，此时却已十分荒凉…无论如何，先对周围的情况进行勘探，才是合格冒险家的作为。
- In the letter, Varka entrusted Lisa to give the belongings left by Razor's biological parents to Razor. But the news from his parents may not be easy for Razor... ｜ 法尔伽在来信中委托丽莎，将雷泽亲生父母留下的物品交给雷泽。但父母的消息对雷泽来说可能并不轻松…
- Obtained from fishing ｜ 钓鱼获得
- But if you recall, Azhdaha... this is not how we intended for events to transpire. ｜ 但若陀龙王，若你还记得…走到这一步并非你我本意。
- And the boss. She's a Mondstadter, but nobody from Mondstadt knows her. ｜ 比如客栈里有一位老板，她说自己是蒙德人，却没有蒙德人认识她。
- You pull the lever.\nAfter some rumbling and shaking, the machine spits out a stack of paper tape... ｜ 你拉动了拉杆。\n一阵轰鸣和晃动后，机器吐出了一叠纸带…
- Did someone from Liyue save you? ｜ 被璃月人救了吗？

- Yes. The forest is vast, and dreams are vast, so I am small. ｜ 嗯。因为，森林很大、梦很大。所以，我很小。

- A giant vine that has absorbed the ancient flame that rages within the ley lines.\nIt is restless as if filled with endless fury.\nPoets, bards, and even some academics believe that elements also contain emotions and hopes. If this is true, then one can only wonder what emotions cause the Pyro Regisvine to burn eternally, writhing like one longing to be free of the confines of the earth... ｜ 吸收了地脉中奔涌的古老烈焰的巨大藤蔓。\n如同充满怒火一般，永不止息的植物。\n诗人、歌手乃至一些学者认为「元素」中蕴含着情感和愿望。如果属实，又是什么情感与愿望驱使着爆炎树恒常燃烧，如同渴求着挣脱大地的束缚一般挣扎舞动呢…

### Part 087

- Seriously, Kaeya, thank you for bailing me out again. You're a good guy... May the gods bless you. ｜ 凯亚先生，真的，你又帮了我一次，你是个好心的人，愿神保佑你。
- Now to see if I can recreate it... ｜ 我要去试试，能不能自己做出来这道料理…
- Um... Umm... ｜ 唔…唔…
- Challenge 2 ｜ 挑战2
- Nara's life is like tree, bad bugs, like Marana. Only Bija can make Narana better. ｜ 那菈的生命就像树木，坏虫就像无留陀。只有「惟耶之实」，能够让那菈拉娜恢复。
- Maintenance Mek: Situation Controller ｜ 维护机关·态势控制者
- But in this version of Windtrace, when Rebels get caught by the Hunter, they won't be knocked out straight away. Instead, they'll be kept in what's known as the "Surveillance Zone." ｜ 但在这次的「风行迷踪」里，游侠被猎手抓住后，不会直接出局，而是会被投入一个叫做「监控地」的地方。
- What have you learned, my liege? ｜ 您可有收获？
- After the game begins, you will draw 5 cards from your Draw Pile to form your starting Hand.\nWhen every Round ends, both sides will draw 2 cards.\nOnly Action Cards in your Hand can be played or used in Elemental Tuning.\nYour Hand is limited to 10 cards, after which you will automatically discard any cards you draw. ｜ 游戏开始后，从「牌堆」中抓5张牌，作为初始的「手牌」。\n每个回合结束时，双方各抓2张牌。\n只有「手牌」中的行动牌可以被打出和用于元素调和。\n「手牌」上限为10张，达到上限后抓到的牌会被自动弃置。
- Waypoints shrouded in darkness lose their original functionality.\nYou can consume specialized materials to use secret arts that can push the darkness back and restore their functions. ｜ 被黑雾缠绕的锚点，失去了自己本来的功能。\n可以通过消耗特定材料来行使秘法驱逐黑雾，使其恢复工作。
- Steak. ｜ 烤肉排。
- Thanks for your concern. I'm feeling great, really! That I was able to become a real shrine maiden is thanks to your help, and that of many others. ｜ 谢谢您的关心，我最近感觉很不错！我能够成为真正的巫女，离不开您和其他许多人的帮助。
- Otherwise, how will we ever get to the ore... ｜ 不然可惜了里面的矿石…
- Scoring Details ｜ 得分详情
- The current... feels like it's getting faster? ｜ 水流…好像越来越急了？
- Object is made to disappear ｜ 拟想物件消失
- I have been listening to your conversation just now, all while hiding in that hole in the ground right beneath the mechanism. Now that I have heard how willing you are to help Banu, I must extend my gratitude to you. ｜ 刚才本人一直躲在机关下方的地洞里听你们的对话，你们如此愿意帮助芭努，本人万分感激。
- Currently unable to enter another player's world. ｜ 暂时无法进入其他玩家的世界
- Arakara ｜ 兰伽卢
- Lady Signora may have met her end here in Inazuma, but that makes it the best time for us to repay Lady Arlecchino's kindness and build up her prestige. ｜ 虽然「女士」大人在稻妻遇害了，但现在，也正是我们回报「仆人」大人的恩情，为其建立威望的好时机。

- Citlali ｜ 茜特菈莉
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- I will keep seeing what the stars say every day. ｜ 我也会每日占卜的。
- Hmph... Well, we could have chosen worse. This one is sturdy enough. A shame that he has too big a mouth, and too small a brain. ｜ 哼…不错，挺结实的。可惜多了张嘴，少了个脑子。
- The Quickswap Menu can contain 4 Gadgets, 1 of which will be chosen by default. The selected Gadget slot can be empty. ｜ 快捷更换栏中至多放入4个小道具，默认会选择4个栏位中的1个，选中的栏位可以为空。
- Sorry, it's just... I know this product will be a hit. The economic boost to Fontaine will be huge! We just need to advertise it as written. ｜ 抱歉，是我失态了…您看，我确保这种染料可以大卖，为枫丹带来巨大的经济收益，前提是宣传到位。
- I was thinking that I might be using the wrong ingredients... ｜ 我觉得，也许是因为我用的烹饪材料不对…
- A dish with ground meat as its base. One may find it hard to guess what's inside based on its dull appearance. If you try taking a small bite... Yep, there's wheat in there. It'll probably scrape your lips if you're not careful enough. ｜ 以肉末为主的菜肴。黯淡的外表，让人无法想象出里面究竟放了什么。稍稍尝上一口…嗯，看来有小麦，嘴唇很明显是被小麦壳刮了一下。
- Joining Party: II ｜ 加入队伍·其二
- Kazuha! ｜ 万叶！
- I used to be a constable at the Police Station. Someone framed me, and I was suspended from my post. If it weren't for President Sango's amazing intelligence, I could not imagine how I would end up... ｜ 我以前是奉行所的捕快，被人栽赃陷害到革职。若不是珊瑚社长智慧惊人，如今的我还不知道会流落到什么地步呢…

- Wow... I guess being a national hero earns you friends in high places... ｜ 哇，这就是大英雄的人脉吗？
- ...Along with those flowers that you found for me earlier. ｜ 还有之前你帮我摘到的那些花，我也都会种到花盆里。
- #Expert Exam{SPACE} ｜ 特阶炼金考核
- Yeah, there they are. And one of them has horns. ｜ 嗯，确实有个头上有角的混在里面。
- I wonder if the Almighty Shogun would enjoy the books here... ｜ 这里的藏书，不知将军大人是否喜爱…
- But he's still an elder who knows more about our heritage than I do, so I have to ask him for information regardless of any... disagreements we might have. ｜ 哼，但长者毕竟是长者，关于矫论团的传承，他比我了解得更多，所以哪怕不情愿也只能向他请教。
- *gasp* There's no doubt about it! It's from the same series as the story we found before. Even the handwriting looks exactly the same! ｜ 没错，这和之前我们拿到的故事是一个系列的，就连上面的字迹也一模一样！
- Guest Challenge: Yelan ｜ 来客挑战：夜兰
- Cutting straight to the chase, huh? As befits an adventurer, I suppose. ｜ 问得这么直接？真像是一位冒险家做事的风格。
- Restores 1 Vigor to <color=#f39001>{0}</color> random characters, but in this Act's Combat Event, the active character loses <color=#f39001>{1}%</color> of their Max HP each time they deal a CRIT Hit, triggering up to once every {2}s ｜ 为随机<color=#f39001>{0}</color>名角色恢复1点耐力值，但本幕的战斗事件中，当前场上的角色造成暴击后将损失生命值，损失量相当于生命值上限的<color=#f39001>{1}%</color>，此效果每{2}秒最多触发1次

- Alright, enjoy the show! ｜ 好，请尽情欣赏比赛吧！
- Goblet of Chiseled Crag ｜ 巉岩琢塑之樽
- You should get out of this place, Lanoire. You've heard all the stories already. There's a real world outside and a family that you are connected to. ｜ 到外边去吧，莉诺尔。那些故事你也都听得生厌了，外边有真正的世界，还有与你血脉相连的亲人。

- "To walk from its tail to the head, the moon will rise and fall!" ｜ 「从尾巴走到头，要从月亮升起，到月亮落下！」
- Travel Notes: Heavenly General ｜ 纪行·神将
- We heard from some people that there was treasure to be had here on Seirai Island, and that the island itself wasn't all that populated... ｜ 我们就是从人家那听说，清籁岛上有宝藏，而且岛上还没多少人…
- You flatter me, Your Highness. ｜ 公主殿下客气了。
- Tell me about yourself. ｜ 关于你自己…

- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- Strange, we didn't have any luck, either... Where could he have gone...? ｜ 怪了，我们这里也没有…他到底去哪儿了啊…
- The strange thing is that Kirara's delivery route has coincided with the card snatcher's movements at every turn. ｜ 奇怪的点在于，绮良良小姐的足迹，与我们一路追寻的「怪盗」不谋而合。
- Learned from Realm Depot Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设图纸购买习得
- Never have I seen a place where you can decorate to your heart's whimsy... You don't understand what this means to an architect like me. ｜ 我是第一次见到能随心所欲布置的环境…你可能不知道这对我们这行意味着什么。
- Ah, about that... well, the Homayanis really needed bodyguards, so they reached out to the Blazing Beasts. ｜ 这个嘛…因为之前呼玛伊家需要护卫，就找了我们「炽光猎兽」。
- No, no way! I'll never admit defeat! I have to go there! ｜ 不行不行！可莉绝对不会认输，一定要去那里！

- Increases underwater Sprint SPD for your own party members by 15%.\nNot stackable with Passive Talents that provide the exact same effects. ｜ 队伍中自己的角色进行水下冲刺时，移动速度提升15%。\n无法与效果完全相同的固有天赋叠加。
- In addition, the power of the divine throne revitalized the souls and memories within the Night Kingdom, allowing them to take the form of their past selves. ｜ 这样的力量也充分激活了「夜神之国」中容纳的记忆与灵魂，它们都凝聚成了生前的形态。
- Let's hope we meet them again soon! ｜ 希望下次见面的那天快快到来！
- Bad guy! Arapandu won't let you get away again! ｜ 坏家伙，不会再让你逃跑了！
- "Smaragdus Jadeite springs forth from Stonemarrow within the mountains, and will bring disaster to any mere mortals who touch it." ｜ 「『翠珏岩』随山中石髓而生，常人触之，必有灾殃…」
- It's true... I was originally cast as the lead in The Lost Puppet. ｜ 《人偶迷踪》原定的主演…确实是我。
- Speaking of tiring jobs... I do feel bad making you do this. ｜ 让您受累，实在是有些不好意思。
- Anyway, I will record everything I have seen and heard. I should like for my compatriots in Sumeru to learn of these historical events... ｜ 总之，我会把我的所见所闻记录下来，希望我的家乡须弥也能知道这段历史…
- That... really is a lot. I'm going to have to ask you to give me all the details when you've got the time. ｜ 好吧，看来我确实错过了太多故事，有空了我一定要请你好好为我讲讲。
- That machine looks amazing! Could it be the legendary Ruin Wanderer? ｜ 那台大机械，看着好威风啊！不会就是传说中的「遗迹徘徊者」吧？
- Not sure I completely get what you mean... ｜ 这种说法？难以理解…
- Those were the same words I heard last time. The space seems to be reproducing that memory... ｜ 我当时听见的，就是这些话。这段回忆似乎被这个空间重现了出来…
- Selected characters will always be displayed ｜ 选中的角色将始终显示
- Are these the kind of Wolfhook you're looking for? ｜ 是这种钩钩果吗？
- Look for the Barsam Flower with Aragaru and learn more stories along the way... ｜ 与兰迦鲁一同寻找找「钵参花」，在路上，你们得知了更多故事…
- Energy Cost|{param8:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param8:I}
- Take care, and watch your step. ｜ 慢走，小心脚下。
- R—Really? Oh, wow. I... I... ｜ 真，真的吗？我，我我…
- Mposo ｜ 恩波索
- Recently, someone said that there's going to be a new document promulgated here at the Maison Gestion, that specifically addresses secrets leaked through Kameras. I don't want to be the first one to be made an example of... ｜ 最近复律庭里有人说马上就要下来一份文件，专门规制留影机泄密这件事。我可不想当那个被打的出头鸟…
- It is precisely in their search for a solution that some of my colleagues have broken down and transmuted the sights they've seen using their inner feelings. ｜ 为了解决这个问题，我一些同行将这些具象的景物按照自己内心的情绪进行拆解和变形。
- Contains furnishings that cannot be added to custom sets. Automatically remove said furnishings and create a custom set? ｜ 包含不可被添加进自定义套装的摆设，是否自动移除相应摆设并创建自定义套装？
- So, you'd like to know about Her Majesty the Tsaritsa, correct? Now, where to begin? ｜ 你想打听和「女皇陛下」有关的事对吧？我想想从哪开始说。
- Amazing... This Shadow Pin's perfectly intact — indeed, these past few days only in my sweetest dreams have I seen it so tranquil! ｜ 呜哇…完整无恙的「小缝影针」，这两天我只在最美的梦里梦见过这根柱子如此安静的样子。
- Isn't it... Huixin from the Yuehai Pavilion? I remember you. ｜ 这不是…月海亭的慧心吗，我记得你。
- An elegant and serene garden that utilizes gazebos drawn from Razan Garden and Pardis Dhyai. This place is less concerned with the absolute unity of the disparate architectural styles, but is more focused on creating an overall air of tranquility.\nThe lovely blossoms slumber here in peace, and the standing lamps set the fountain aglow... Once the night hours approach, a walk through this garden can cause the noisy thoughts in your head to dissipate like wispy clouds. Perhaps you might even gain inspiration that you would normally struggle to find... ｜ 幽雅静谧的花园，采用了寂静园与禅那园式样的凉亭，并不拘泥于建筑风格的绝对统一，所有陈设和布置都致力于营造安恬的氛围。\n姣丽珍奇的花卉安然沉眠，精美的立灯点缀着典雅大气的喷泉…待到入夜时分，穿行在这座花园之中，脑内的杂念便会烟消云散，或许还能找到平时难以寻见的灵感…
- Follow the path to escort Kachina back to the tribe ｜ 沿路送卡齐娜回部族
- But there's nothing we can do about that. ｜ 但这也没办法。
- Wait, Neuvillette? Could he be... ｜ 那维莱特？难道是…
- The Wine-Flask Over Which the Plan Was Hatched ｜ 筹谋的共樽
- This side's all lit up! Let's go find some other place to work with! ｜ 这边亮起来了！我们再继续找找其他的吧！

- Wait! Please stop, Ms. Chronie! ｜ 等等！请等等啊，克洛妮艾小姐！
- We could do with some more fortune... ｜ 希望这种好事能多来几次…
- But, I also couldn't find any overt destructive devices... ｜ 此外…也没有明确的破坏装置…

- If not, then what else could it be? ｜ 不是「信任」的话是什么？
- I'm looking for a handy weapon. ｜ 想挑些趁手的武器。
- How can I describe it... It's like listening to a regional dialect. A lot of it goes over my head, but I can still get the general gist. ｜ 怎么说呢，就像是在听方言一样。虽然许多地方有些难以理解，不过大致能听懂。

- Touch ｜ 触碰
- "So, this island is a fragment from Mondstadt's mountain range... Lisa mentioned to me once before that Lord Barbatos once used his divine power to reshape the land around Mondstadt and make the city a more hospitable environment to live in. He cut an extraneous mountain off from the rest and cast it into the sea. Presumably, it turned upside-down as it fell... Leading to the form it takes today." ｜ 「这整座岛屿恐怕都是来自蒙德的山脉碎片。丽莎跟我提过，巴巴托斯大人为了让蒙德城更宜居，曾以神力改变蒙德周遭的地形。他将多余的山体割下抛到这片海域，移动过程中，山体很可能颠倒过来…才变成了现在的模样。」
- Send Xiangling a gift envelope to unlock ｜ 向香菱赠送祝柬后解锁
- Long time no see! How's the world outside of Yashiori Island? ｜ 好久不见啦！八酝岛外的世界怎么样？
- Ifa relates what happened in the Bloomflower Trials centuries ago, and the tale of the little Qucusaur, Antu. ｜ 向众人讲述了数百年前的荣花演武，以及小绒翼龙安杜的故事。
- Where is my notebook? Where is it? My notebook... ｜ 我的笔记本呢？笔记本，笔记本…
- That's a relief... ｜ 那就好…

- Have you already met anyone else from the Nui family? They're all my relatives! ｜ 你见过努伊家的人了吗？我也是其中一员哦！
- I intend to. I am not ready to stop yet. ｜ 嗯，我可没有想要休息的意思。
- Blaaargh! ｜ 呼啊！

- And, she's off... ｜ 瓦雷莎走掉了…

- This was the... strongest combination of aromas I could possibly have thought of! ｜ 简直是我能想到的…气味最强烈的组合了！
- Ohhh! I get it now. The shell must've been having too much fun one day, and got locked in the solitary confinement room. ｜ 啊！明白了，贝壳太贪玩了，所以在禁闭室里…
- Waaah! But... but... being in the water is scary! ｜ 呜，但是、但是水里很可怕嘛！
- You can check the special rules and select the match difficulty before starting a Zero Hour Invokation match. ｜ 开始「零时召唤」对局前，可以查看对局的特殊规则，并且可以选择对局的难度。

- Uh, I'm not a very good climber, so I'll just let you handle the statue. ｜ 我不太擅长攀爬，神像的清洁就交给你们了。
- All party members gain a 75% Pyro DMG Bonus. ｜ 队伍中所有角色获得75%火元素伤害加成。
- Zhongli ｜ 钟离
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Carved Courtyard Fence Ending.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「雕花庭院墙尾」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Hehe, it's not a big deal or anything. It's not like we're all a bunch of stolid hermits or something. We have our own circles to walk in... and I just happen to have a few extra friends on the outside. ｜ 呵呵，没什么。沙漠人并不都是固步自封的家伙，我们也是有自己的社交网络的…我也有一些外面的朋友就是了。

- Mm hmm, Thelxie will need to be able to charge forward with a weapon in hand like that brave prince of legend. It's a part of my employer's request. ｜ 嗯，「特尔克西」要像英勇的王子一样，高举着武器前进，这是那位雇主的需求…
- Flowing Blade Skirmisher ｜ 流刃勇士·游击人
- Classic Master Diluc — not a baddie left standing. ｜ 不愧是迪卢克老爷，真是干净利落！
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Compact assistance meka developed to increase the overall utilization rates of meka teams, providing aid for underwater projects. They were originally designed to remove junk, vegetation, and other underwater debris in order to prevent these from clogging up the vital parts of other clockwork meka, thereby minimizing failure rates.\nCompared to the other batch-produced models, these special limited-edition "Platinum Collection" meks stand out with their clean and bright casing. When trying to attract support from wealthy merchants for the Maintenance Mek project, the development team would send them a fish tank containing one of these exquisite contraptions as a gift — and fine gifts they were indeed! Unfortunately, none of these attempts worked, so the development team adjusted their plans and tried to sell them off as toys to make up for the lack of project funds instead.\nIn the end, due to the accident that we all remember, the whole development team was dismissed and all of their future projects were canceled. At present, all of the remaining Maintenance Meks in Fontaine are totally unsupervised, and the "Platinum Collection" batch are no exception — they have all been lost to the water. Disappearing completely off the radar, they have turned out to be the most unique and expensive "fishes" in Fontaine. According to an in-depth investigation and cross-examination of the existing data by journalists of The Steambird, "the deployment of Maintenance Meks has not made any significant difference to the pollution levels of Fontaine's waters, and the effect of the project is still in question." Nowadays, surviving "Platinum Collection" meks still wander the waters of Fontaine, and they are considered among the most prized of catches. After all, a "Platinum Collection" mek is now as rare as the most valuable Ornamental Fish in other nations. ｜ 为了辅助水下活动的发条机关，提升机队总出勤率而开发的紧凑型辅助机关。最初的设计目的是清除水下的垃圾、植物残渣等杂物，避免它们吸附在发条机关关键部位，从而尽可能降低发条机关的故障率。\n相较于其他量产型号，这一特别的「白金典藏型」维护机关采用了光洁亮丽的壳体，是该开发组专门生产的纪念型号。该组在游说一些财力雄厚的商人，为维护机关项目招商引资时，会将这种纪念品赠送给商人，作为鱼缸中的精致观赏物，的确相当难得。可惜的是，该组所有吸引投资的尝试都以失败告终，转而计划将这种维护机关作为玩具出售，补贴日渐亏空的项目经费池。\n最终，随着那场人尽皆知的事故，整个维护机关开发组彻底停摆，维护机关的后续项目也被取消。目前，枫丹水域内该谱系的维护机关全都无人管理。预先生产的一批「白金典藏型」也全部沉入水中，不知去向，成为了枫丹水域最富特色，也是最昂贵的「鱼类」。随着科学院的一些项目公开，《蒸汽鸟报》的记者们对比资料，深入调查，发现「维护机关投放前后，枫丹水域的污染状况其实并没有显著变化，该项目的效能值得怀疑」。此后，尚能活动的「白金典藏型」维护机关依旧在枫丹的水域中游弋着，鱼师们也开始以钓到「白金典藏型」为荣，毕竟「白金典藏型」的稀有程度和其他国家最珍贵的观赏鱼旗鼓相当。
- Just you wait! ｜ 你等着嗷！
- A snowman nose made of a failed attempt at apple pie. Can be used to build a Puffy Snowman.\nThese failed apple pies have exceedingly high internal pressure. The puff pastry has been dyed completely red by the filling and can explode at any given moment. The process of installing this nose is itself a way in which children utilize this dangerous failed product. If some child were to be unlucky enough to have the apple pie explode as it is being installed, the other children will pay for snacks to help dispel their ill-fortune. ｜ 由烹饪失败的苹果馅饼制作而成的雪人鼻子，可用于组装「噗噗雪人」。\n这种失败的苹果馅饼有着极高的内部压力，就连酥皮都被馅料彻底染红，随时可能爆开。将它们安装在雪人的头上，就能好好利用危险的失败品。要是哪个孩子不走运，在安装的过程中遭遇了苹果馅饼的爆炸事故，其他孩子就会一起出钱，买来零食，来为这个孩子驱散霉运。
- Guardian of the Eternal Oasis ｜ 「永恒绿洲」的守护者
- Go to The Cat's Tail ｜ 前往猫尾酒馆
- No one asked. ｜ 谁问你了？
- It's okay, Huni, don't worry! Why don't you tell us what happened with these baby Saurians, huh? ｜ 小朋友，你先别急，你说的龙宝宝怎么了？
- *cough* I grew up listening to tales of the Yakshas, and some of my seniors used to say that one of them was sealed inside The Chasm and slumbers to this day. ｜ 咳咳…我从小听着夜叉的故事长大，长辈们说，「仙众夜叉」之一就被封在了层岩巨渊之底，沉睡至今…
- Wh—What's wrong, Paimon!? ｜ 怎、怎么了！派蒙！

- People like Chapleau and Foltz are loyal to "Father" and her vision. They're proud to be part of the Fatui. Filliol and Nanteuil on the other hand... Well, they aren't quite as enthusiastic. ｜ 沙普洛、福尔茨他们更拥护和认可「父亲」，以身为愚人众为傲。而在菲约尔、南特伊心里，这种感情要平淡许多。
- Miko is Kokomi's pen pal!? ｜ 原来心海的笔友，竟然是神子吗？！
- Rawr! ｜ 呀！
- Uh... Is something wrong with this card...? ｜ 咦…这张牌好像有点不对劲？
- My life is over. ｜ 我的人生完蛋了。
- Hehe, lemme take that off your hands. ｜ 嘿嘿，我不客气啦。
- Why don't we go see if they need our help? The sooner Wanmin Restaurant is fully stocked, the sooner we get to eat there again! ｜ 要不，我们两个也去看看吧？如果能帮上忙，就可以更早吃到万民堂的料理了！
- Go beside the window ｜ 前往窗边
- Hey there, The Cat's Tail's come up with a new beverage... ｜ 关于猫尾酒馆的风花节新饮品…
- Navia prepared this gift, which contains a Spina di Rosula uniform, for Adele. The dimensions are a bit large for Adele at present, but it works just fine for a promise. ｜ 娜维娅为阿黛尔准备的礼物，装有刺玫会的制服。虽然尺寸对于现在的阿黛尔来说大了不少，但作为承诺的话，正正好好。

- The HP Percentage of all opponents affected by this will change every <color=#ffcc33>{0}</color>s: After changing, all their HP% values will be <color=#ffcc33>the same as the HP% of the affected opponent with the highest current HP%</color>. ｜ 每<color=#ffcc33>{0}</color>秒，场上所有受到此效果影响的敌人的生命值百分比将发生变化：变化后的生命值百分比与上述敌人中<color=#ffcc33>当前生命值百分比最高者</color>相同。
- *sigh* ...If the general was really missing, the Tenryou Commission would have flipped Inazuma on its head by now. And do you think they would only commission us for a case like that? ｜ …要真是那位大将失踪了，还不把稻妻城翻个底朝天，可能会仅仅委托我们吗？
- Sure is lucky that we came over, or it might've had to wait for a while longer, huh? ｜ 还好我们过来了，不然它不知道还要在这里待到什么时候。
- The iron mask the knight used to conceal their identity. Many have speculated about the face behind the mask. ｜ 骑士用来遮掩自己面目的铁面具，关于面具下的容貌几何曾有无数猜想。
- If we don't finish them off and restore the Ley Lines, the threat they pose to Natlan will remain. The battle we fought yesterday, we may one day have to fight again. ｜ 如果不彻底解决它并修复地脉，纳塔人依旧会生活在威胁中，昨日那样的大战说不定会再次上演。
- Ah, yes, that's them, alright! Thank you so much for your help. I'll take care of the rest. ｜ 啊啊，没错，就是这个，真是辛苦你们了，剩下的事情就交给我吧。

- You surmise correctly. ｜ 那是自然。
- Their souls returned to the Night Kingdom long ago, and will have been reborn in Natlan since, albeit in a different form. For all we know, they may have already lived many new lives by now. ｜ 他们的灵魂早已回归夜神之国，以另外的形式重新降生在纳塔，说不定已经度过了好几次新的生命。
- When you've found them, try making some Flaming Essential Oil and show me how it turns out. ｜ 找齐材料之后，你就开始炼制「烈火精油」，然后给我看看成果吧。
- Uh, I prefer... other means of entertainment. ｜ 怎么看我也不是有这种雅兴的人吧…
- The Balemoon Alone May Know ｜ 唯厄月可知晓
- I've been fascinated with the ocean since I was young. I could watch large ships in the harbor for hours on end every day. ｜ 小的时候，我就对大海十分着迷，每天都能盯着港口里的巨舰看上好几个时辰…
- Ah it's you! Thanks for your help previously with the photos! The sights they featured were truly inspiring. ｜ 哎呀，是您啊。多谢您之前帮我留影，那些画片上的景物给了我很大启发。
- "Genius Invokation TCG rules are similar in places to various certification exams. I can handle this."\nHint: Kuki Shinobu's deck not only utilizes a large number of high-cost, high-quality "Food," but also exploits many "HP Change"-related abilities to gain an advantage. ｜ 「七圣召唤的规则和某些证书的考题有相似之处，我应付得来。」\n【提示】久岐忍的牌组不仅擅长通过大量的高费用优质「料理」卡牌来稳住场面，还能频繁触发「生命变化」相关的效果来积累优势。
