- Maybe it's because such a long amount of time has passed. ｜ 是不是因为已经过了很长的时间？
- Save for a few rare and precious tree types, the people of Liyue are accustomed to using broad-reaching collective terms for trees and aren't so fussy about the exact species of tree included. For example, trees with curved trunks are referred to by the more sophisticated-sounding term "Knotwood."\nThe Green Knotwood Tree is not a particularly rare sight. In the hot summer months, you can always find people sitting in its shade to escape the harsh sun. ｜ 除了少有的名贵树木，璃月人更习惯以形貌为树木冠以统称，而不在意特定的树种。对于树干弯曲的树木，璃月有着「盘伏」的雅称。\n青叶盘伏树并不罕见，炎炎夏日中，常有人在它下方避暑乘凉。
- The alchemy shop has opened, but you and Paimon are dizzyingly busy... ｜ 炼金店铺顺利开业，你和派蒙忙得晕头转向…

- When <color=#FFD780FF>Jumpy Dumpty</color> and Normal Attacks deal DMG, Klee has a 50% chance to obtain an Explosive Spark.\nThis Explosive Spark is consumed by the next Charged Attack, which costs no Stamina and deals 50% increased DMG. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>蹦蹦炸弹</color>与普通攻击造成伤害时，有50%的几率赋予可莉一朵爆裂火花。\n施放重击时将消耗爆裂火花，使本次重击不消耗体力，造成的伤害提升50%。

- Exit the cave ｜ 离开洞穴
- Bernhard took the package to the Knights of Favonius headquarters... ｜ 伯恩哈德带着包裹去了一趟骑士团总部…
- Cool... Paimon wonders how everything is going with Koutoku and Yoshihisa. Should we go over and check on them? ｜ 嗯嗯…也不知道幸德和嘉久那边怎么样了。要不要过去看看呢？

- Basically, it'll twinkle, see? ｜ 具体来说就是…闪啊闪，这样子。
- The second row is in the common script, and it goes as follows: ｜ 第二排为通用文字，上书内容如下：
- It's more ordinary than I imagined. ｜ 比想象中要普通一点。
- Not every General Mahamatra would take such a clear-cut and decisive stance when faced with a conflict between order and justice. He must know only too well that compromise is a path that leads to a dead end, so it's extremely fortunate for all of Sumeru that he's now been able to return to his rightful post. ｜ 在面对秩序与正义的冲突之时，不是每一位「大风纪官」都能得出绝对坚定的答案。他应该最清楚，妥协的结果只有无路可退，所以他现在能回到属于他的位置上，对整个须弥而言都是一大幸事。
- Aquatic animals...? Weren't those Pyro Slimes? ｜ 水生动物…？不是火史莱姆吗？
- Yes, Onodera had someone from the family make it over the last few days. I heard it was based on suggestions that the spectators had written on the ballots. ｜ 嗯，这是小野寺先生他们在这几天里找人赶制出来的，听说是根据观众们写在投票上的建议加上的。
- [Check Failure] Combat power remains unchanged... ｜ [检定失败]战斗能力不变…
- #{NICKNAME}'s right, some things just can't be done by yourself. There's no shame in getting some help from others. ｜ #{NICKNAME}说得对，有些事如果自己一个实在办不到，找其他人帮忙一点也不丢脸。
- "Cassiodor" ｜ 「卡西奥多」
- (A man in the desert...) ｜ （沙漠中的男子…）
- You're quite an optimist, aren't you? But I heard that many people have chosen to go to Third-Round Knockout instead of our tea house lately. ｜ 您还以为我们高枕无忧呢？我可听说最近大家都爱去三碗不过港，不爱上我们这儿来。
- Complete "A Long Shot" ｜ 完成任务「为了青色的身影」
- What's happening to me? Someone else beat me... and in a stupid card game, too... Grr! ｜ 我…我居然会在…卡牌游戏上输给别人…可恶！
- Log in ｜ 进入游戏
- You are... ｜ 你是…
- Hm, the stuff by the door is in pretty good condition, though. It can't have been too long ago that someone was last living here... ｜ 门边的其他杂物倒是很干净，似乎不久前还有人住在这里…
- Greenwave Sunfish ｜ 青浪翻车鲀
- All we need to do is exchange this bamboo slip with Miss Gendou for that "strip of paper," right? ｜ 把这根竹签给玄冬小姐换成「纸片儿」就行了对吧。
- Hmm... I should write a letter to Yousuke regarding this matter. ｜ 唔，还是找个时间再给阳介写封信吧…
- But soon, everything will be taken care of, and I can report back on a successful mission. Thank you, Zhiyi! ｜ 这次事情办完，我终于可以顺利交差了。多亏了你啊，知易。
- ...Hey, come closer. Best not to let anyone eavesdrop on critical information. ｜ …喂，再凑过来一点呀。重要的情报可别给外人偷听了去。
- Thank you both. Let us offer them up. ｜ 辛苦二位了，我们试着依次供奉上去吧。
- But there's nothing we can work with... ｜ 可像这样，一点头绪都没有…
- Hearing that Beidou has come to their village, Pops Xing asks her to help mediate in a disagreement. It seems that everyone here thinks very highly of her. Go see what's going on... ｜ 听闻北斗来到庄里，庄民兴叔特意前来请求北斗主持公道，看来她的庄里声望很高，一起去看看是怎么回事吧…
- Nice idea, I think we can all commit to writing a note. We'll see what we can come up with. ｜ 有意思，大家都写吧，想到什么就寄过去。
- Please take care of Anna, Traveler. Her excitement might have gotten to her head lately... ｜ 旅行者，还请你多照顾一下安娜，这孩子最近好像兴奋过头了…
- Characters must consume {SPRITE_PRESET#1110}Energy to use their Elemental Bursts.\nWhen characters use an Elemental Skill or a Normal Attack, they will gain 1 {SPRITE_PRESET#1110}Energy. ｜ 角色使用「元素爆发」时，需要消耗{SPRITE_PRESET#1110}充能。\n角色使用「元素战技」或「普通攻击」后，会获得1点{SPRITE_PRESET#1110}充能。
- Herein lies the abode of Cloud Retainer. The adeptus desires not to see guests, and the way is shut. A lack of care for where one lays their head is common among all who live. Do you truly wish to enter? ｜ 留云借风真君所造的洞天，因真君不喜见人，常年封闭。不喜打理卧室也是人之常情，你真的要进去吗？
- A small desktop clock, whose former owner was a scholar sat in a windowless room buried in books. This was probably the only reference they had to the time of day. ｜ 适合放在桌面上的小钟，对久不见天日的学者来说是唯一的时间参考吧。
- Joining Party: II ｜ 加入队伍·其二
- Precisely. It's all thanks to you that I made the connection now. Back then, we all just thought they were some costumes that Jacques used to disguise himself at the banquet. ｜ 对啊，多亏你的提示。那时候我们以为衣服只是雅克不希望被注意到，用来乔装打扮的道具。
- Everyone has self-interest, but you cannot let it be your master. So don't fight over fleeting gains and losses. Rather, focus on the direction your heart is leading you, and keep moving forward. ｜ 每个人都有欲望，但不可被欲望掌控。不必计较暂时的得失，向着内心所想的方向前进就好。
- Hulwani ｜ 哈尔瓦尼
- I'm just passing by. ｜ 我只是路过。
- Hungry... ｜ 饿了。
- It seems like they are still launching the operation, or rather, are still conducting preliminary tests... ｜ 目前似乎还在启动阶段，或者说，还在进行最初的试验…
- Hehe. Don't forget to invite us to try whatever new toy you come up with! ｜ 嘿嘿，如果到时候做出来新玩具，记得找我们试玩哦！
- So this is the "Windblume" created by following this ancient recipe. ｜ 这就是按古代配方炼制的所谓「风之花」。
- Well, Lady Ningguang, the Tianquan of the Liyue Qixing, has invited me to visit her again at Yujing Terrace to discuss a long-term collaboration plan. ｜ 「天权星」凝光小姐，邀请我之后去玉京台，详细探讨长期计划。

- He fought to the end for all those souls and challenged the rules of the world in the process. ｜ 为了一群逝去的灵魂，战斗到最后，甚至撼动了世界的法则。

- Citlali's taking care of things over there... Let's head to their next base! ｜ 那边就交给茜特菈莉了…我们去下一个营地吧！

- Take me there. Rhodeia is uneasy. Rhodeia... makes water bitter. Endora will learn to speak. Explain to her. ｜ 带我去。那边那边。洛蒂娅很不安。洛蒂娅把水变苦了。嫣朵拉学习说话，和洛蒂娅说清楚。

- Word has it that samurai in the commission place great importance on reputation and prestige... Though, I'm sure commission members won't blame you once word gets out... ｜ 我听说奉行武士都很看重声誉和名望，哪怕奉行府的人不会怪罪你，传出去的话…

- I'm sorry... ｜ 抱歉…
- Have you ascertained the numbers? ｜ 你们确认好了吗？

- It's just like the book says... "Under the influence of the Jinn, though the land was as a barren desert, it would grow into a verdant oasis..." ｜ 和书上说的一模一样呢…「在镇灵的影响下，其身周即使再贫瘠的沙漠也会转化成绿洲…」

- If only I could be so incandescently artful, I... No, nothing, please, pay it no mind! ｜ 唉，要是我也能写出那样优美的剧本，说不定…不，没什么，请不要在意！
- It's easy to fix a machine when you know how it's built and how it works. But people... they're much more difficult. ｜ 熟悉机械装置的构造与原理，就能够排查故障…但要熟悉一个人却难得多。
- I heard that Liyue's Archon, Rex Lapis, was skilled at the forging of weapons. Previously, I was curious about what the blades made in Liyue were like. ｜ 听说璃月的神明，岩王帝君本人就是锻造武器的高手，我也曾十分好奇璃月的刀剑究竟是什么样子。
- That's true. Makes you wonder, doesn't it — why would you sometimes use "wealth" as part of will-wishes, and sometimes as an invective...? ｜ 是啊，你说为什么有的时候富贵是吉祥话，而有些时候是在骂人呢…

- Observe ｜ 观察
- *cough* According to my estimations, this should be the opening through which the Ley Lines are overflowing. ｜ 咳咳…经过我的测算，这里确实就是地脉不断向外涌出的喷口。
- Talk about the land of Geo, nation of contracts. ｜ 讲述契约的岩之国。
- He's on the run! ｜ 他已经走远了！
- We don't really need this, do we? ｜ 我们应该不需要这个吧？
- That bell has a sad history. Clearly, she refrained from sharing with you the truth of its origins, since the right time had not yet come. ｜ 这铃铛里有伤心往事。而且，一定是时机不对，她才故意那么告诉你们。
- Well, it's only just started after all. It'd be a bit of a crazy tournament if everyone in the qualifiers was a prize fighter! ｜ 现在只是开始嘛，如果预赛的对手就超能打，这场比赛未免就太难了！
- Alright. Well, I've still got a lot of preparations to make, so I'll be heading back to the funeral parlor now. ｜ 那大家，我有不少事情还要准备，就先回往生堂啦。

- Of course! Don't underestimate me. ｜ 当然，小看我？
- Look, it's the wheelchair! So the hilichurls took it! ｜ 你看，是那个轮椅，居然被丘丘人捡走了！

- Rev the engines! ｜ 要加速了。
- Huh. Now that you mention it, there really aren't any! Paimon thought that was weird right from the get-go, too. ｜ 哦！说起来的确是这样…一开始我会觉得奇怪也是因为这个！一点鱼的影子都看不到呢。
- So... what's the deal with this place...? ｜ 这里…都是些什么啊…
- Have you already forgotten the time we spent here? ｜ 你已经忘记了我们曾经在这里的时间了吗？
- How about I answer article 1 and you answer article 2? One of us has gotta be right, so at least we won't get punished as hard... ｜ 那要不然，我答第一条，你俩答第二条？这样总有人能蒙对，就可以少吃一遍处罚…
- There are many Pari here. The best among them is one called Zurvan. ｜ 在这里有很多花灵，其中最了不起的那一个叫祖尔宛。
- Hiding the truth does not necessarily equate to lying. Again, these people have their reasons. ｜ 隐瞒未必是骗，这些人也有自己的立场。
- Hmm, you two certainly look like you get on well. ｜ 嗯哼，你们看上去关系很好的样子嘛。
- Have you seen him recently? ｜ 你最近有见过他？

- Really? ｜ 你真要带他们…

- Anis, Kshahrewar's representative, should be staying in the inn at Port Ormos. If you want more details, you can find her there. ｜ 妙论派的负责人阿尼斯，现在应该在奥摩斯港的旅馆小住，如果想了解详情，可以到那附近找她。
- Of course. Good to meet you, you may call me Maymunah. For the sake of time, we should forego the usual pleasantries. Please, follow me. ｜ 嗯，两位好，叫我迈蒙就行。那我就不多做寒暄了，请各位移步。
- Find your companions in the cave ｜ (test)在洞窟中寻找同伴
- A tavern close to the liveliest street of Sumeru City, "Treasures Street." Its owner, Lambad, claims to be a legendary sailor who used to sail far and wide. It is rather difficult to tell how exaggerated that claim is, but judging from the food sold in the tavern, at least the part about cuisines seems credible. ｜ 紧靠须弥城最热闹的街区「宝商街」的酒馆。老板兰巴德自称曾是远航诸国的传奇水手。虽然不知道这番吹嘘中究竟有几分真假，不过从酒馆里出售的各色风味的美食来看，至少关于料理的部分还是可以相信的！
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Yeah, you're right... They'll have some value as souvenirs, at least. ｜ 这倒是没错，还算有点纪念价值。
- As to who he is... Haha, if I told you that, I might go hungry. So please try to understand. ｜ 至于他是谁…嗯，抱歉，这个我可不能说，不然说不定我就要饿肚子啦，你就稍微理解一下吧。
- So please, help me gather a batch of Dandelion Seeds. ｜ 拜托你，帮我搜集一份蒲公英籽回来吧。
- You're the one behind the robbery and the missing people, aren't you? ｜ 抢劫和掳掠事件，都是你做的吧？
- ...I've also had a time like that in my life, so I understand what she's going through. It may be best to give her some space. ｜ …我也有过那样的时期，很理解她。虽不知道她在苦恼什么，但现在她需要独处。
- Ugh, this is getting crazier and crazier! What kind of person would do all this just to poison Jialiang? ｜ 居然会有这种事情？这、这到底是谁下的毒啊！
- III ｜ Ⅲ

- Go to Schulz's Blacksmith... ｜ 去舒茨铁铺吧…
- ...So, that thing was more than just a legend, huh? It really exists... ｜ …所以，那东西不只是个传说，是真实存在的咯？
- You're a good kid. ｜ 好孩子！
- Thundering Heavens Drum ｜ 震晓云天鼓
- Goodbye! ｜ 再见啦！
- Although I never met any Dahri aside from that swordsman, any who face the beasts of corruption stands as our ally. ｜ 虽然我没有见过除那位剑士之外的荼诃人，但曾与漆黑的魔物作战之人皆可谓是我们的战友。
- Do you know why I let you in even after I recognized you? Well, it's a trap! ｜ 你以为我为什么认出你了还要放你进来！当然是故意的！
- Chill, Mr. Kamei. This is the Akademiya. The Corps of Thirty is right down there. ｜ 大叔，冷静一点，这里可是教令院，下面就是三十人团啊…
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Collei, could I ask you to stand up for a second? ｜ 柯莱，能麻烦你站起来吗？
- Observe Pot ｜ 观察锅
- Idyia ｜ 伊迪娅
- They meant to apologize, and introduce me to some big names in the Akademiya as the inspirations for my book, including Cyno, and Tighnari... ｜ 他们说为了致歉，还会帮我介绍几个教令院里的名人作为我取材的对象，比如那位赛诺先生，还有提纳里先生…
- Ms. Paimon, how do you not recognize him? That's Cater... ｜ 派蒙姐姐，你怎么不认识卡特哥哥了，他就是卡特哥哥啊…
- Lady Hiiragi, stay close. ｜ 千里小姐，请待在我身边。
- Yep, sure are! We were just looking into the case... ｜ 啊，没错没错，我们正在调查失踪者的事…
- I had no idea that I'd find so many people willing to help me on such short notice. Thank you... Thank you all, from the bottom of my heart. ｜ 但没想到，出现了这么多愿意帮我的人，我真的…真的太谢谢你们了。
- Shall I take you to Bubu Pharmacy? ｜ 要送你去不卜庐吗？
- Oh, really? Good to hear. ｜ 是吗？谢谢。
- If it's only a few games... by all means. ｜ 闲来几局…无甚大碍。
- Unless... that's something you two get up to? ｜ 难道…这是你的兴趣？
- Oh, don't worry about it. It's nothing of particular note... ｜ 啊，不用在意。是没什么意义的东西。
- Wow! I haven't had any faunal contact in ages! ｜ 哇！好久没有动物跟我搭话了！

- Talk to Cazcal ｜ 与卡兹加对话
- Cursor Sensitivity ｜ 光标灵敏度
- It shouldn't be too hard to find them when you're out and about. Gathering raw materials is a major part of the alchemist's work, you'll just have to get used to it. ｜ 这两种材料在野外应该还算常见，搜集原料也是炼金术师的重要工作之一，你就好好努力吧。
- Paimon doesn't really have much capacity for betrayal. ｜ 派蒙也没什么能背叛的…
- I believe in you! I'll be cheering you on the whole time! ｜ 我相信你！我会在这里给你加油的！
- No way! ｜ 才不要！
- Ooshima Junpei ｜ 大岛纯平
- Therefore, we still need to keep putting on a show so that our thief will let his guard down. ｜ 所以，我们还需要继续做样子给那个盗贼看，让他放松警惕。
- Lionsblood ｜ 「狮之血」
- Shells don't fly in a straight line but arcs. Gunners must raise the cannon to hit faraway targets... ｜ 炮弹飞出去的轨迹不是一条直线，打击远处的目标时，炮手们也需要抬高炮口…

- Eula arrives not a moment too soon, with two fellow knights in tow. ｜ 此时，优菈带着两名骑士赶到…
- Why would there be a Xiao Lantern here? Did someone come here to pay their respects to the deceased adeptus? ｜ 这里怎么会有霄灯？难道有人来这里拜祭那位仙人了吗？
- The Treasure Map that Beidou has acquired is hard to read indeed, but you give your opinion anyway. Now it's off to Guili Plains to help Beidou look for the treasure... ｜ 北斗得到的藏宝图难以辨识，但你依然给出了自己的看法，前往归离原，协助北斗找到宝藏…
- Lost notes left in the desert. They seem to have been left by some adventurer. ｜ 遗失在沙漠中的字条，似乎是某位冒险家留下的。
- Thank you for the offer, Mr. Xavier, but I've made some plans to go on a journey to the other nations once the festival is over... ｜ 谢谢您的邀请，不过，这部映影结束之后，我可能会去其他国家旅行…
- Skill, strategy, fortune, form... Many factors influence strength, but victory never lies. ｜ 实力、状态、运气、策略…决定强弱的因素有很多，但胜负不会说谎。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Rock-Cavernous Wayob Manifestation ｜ 窟岩·大灵显化身
- After defeating the monster that made the apex of Amakumo Peak its home, you discovered this strange feather.\nIt fell from the Thunderbird that once inhabited Tsurumi Island, and is the original form of the Maushiro.\nIt may have some special properties on Tsurumi Island. ｜ 击败踞身天云峠顶端的魔物后，发现的奇异鸟羽。\n是曾经栖息在鹤观的「雷鸟」的翎羽，也即是「木簧笛」的原型。\n在鹤观的土地上，似乎能发挥神奇的作用。
- A feather of dreams that soars free like an eagle. At the end of the gladiator's legendary life, this parting gift was left upon his chest by a bird that knew true freedom. ｜ 如隼般自在的梦想之羽。在传奇生涯的终点，无羁的飞鸟在他的心口覆上了这根羽毛。
- They do look a bit old, but when I went to have them appraised, we found out that these things are in fact a bit "ancient"... and valuable, too. ｜ 虽然看起来有点旧了，但我拿回去给人看了之后，发现这些东西居然还颇有些年头，而且也能卖一点钱。
- Talk to Kaveh and Alhaitham ｜ 与卡维和艾尔海森聊天
- I'm sorry, Granny... I feel so guilty... ｜ 我…心虚。奶奶对不起。
- I've heard that the Communications Office is planning on building several small lifts... That will improve the situation, no doubt about it. ｜ 听说和记厅有新建几座小型升降机的计划…到时候，情况应该会好转！
- Complete "The Jade Chamber's Returning Guest" and unlock all endings. ｜ 完成「玉阁归客至」，解锁全部结局。
- Not a chance. Even if their heir was someone who showed promise, their past mistakes cannot be erased. ｜ 那还是不行，就算是这位继承者有闪光点，也不能抹平之前所犯下的过错。
- To witness such history with one's own eyes, and then record all of it in a true, complete, and clear manner for posterity — that is what a historian should do. ｜ 亲眼见证这样的历史，然后真实、完整、清晰地将这一切记录成册，留给后人，就是历史学者所要做的事情。
- And there's Butter Chicken too! Its sumptuous oil just conjures up the image of a full wallet. ｜ 还有黄油鸡，丰盛的油水让人不禁就联想到丰盛的荷包。
- Look for Jueyun Chili and Slime Condensate ｜ 寻找绝云椒椒与史莱姆凝液
- I know. You're the same as ever... ｜ 我知道。你还是和以前一样…
- Lady Ningguang likes to stay informed. Nothing slips through her intelligence network. ｜ 凝光大人手眼通天。没有什么事能钻出她手下的情报网。
- Use <color=#FFCC33FF>Charged Attacks</color> to launch the Anemo Slimes ｜ 利用<color=#FFCC33FF>重击</color>将风史莱姆击飞
- Good night, Chevreuse! ｜ 晚安，夏沃蕾。
- Forget it. I don't feel like talking about it. ｜ 啧…算了，我也不想多提这个话题。
- Later, a great war broke out, in which the heavens capsized and the earth was ripped asunder. This land was then plunged into the dark ocean depths. ｜ 后来发生了一场大战，天也倾覆，地也崩裂。这片土地在那时落下了漆黑的海渊。
- That's exactly what makes this place creepy... ｜ 就是因为这样才吓人呀…
- Add a little salt... and some pepper. ｜ 放点盐…胡椒也来一点。
- Shh...! Come on now, these... less than legal dealings need not be spoken of so loudly. ｜ 小声点…！没按规矩办事，就别声张了…

- Jazari ｜ 加扎里
- These popsicles really are delicious... I bet that kid we met earlier would be thrilled to taste this flavor. ｜ 不过，这种冰棍的味道真好，要是之前的孩子能吃到这种口味，肯定会更开心吧？
- ...I'm sorry, Miss Navia. ｜ …对不起，娜维娅小姐。
- What are you trying to do? ｜ 你们在试什么？
- C'mon, I told you already... That treasure hunt of his works like this: the <color=#00E1FFFF>better the goods, the more explosive barrels there will be around it, and vice versa.</color> ｜ 我都说了，他那个挖宝，<color=#00E1FFFF>越是好东西，周围炸药桶就越多。东西越差，周围就越安全。</color>
- And you are... ｜ 你是…
- Oh! ｜ 哦！
- However, that doesn't mean that the true culprit never visited him at his home, or never purchased a Rainbow Rose from his garden. ｜ 但，这不代表犯人没有到过他的家中，或是他没有向犯人出售过自己种的蔷薇。
- He's a good dog, he wouldn't bite anyone! ｜ 它是条好狗，真的不咬人的！
- But seeing fresh recruits join our ranks and hearing Teppei's exploits... I'm itching to get myself better as soon as possible, so I can get back out on the front line. ｜ 现在来看不管是新人还是哲平都比预想中可靠，我也得快点恢复好，重新回前线战斗才行。

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Don't blame yourself, old chap. In fact, you know what? I was also conned today. Yeah, me, of all people. Does that make you feel better? ｜ 一斗老兄，你也不要太自怨自艾了。这样说吧，就算是我，今天也被别人骗到了哦，这样你会不会好受点。
- Oh? What a quiet and tranquil spot, and it's modeled after a human village... ｜ 哦？仿效人间村落，打造出如此幽静的地方…
- What, can't fall asleep with me around? Hehe. ｜ 在我身边睡不着吗？呵呵。

- Roussimoff and Champvallon leave... ｜ 罗西莫夫和尚帕隆离开了…
- I thought that if I could achieve Isshin harmony with you, perhaps there would still be a ray of hope for me. ｜ 那时候我就在想，如果能借由你达成「一心」，那我就还有机会。
- Strange... Must be something unique to Natlan. ｜ 好吧，真是奇怪，难道这也是纳塔特殊的风土人情之一吗？
- I was doing work underwater, just like I usually do. I submerged, dodged the waterweeds, avoided the trash, and managed to not get cut or pierced by anything. ｜ 我刚刚和往常一样下水干活。下潜了之后，我避过了水草，躲过了垃圾，也没被什么东西划伤或者刺中。

- Of course. Guizhong and one both put an immense amount of effort into that gift. It would be no overstatement to call it a testament to each of our individual technical genius... ｜ 记得啊，当时本仙和归终做得可费心了，说它凝结了我俩的技术精髓都不为过…

- A jade from Chenyu Vale named for its cool, refreshing touch, being akin to cool water.\nAncestral legends have it that the jade scattered among the rocks came from the azure heavens. The envoys, before they became silent, bestowed these beauteous gems upon the early residents and guided them to build an altar that reached the heavens, that they may receive the blessings and curses from above. Later on, many tribes that descended from these ancestors kept this primordial, simple faith, and their reverence for jade was merged into Liyue tradition, shaping the culture we see today. ｜ 出产于沉玉谷的玉石。触感凉如清水，因此而得名。\n在先民的古老传说中，散落岩间的玉石来自碧色的高天。彼时尚未陷入缄默的使者将温润如月的美玉赐予先民，指引他们筑起通天的祭台，聆听示下的幸福与灾祸。其后，由先民退化而来的诸多部落依然保持了原始而朴素的信仰，对「玉」这一意象的尊崇也与璃月的传统合流，构成了今日文化的样貌。
- Don't worry. Let's go try another spot. ｜ 别紧张，我们换个地方试试看。

Board your Waverider and wipe out any Treasure Hoarder interference to your salvaging operations! ｜ 群玉阁的藏品零星散落在璃月港以东的海面上，附近的盗宝团已闻风而动。尽快驾驭「浪船」，排除盗宝团的干扰，夺回群玉阁的藏品吧！
- After the rumor of the Goldchime Stone sparked an amateur mining craze, other similar-looking stones began drawing a lot of attention. This one, for instance, is a small stone chunk that many believed contained "golden Primogems" earning it the name "Goldbud." ｜ 由于金声石的传闻引发了一阵掘石的热潮，与其质地相似的岩石也颇受关注。比如这种相对较小的石块，就被认为含有「黄金的原石」，因而被称为「金芽石」。

- #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> If one hilichurl could beat, say, three wild boars...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Then how many hilichurls would it take to reach the fighting prowess of Master Jean and Master Diluc?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Not sure... but if you heard the way everyone talks in Mondstadt, you'd know that Master Jean is the strongest.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Uhh... I'd say that if Diluc strikes first, Master Jean wouldn't be able to counter.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Oh, she'd find a way.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> There's no way.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Master Jean's Elemental Burst is really strong, you know~\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Yes, but that "field" would also make Diluc stronger.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Paimon doesn't think Master Jean would even need her Vision to take on Master Diluc, because—\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Diluc would only need a beginner's greatsword to—\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Argh...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Ugh...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> *sigh* ...This is so dumb.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> They both fight for Mondstadt, so they wouldn't come to blows.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> That's why Paimon likes your idea of measuring their fighting strength in number of hilichurls.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> ...Or in Paimon's case, in fifths of a wild boar. ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>如果说一个丘丘人，能打三头野猪的话…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>琴团长和迪卢克老爷，分别有几丘丘战斗力呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>如果在蒙德城里体会过大家的统一口径，就应该知道，最厉害的是琴团长。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>我觉得迪卢克先出手的话，琴团长应该没办法化解。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>琴团长一定有办法的。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>肯定无解。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>琴团长的元素爆发是很强的。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>但那个「领域」，反过来会增强迪卢克。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>琴团长对付迪卢克老爷都不用「神之眼」。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>迪卢克只用「新手大剑」就…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>唉…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>唔…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>我们好无聊啊。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>他们都是为了蒙德而战的，不可能会打起来的。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>所以我觉得需要用丘丘人当战斗力单位啊。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>顺带一提，派蒙大概五分之一野猪哦。

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>So there's this place in Fontaine called the Fortress of Meropide. Was it named after someone called Meropide?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>I've never heard anything about that, but you could be right.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Paimon's kinda envious. Having a building named after you must be an amazing feeling... When you have the time, can you build something in your Serenitea Pot and name it "the Fortress of Paimon"?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Sure. In fact, I can do one better — I'll build it in downtown Fontaine.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Really? But surely that'd be way too expensive. Are you sure you can afford it?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Oh, absolutely. It won't actually cost that much.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Wow, you're so generous! So, what're you gonna build...?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>I was thinking a cozy little clay... bungalow, with a wood-burner for under-floor heating, a waterbed... a few chopped onions, salt and pepper, some greens... and, um...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Hey! Ugh, you are unbelievable! Can't we get through one nation without you cracking this stupid joke!? ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>听说枫丹有个地方叫作梅洛彼得堡，是不是为了纪念一个叫做梅洛彼得的人修建的？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>我倒没听说过欸，感觉挺有可能的。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>真羡慕啊，拥有一座跟自己名字一样的堡垒。等你有空了，帮我在尘歌壶里弄一个好不好？我也想要一个派蒙堡。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那都用不着尘歌壶，跟我去一趟枫丹廷就好了。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>难道要在枫丹廷买地建房子吗？那要花好多摩拉吧？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>花不了多少。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>呜哇，你现在都对我这么大方啦？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>因为只需要买些面包，再买些菜叶，再买些沙拉酱汁…然后…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>喂！不是那种可以吃的派蒙堡！这个桥段你真的要玩遍七国嘛！
- Oh, you do? Wait, Chiori, how do you know the captain of the Special Patrol's Musketeers? ｜ 咦？千织怎么会认识铳枪队队长的？
- Usage(s) ｜ 可用次数
- That way, nobody knows what the actual secrets that need protecting are. Not even them! ｜ 这样，就没人知道到底哪一份才是真正需要保守的秘密了。就连他们自己也不知道。
- Precisely. ｜ 没错。
- #Why don't you take the Lumenstone Adjuvant and have a look, {NICKNAME}? ｜ #{NICKNAME}也快把流明石「触媒」拿出来看看吧？
- My sister is that girl over there, the one who is always trying to catch her shadow... even though you can't catch your shadow. I don't get why she likes to do that... ｜ 那边的小女孩就是我的妹妹，她总是在追自己的影子，明明是不可能抓得到的，不知道她在想什么…
- Vaguely-Readable Inscription ｜ 依稀可以辨认的铭文

- (...Could he be part of the same troupe as those thieves from before?) ｜ （…他该不会也和之前那些小贼是一伙的吧？）
- Anyway, let's head to the artificial springs. If Auntie Atea gets there before us, we're gonna be in some real hot water. ｜ 好了，这个话题到此为止。我带你们去人工温泉吧，免得等下阿伽娅阿姨先到，她找不到我们会生气的。
- Hey, hey! What are you two talking about? ｜ 啊？你在胡说八道什么！
- Slightly Damaged Wooden Plank ｜ 有些残破的木板
- Madam Faruzan possesses an extensive wealth of knowledge. I often invite her to inspect the mechanisms in the rainforest. The next time she's in Gandharva Ville... *sigh* I hope she doesn't sneak Collei more food. Nutrition is like medicine: moderation is key. ｜ 珐露珊前辈见识广博，我经常邀请她来检查雨林里的机关…只是希望下次她来化城郭的时候，不要再给柯莱偷偷塞吃的了——营养就跟药剂一样得均衡适量，过剩了可没好处。
- "Hello! Hello!" ｜ 「你好！你好！」

- I'm usually not so quick to place my trust in others, but it seems I will no longer be able to make such claims. You've done splendidly. If only I had more like you... No, perhaps... you alone are enough. ｜ 我并不轻易肯定别人，但现在看来，我这赞扬是留不住了。呵…你做得很出色。要是我的手下能多一点像你这样的人…不，或许，有你一个就够了。

- It looks the same in every direction... ｜ 上下左右看起来都差不多…

- It sounds pretty far-fetched... But on the offchance he really does send meka into the ring, what are you gonna do? ｜ 我是觉得不太可能啦…不过万一是真的，你们…

- It flattened a great many homes and even mashed that mountain... Now, our venturers can no longer repair their boats or make tools there, and have had to change from whence they embark on their adventures... ｜ 它踩坏了很多屋子，还撞坏了那座山…害得冒险客们没法在那座山里维修小船和制作工具了，只能换一个地方做远游的出发地…

- But still... I... I will go. ｜ 我、我去看看…
- This place is pretty safe, you know... ｜ 这里应该还算安全…
- Meat is meat, no matter how small the portion. ｜ 苍蝇再小也是肉。

- W—Would you really? That would be amazing! ｜ 是、是吗？！你愿意帮忙的话那就太好了！
- Sliced baguette. Taken freshly out of the oven, the bread has a crispy, crackling crust, and soft, fluffy crumb. The aroma of butter and garlic further adds to the baguette's tastiness! No wonder you often see Fontainians buying a baguette on their way home after work. ｜ 长条面包的切片。刚出炉的时候，外皮酥脆，里内松软，搭配上黄油和蒜的香气，着实美妙！难怪枫丹人下班的时候都喜欢买上一份。
- Now I spy, with my little eye... A grandmother missing her grandchildren. She cannot put them down, no she cannot, and she cannot board the boat! ｜ 呵呵…我看到了…一个老奶奶正惦记小孙孙呢，不放下心哟，上不了船唉…
- True, you make a good point. I've got to become a more reliable person! ｜ 嗯，您说得对，今后我得变得更可靠才行！
- Mm... ｜ 呶…
- Is that not a good bargain, exchanging it for the one at the core of the plan? ｜ 所以，用它换回「计划」的核心人物，不是一件非常划算的买卖吗？
- "As heroes of Sumeru, please be sure to attend. I'll wait for you." The date of the banquet is written on the back... It's in two days. ｜ 「请身为英雄的你们务必出席，我等你们。」后面还写了个宴会日期…是两天后。
- Whoa! You must really love this ship, huh? You just can't stop talking about her once you start. ｜ 哇，看起来艾伊丝真的很喜欢这艘船呢…一聊起来就滔滔不绝的。

- We've been together since I can remember. Nothing in this world is more important to me than you... So long as you're well, we can be at home anywhere... ｜ 自打记事起我就和老爹两人相依为命，这世上再没有比老爹更重要的了…只要老爹好好的，哪里都可以是家…
- Melusines have different bodies than human beings, so it's hard to find clothes that fit. Even for me — I never know what to do with my tail when I'm trying on human clothes... But luckily, Chiori offers a Melusine tailoring service, so now all my Melusine friends have the chance to wear the pretty clothes they love. ｜ 美露莘的身体跟人类不同，很难买到合适的衣服。就算是我，试穿人类的童装时也会烦恼尾巴应该怎么摆放…不过好在千织小姐推出了针对美露莘的定制服务，现在所有美露莘朋友都有机会穿上喜欢的漂亮衣服啦。
- That works for me. I can barely respect someone who jumps at every shadow she sees, either. ｜ 哼，我也很难对一个疑心病患者保持尊重。
- Alright, alright, I'm sorry... ｜ 好好好，我错了，我错了…
- I want to go home... ｜ 好想回家。

- Ehh, I could churn out that kind of soft news piece in five minutes if I had to. Personally... I'm more interested in those two. ｜ 哎呀，这种比赛报道我闭着眼睛都能写出来，比起这个，你们看那边的两个人。

- Dropped by <color=#FF5E41FF>the Fatui, hilichurls</color>, and <color=#FF5E41FF>Abyss Mages</color>. Can also be harvested from plants.\nCommon fibrous material that can be processed into lantern wrappings so that the lanterns can float away with their beautiful wishes.\nFound in Liyue. ｜ 从<color=#FF5E41FF>愚人众、丘丘人</color>与<color=#FF5E41FF>深渊法师</color>等敌人处获取，也有可能从植物中采集得到。\n随处可见的纤维素。特殊处理后，可以制成霄灯的灯皮，让它承载着良善的愿望飘向远方。\n可在璃月寻找

- A crystal-clear snack. The transparent skin wraps the yellow filling. It is said that some vendors will put these snacks into a small clay bowl and immerse it in water to ensure that the cool mouthfeel is retained. This dish is as transparent as water, but it will not be washed away by flowing water — this is probably the origin of the name. ｜ 晶莹剔透的点心。透明的外皮包裹着黄澄澄的内馅。据说有的商贩会将其置于小陶碗，再浸入水中，以保证清凉的口感。透明似水，却又不会被流水冲走，大概就是它名字的来由吧。

- Decimating Rockfall ｜ 山崩毁阵
- This steelyard balance was a gift from my father. It weighs objects to determine their value. I usually use Mora for the weight, but it can only give the original price. For example, a thousand years ago, Liyue was covered in Glaze Lilies, and they weren't worth anything in monetary terms. Then, when they suddenly declined in number, the price shot up in response, but the value shown by this steelyard wasn't updated. It still shows them as their original value... in other words, dirt cheap.\nSo, most of the time, this isn't a very useful tool for work purposes... Hmm? You want to try weighing something? How about... We could weigh your little friend here, will that do? ｜ 这杆秤是老爹交给我的宝贝，能衡量出事物的「价值」。通常我会用摩拉当砝码，不过，它只能称量事物最初的价格。举例来说，千年前，璃月遍地都是琉璃百合，这种花在当时并不值钱。后来它数量骤减，售价也水涨船高，这杆秤显示的「价值」却没有更新，还是和之前一样的「便宜」。\n所以，在大部分情况下，这杆秤也不能作为我工作的帮助啦…怎么？你有什么想要称量的东西吗？比如…称量一下你身边的那个小家伙，怎么样？

- A good companion who can fight.\nOut of respect for you, he has taken the initiative to become your guard dog.\nAlthough he did cause trouble for the villagers of Inazuma before, he is now loyal to you.\nHaving been trained for a long time, he seems to have a mind of his own at times, and he also understands human language. He responds to "Kageroumaru," "Black Shadow," "Hat Dog," "Blade Pup," or "Hat Blade Pup." ｜ 战斗能力不可小觑的好伙伴。\n出于对你的认可，主动成为了你的忍犬。\n虽然之前给稻妻村民添了麻烦，但是现在对你忠心耿耿。\n曾经接受过长时间的训练，似乎有自己独立的思考方式，也能听懂人言，用「影狼丸」、「黑影」、「帽子狗」、「刀子狗」、「帽子刀子狗子」中任意一个称呼喊它，都会有反应哦！

- The child and adeptus before you listen to your words (and Paimon's incessant interjections), leaning forward as you speak, exclaiming in shock and relaxing as the tension in the tale rises and falls.\nThey also add their own commentary and questions about Liyue (such as the food and flavors available at restaurants, the toys the old lady sells, the gems and jewelry of Feiyun Slope, and such.) ｜ 眼前的孩子与仙人一同，随着你的叙述（与派蒙不时的补充），身体渐渐前倾，又随着故事中情节而发出细小的惊叫声与神经放松的叹息。\n他们不时在语句间加入自己的评论与关于璃月港的问题（比如各食肆的菜品与口味、老婆婆卖的玩具种类、绯云坡的珠宝等）。

- I didn't quite get what was going on, but Mr. Chesil said that those stones will turn into the hearts of those clocks... ｜ 虽然芙佳也不是很明白，但切瑟尔先生说，那些石头变成了漂亮钟表的心…

Though the words on the slate do not reveal much of their author's preferences, one can tell that he did predict the ignominious fate of these ruins.\nAs such, he endeavored to help those who came after wipe away the marks of time's passing and return to ancient times, thus telling such people of his era's glories and hopes. ｜ 不知谁人留下的石板引导前行的道路。虽然石板上浮现的字样并未流露出过分的好恶，但是可以看出，他预感到了遗迹被黄沙埋没的终局。\n所以他想帮后世之人拂去时间留下的痕迹，重回旧日，好得知他那个时代的风，载着怎样的自豪与期许。

- The Wintry Primo Geovishap has absorbed the power of <color=#FF5E42FF>Cryo</color>... ｜ 「古岩龙蜥·溟冬」汲取了<color=#FF5E42FF>冰元素</color>的力量…
- Alright! I'll give the medicine another go... I'll finish it all for sure this time! ｜ 好！我要再试一次…这一次要一口气把药吃掉！
- Who's Hibiki? ｜ 阿响是谁？
- Forest Fairy ｜ 森林仙子

- ... ｜ ……
- Come on, let's go bask in the sun a bit~ ...If you aren't coming, I'll just go by myself~ ...Last chance! Are you coming or not!? ｜ 走喽，晒太阳…你不去我可就自己去了哦…唔，最后一次机会！走不走！
- Maison Gardiennage ｜ 执律庭
- Huh? Oh, don't worry, you won't have to make any yourself — just use the stock we have in the store. I was just introducing it to you, that's all... ｜ 呃？哦，不用您亲手做，直接用店里的存货就好，我就是想为您介绍介绍…
- Jean ｜ 琴
- In ancient times, Qingce Village was once ravaged by the Chi. It is now several thousand years since it was put to rest. ｜ 古时，轻策庄曾受到螭的侵扰，平定至今已有数千年。
- The desserts are great, but I'm still looking forward to the story more than anything. ｜ 不过比起甜点，我还是更期待这次的故事。
- In his eyes, I saw a hunger and a strong fighting spirit. To him, the sea was the battlefield upon which he staked his honor. ｜ 我从他的眼中看到了战意与饥渴，对他而言，海洋便是他赌上荣誉的战场。
- Xumucul ｜ 库穆库尔

- These two... They don't look anything like us. ｜ 只是，他们两人和我们两人，未免体形相差太大了吧。$UNRELEASED
- Look out, ambush! ｜ 小心，有埋伏！
- Ahahahahahaha, oh, Urakusai, you haven't changed a bit. You caught on so quickly. Too perfect. ｜ 哈哈哈哈哈哈，哎呀哎呀有乐斋，真不愧是你啊，你反应也太快了点吧。
- Welcome aboard the Navia Line. This aquabus is bound for Erinnyes. Points of interest include the Fountain of Lucine and the Opera Epiclese. ｜ 欢迎搭乘「娜维娅线」的巡轨船。本次航行的目的地是伊黎耶岛，值得一去的地方是露景泉与欧庇克莱歌剧院。
- Magishroom ｜ 蘑菇魔法使

- The Iktomisaurus makes a sudden, dynamic entrance and defeats the original victor, the "Crimson Dancer."\nAs agreed, the organizer frees the reckless young lady from the Masters of the Night-Wind... ｜ 突入战场的暝视龙干脆利落地击败了原胜者「赤舞者」。\n根据约定，比赛的负责人将冒失的「烟谜主」少女放了出来…
- That's right, we can take care of this together! ｜ 对，我们一起来解决这件事情吧！

- A fishing point located on a small island south of Petrichor. The scenery here is lovely, and the fish are plentiful. ｜ 位于佩特莉可镇南侧小岛上的钓点，风景优美，鱼类资源丰富。

- I... ｜ 我…

- Oh, nothing. Let's tell the people here to gather at "A Moment of Dreams" after they wake up. ｜ 没什么，我们告诉这里的人，醒过来之后都去「品梦一刻」集合吧。
- Whoa — the view of Liyue from Wangshu Inn is sooo pretty! ｜ 呜哇——从望舒客栈往外看去，璃月真的好美哦！

- Ah, this is it, the International Trade Association. ｜ 这里就是万国商会了。
- Beidou, you do so much for our village, and we could never hope to repay you. ｜ 北斗啊，你这么照顾我们这小庄子，我们也没有什么能回报你呀。

- Traveler? Great, you have perfect timing! ｜ 旅行者？太好了，你来得正好！

- I've got other things to do right now... ｜ 暂时有别的事…

- Yes, I'm sorry. I had my reasons... ｜ 嗯。抱歉，之前还有不确定的事…
- ...Had my proposal not been rejected by the traitors... would you have... ｜ …若非我的提议遭到背叛者的否决…汝等怎会…

- Go now. Paimon should be here any minute. ｜ 你走吧。派蒙该来找我们了。
- Step one is closing the roads! Come on, let's go block the suspension bridge... ｜ 第一步，先封路！走，我们去堵住吊桥…

- Who? You've got the wrong person. ｜ 谁？你认错人了。
- Wh—What!? ｜ 你、你说什么？！
- Much obliged! ｜ 那就拜托阁下了！
- Haha. Anyway, Narzam escorted my mentor back to the city and they practically had a goodbye in decorum. ｜ 哈哈哈…总之，娜赞是把我的导师送回了城里，还和他礼貌地道别。
- A new day... ｜ 新的一天…
- Got it. ｜ 我知道了。
- Good. How are you, Uncle Okanbi? ｜ 奥坎比叔叔。我挺好的，你呢？
- With the aid of our companions, and our wills united as one, we can surely overcome any obstacle. ｜ 我们有同伴相助，勠力同心，定能克服艰难。
- But how to go about infusing something with dragon vitality... I haven't the foggiest idea. ｜ 但是汲取生命力…我是一点头绪都没有…
- She didn't cause any trouble during your trip, right? ｜ 她这一路上很可靠吧？应该没有添麻烦，对吧？
- Where'd that come from!? ｜ 从哪里来的？
- Hmm? ｜ 嗯？
- It was in Kujou Takayuki's secret warehouse. ｜ 是九条孝行的秘密仓库。
- There's some shade here, so we can stop for a while. ｜ 正好有阴凉的地方，可以待一会儿。
- Let me tell you what. I'll keep investigating. You keep doing what you usually do for a while... Let's meet up at Bantan Sango Detective Agency once something new comes up. ｜ 这样吧，我继续调查。你们可以先忙别的事情，到时候我们在万端珊瑚侦探社碰面吧。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Look, even if there are a couple o' tough customers lurking around this place, what's there to worry about when you've got Arataki "Numero Uno" Itto on your side, huh? Huh? Haha, there is nothing out there that you need to be afraid of. ｜ 就算这秘境里真藏着狠角色，也没什么好担心的。有我荒泷天下第一斗在，还能怕了谁不成？
- They say that it's a long-term effect of him having fallen from the audience seats and hitting his head at a comedy show. ｜ 据说是小时候观看一场喜剧的时候，意外从看台摔了下来，脑袋落下了后遗症。
- Yes, but... ｜ 没错，但是…
- Defense Monolith ｜ 守护镇石
- *sigh* ...All these long years and I've never seen him attend the Lantern Rite. ｜ 嗨…这么多年了，我就没见过那位去过海灯节。
- Captain Beidou, perhaps we should check on the prize. ｜ 大姐头，我们去检查一下奖品吧，就是那个放置神之眼的盒子。
- Okay, Nahida said, "The Akasha relies on the power of a Gnosis to operate, as it is the manifestation of the God of Wisdom's power. It compiles the wisdom of the entire populace, and it grants knowledge to the people." ｜ 「虚空依靠神之心来运转，是智慧之神力量的具现。它统合全民的智慧，并将知识赐予人民」，纳西妲如是说。
- Tribal Announcement ｜ 部族公告
- I gathered the might of Khvarena according to the divine bird's last wishes, and departed from the sea of flowers to subdue the monsters, until I met that golden-haired man out in the wilderness. ｜ 循着神鸟遗愿的指引，我召集灵光的力量，离开花海以镇压地上的魔物，直到在荒野中遇到了那个金发的男人。
- "Once a Secret Source Servant leaves its formation, that formation can no longer satisfy the barrier's formation requirements. It will be unable to pass through." ｜ 「如果它们要满足队列数量的话，有龙仆脱队，就过不去那个屏障了吧。」
- What happened back there? I... don't really understand. ｜ 呼呼…刚才的究竟是什么呢，真是没有办法理解。

This ATK increase has a maximum of 6 stacks. When the character equipped with this weapon is not on the field, Consummation's ATK increase is doubled. ｜ 获得<color=#99FFFFFF>24%</color>所有元素伤害加成；施放元素战技后，获得持续20秒的「圆顿」，攻击力每1秒提升<color=#99FFFFFF>6.4%</color>，该攻击力提升效果至多叠加6次。当装备此武器的角色处于队伍后台时，「圆顿」的攻击力提升效果翻倍。
- Whoa... The ground is covered in flour. Tsk... What a messy chef... ｜ 呜哇，好多面粉都撒在地上了，在这里做菜的人真马虎…
- Clear ｜ 清除

- Because if you're here to make us suffer huge losses like last time, then I'm sorry. But none of us here can afford that. ｜ 要是又像之前一样，让我们赔一大笔钱，那我们这里没有谁能负担这个责任。

- ...Hmph. I have no need for these names anymore. ｜ …哼。没必要再用这些名字了。

- Leaving already? Don't forget to come see me when you come to Cat's Tail for a night out. ｜ 要走了？要是你晚上有兴趣来猫尾酒馆，记得在客人席里找找我哟。
- You saw something, right? Whatever it was, grab it! ｜ #{NICKNAME}，你看到了什么吧？那肯定就是我们要采集的东西！
- Steady now! It's the final stretch! ｜ 再加把劲！最后冲刺！~
- Here they are. ｜ 搜集齐了。

- My, oh my, you are blessed with a taste for both the exquisite and the extravagant... Customers like you are a rare breed — one in a hundred... No, one in a thousand, even! ｜ 哎呀哎呀，两位客人不仅目光如炬，而且出手阔绰，真是十年…啊不，百年难遇的好朋友。
- All that time lying in wait was for nothing. I was so mad, I just threw all of it away... ｜ 我气得把东西就全丢了，白白浪费了我半天的工夫…
- A small stall lined with various tea sets, each one capable of bringing out the flavor of a specific sort of tea — a feature of great import to tea vendors.\nSome of these tea vendors also learn the art of storytelling on the side, becoming skilled in more than discipline. ｜ 摆放着各类茶具的摊位。每型茶具都能发挥特定茶叶的风味，其中的门道深受茶水摊主们的重视。\n有些茶水摊主还在钻研沏茶技巧的同时，学习了说书的本领，一人身兼多职。
- No, no, I did find it quite amusing. ｜ 真的挺好笑的。
- (The focus seems to be "problem-solving." It provides concise and clear solutions to various problems.) ｜ （看上去以「解决问题」为核心，针对各种问题都给出了简洁明确的解决方案。）
- Karkata... ｜ 卡卡塔…
- Balfour was invited by the Fontaine Research Institute to look for technical support personnel to improve the Wisdom Orb, so we're each doing our own things for now. ｜ 贝尔福先生则受邀去枫丹科学院那边，寻找改进「意智宝珠」的技术支援人员了，我暂时和他分头行动。
- Oh, wait, no. It's just the image projected from the conch. It just appeared behind you so suddenly... ｜ 啊，仔细一看只是海螺产生的影像，突然出现在背后，真是吓了人一大跳呢！
- Have a duel with Amenoma Yuuya ｜ 与天目优也一较高下
- ...Okay, let's do it. I will play my part. ｜ …我明白了，我会尽力演好自己的角色。
- How are things at Falcon Coast? ｜ 鹰翔海滩那边的情况怎么样？
- Curiosity about the unknown, compassion for fellow humans, and the subsequent courage to take on something far more powerful than oneself. ｜ 对于未知事物的好奇，对于同族同类的恻隐，以及由此而萌生的，敢于挑战远比自身强大之物的勇气。
- Look, there are a ton of Fatui and Palais Mermonia people over there! The Knave is probably here already... We need to hurry! ｜ 看，那边围着愚人众和沫芒宫的人！她们是不是都到了，我们得抓紧！
- Over there! It's more Ruin Guards and Abyss Mages. ｜ 看那边，又是遗迹守卫和深渊法师。
- Once activated, the Anomalous Model Ruin Grader will start attacking the Pursina's Spikes. At this time, its head- and leg-mounted cores will be exposed. Attack them to stop the Ruin Grader's movements. ｜ 进入激活状态后，「遗迹重机特异体」将攻击「普尔希娜光钉」。此时头部与脚部的核心会暴露出来，攻击核心，或许能阻止它。

- Well, whatever your reasons, you did me a favor, and I'll do everything I can to pay it back. ｜ 不管怎么说，你帮了我的忙，这份恩情我都会尽力偿还。
- You return to the Vourukasha Oasis with Rashnu. ｜ 与拉沙鲁一道返回了甘露花海。
- Elite Melee unit. Each squad has <color=#FF8126FF>2 members</color>. Periodically <color=#FF8126FF>charges</color>, dealing Anemo DMG to enemies in a straight line.\nWill normally stay in the same spot performing spinning attacks that deal Physical DMG. ｜ 精锐近战单位，小队编有<color=#FF8126FF>2名成员</color>，每隔一段时间会分别对直线范围的敌人发起<color=#FF8126FF>冲锋攻击</color>，造成风元素伤害。\n平时会原地进行回旋攻击，造成物理伤害。
- Amputations. ｜ 截肢。
- Callas was defeated by Champion Duelist Clorinde in the ensuing duel, and soon succumbed to the injuries. ｜ 在决斗中，嫌疑人败给决斗代理人克洛琳德，因此身亡。
- Kirya ｜ 基里亚
- Doors come in all shapes and sizes, those that can open have keys, and those that can't lack them, just like the situation you're facing right now. ｜ 世上的门有百般模样，打得开的才有钥匙，打不开的也就没有钥匙，如同各位现在面临的状况。
- You think so? Well, to that, I would say that in Sumeru, even prisoners have the right to an education. ｜ 是吗？那我会说，在须弥，囚犯也有接受教育的权利。
- Here's one for you, Shenhe! Try it, they're so good! ｜ 分你一个，这个可好吃了！
- Just kidding! I'll... try my best not to dump any more strange commissions on you. ｜ 开玩笑的！下次我肯定不会塞给你奇怪的工作…我尽力。
- #Ah! Thanks, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}! Thanks, Paimon! This way, we can make some delicious flatbread! ｜ #啊，谢谢你们，{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}，还有派蒙！这样一来，就可以做出好吃的面饼来啦！
- White Snake ｜ 白色的蛇
- An "agent" refers to a member of the Marechaussee Phantom who undertakes investigations. In this context, "assistant" refers to "Seymour," prototype 4ACV07 itself. ｜ 探员，指在逐影庭任职，从事调查工作的人类。助手，在该句语境中，具体指代原型机4ACV07，通称「西摩尔」的个体。
- I left home in a hurry, and was unable to bring any of my family with me. They've all heard so much about you and are huge admirers of the Arataki Gang, so they will be devastated to learn that they missed out on this opportunity. ｜ 我这趟出门仓促，未能带上家眷。他们常闻你的大名，对荒泷派神往已久，可惜这次无缘同席…
- Besides, why else would he call the novel "The TWO Musketeers"? ｜ 再说，这本小说的名字，不就是叫《两个铳枪手》吗？
- The villagers? Eh, there's no point asking them. This is a secret base! How would they even know where it is? If I remember correctly, the cave entrance should be behind these vines, so let's split up and search for it. ｜ 村民…还是算了吧，这可是秘密基地，他们怎么会知道。如果我没记错的话，洞口应该就在这些藤蔓的后面，我们分头找吧。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- But "Mother of the Jinn"? Do those desert philistines wish to cajole me to laughter? I fear that this joke fails to amuse. It falls far short, in fact. ｜ 但是…「镇灵之母」？鄙俗的沙漠住民想要逗我大笑，对吗？唔…我的评价是，滑稽，但不够好笑。差太远啦…
- Are there any interesting stories about the village? ｜ 村子里有什么奇妙的故事吗？
- But he wouldn't accept that, so he started publishing his own novels, but not a single one sold in the end. ｜ 后来他不服气，还自费把自己的小说印了出来，结果一本都没卖出去。
- #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Paimon, do you ever find that the word "Aranara" trips you up?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Hmm? Why, does it trip you up? Maybe that's because you don't really say anything most of the time.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Unlike Paimon! Paimon has to talk all the time, so she never gets stuck on words.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Okay, well, try reading this then.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>What is it? Let's see here...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Arana the Aranara exercises Ararakalari in the nearby area.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Narana the Nara picks Padisarahs in a parallel area further afield.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Narana the Padisarah-picking Nara had arranged to invite Arana the Aranara to the bar to befriend Lambad, but alas, Arana the Ararakalari-exercising Aranara professed a preference to Padisarah-picking Nara, Narana, for venturing to Vanarana to view the panorama.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>On account of Arana the Aranara's antipathy to bar drama, Narana the Nara relented and, upon accompanying the latter on a Vanarana-panorama adventure, encountered another Aranara, named "Arama."\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>This must be one of those really weird dreams, right...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Ugh, but this headache feels pretty real... ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>派蒙有没有觉得「兰那罗」这个名字，还挺难念的？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>嗯？难念吗？是不是你平时说话太少了呀。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>像我天天说话，嘴皮子特别利索，从来不会咬到舌头。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那你读一下这个。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>什么嘛，我看看。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>打南边来了个兰拉娜，兰拉娜练着兰迦拉梨。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>打北边来了个那菈拉娜，那菈拉娜捧着帕蒂沙兰。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>捧着帕蒂沙兰的那菈拉娜想带练着兰迦拉梨的兰拉娜去酒馆找兰巴德，练着兰迦拉梨的兰拉娜想带捧着帕蒂沙兰的那菈拉娜去桓那兰那。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>那菈拉娜拗不过兰拉娜，和兰拉娜去桓那兰那见到了叫兰罗摩的兰那罗…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>这，这一定是做梦吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我的眼前…出现了星星…
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Less than 5... So that means, no helping Bonnie... ｜ 刚刚是不是说…大于等于五才去帮邦妮…
- Golden Nara has Arapandu's scent. ｜ 金色的那菈，有兰般度的气息。
- Oh, you're back at last! How did it go? Did you find our two authors? ｜ 哎，您终于回来了！怎么样？有见到两位老师吗？
- Maybe if you turned that frown upside down once in a while, he might feel more at ease. ｜ 如果你的表情不要那么凶，他可能也不会紧张。
- Choose one of your characters to gain 1 extra Max HP, then all your characters gain 1 Max HP.\nHeal your active character for 2 HP and all your characters on standby for 1 HP.\n(You must have at least 2 {SPRITE_PRESET#2102}<color=#80C0FFFF>Hydro</color> characters in your deck to add this card to your deck.) ｜ 治疗我方出战角色2点。然后，治疗所有我方后台角色1点。\n（牌组包含至少2个{SPRITE_PRESET#2102}<color=#80C0FFFF>水元素</color>角色，才能加入牌组）
- But... regrettably, given I'm a Fatui envoy from Snezhnaya... there's no way I'd be trusted after something of this magnitude. ｜ 但…可叹啊。愚人众身为至冬国使臣…在发生这种大事以后，一定无法得到信任吧。
- Decembre, you slippery little fraud, I've finally caught you! Last time I caught you hanging around the mail room, you were also swindling newcomers into commissions for you for a fraction of the actual fee... ｜ 德瑟布尔，你这滑头，可算让我逮到你了！上次在发信室附近抓到你把自己应该完成的委托低价转包给新来的…
- The next time this character acts, they will immediately use the Skill <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S13095]</color>. ｜ 本角色将在下次行动时，直接使用技能：<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S13095]</color>。
- Unlock teleport waypoints in Inazuma City ｜ 解锁「稻妻 稻妻城」传送锚点
- What we think? Well... ｜ 评价？这个嘛…
- Yeah. Without evidence, even the Speaker's Chamber has its hands tied. ｜ 没有证据的话，「话事处」也很难办吧。
- Obtained from fishing ｜ 钓鱼获取
- Someone as purehearted as you probably sleeps better than anyone else... ｜ 像你这样心如明镜的家伙，应该会睡得比谁都香吧…
- In the beginning, my siblings and I took leave of our Mother and came to play on the surface. ｜ 一开始，我和兄弟姐妹们告别妈妈，到地面上来玩。
- If only we could <color=#00E1FFFF>sneak in among the Iktomisaurs</color>... ｜ 要是能<color=#00E1FFFF>混在暝视龙里偷偷潜入</color>进去的话…
- But, dear Lanoire, the story of you and your adventure is still ongoing. Happy birthday. And one day, you'll have to share your story with me, won't you? ｜ 但是，亲爱的莉诺尔，你的「名为人生的冒险故事还在继续」。生日快乐。有朝一日，你要把你的故事说给我听。
- Huh? C'mon, don't you trust me? I won't tell anyone else, honest! ｜ 咦？你是不相信薇塔吗？薇塔不会把答案说给其他人听的。
- A mask that covers the face, hiding one's expression from others. ｜ 能将面目遮蔽，让人无从判断表情的面具。
- Most Disliked Comment ｜ 「最被『反对』的留言」
- Desnos ｜ 德斯诺斯
- Charged Up DMG|{param4:F1P} Max HP ｜ 蓄力完成伤害|{param4:F1P}生命值上限
- Burning sand flows within this hourglass. Despite the intense heat, the sand leave no mark upon the vessel that houses it. ｜ 流淌着闪烁热砂的沙漏。流沙匆匆而去，从不留下任何烙印。
- "A suspicious individual has been seen in Liyue recently. We remind citizens to be on guard against thieves." ｜ 近日璃月港内常有可疑人物出没，请市民注意日常防盗。
- Great! I hope it doesn't mess up my flowers again... Cat food is supposed to taste better than flower leaves, after all. ｜ 那就好，希望它别再来咬花了。无论怎么说，猫粮都要比花叶好吃啊。
- Radiant Spincrystal 75 ｜ 旋曜玉帛·其七十五
- Even now, you remain one of Tatarasuna's key consultants, working right here alongside us. I believe it is you, Sir, who are truly responsible for the changes in our manufacturing and forging methods. ｜ 而您也作为踏鞴砂的顾问之一留在这里，陪伴我们。您的到来，改变了我们的生产与锻造模式。
- Safety does come first. It's more important than saving time. In fact, it's way more important than anything else. ｜ 安全比时间…不，比任何东西都要重要。
- Alright, let me make the commission clear. ｜ 好了，我来说明一下委托内容吧。
- Successfully complete Direcliff Court on Default Animosity in the "Perilous Trail" event ｜ 在「危途疑踪」活动中，成功通过「常规敌情」的「危悬高峭之庭」
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- Say what!? He's one of the creators of Genius Invokation TCG!? ｜ 欸？！这…这位就是发明了「七圣召唤」的人？
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Now, we all know that Loach Pearls are not materials that need to be stockpiled in large amounts, and similar substances were found in the potions imbibed by the victims. ｜ 我们都知道鳅鳅宝玉并不是需要大量囤积的素材，并且在受害者使用的药剂中也都发现了类似的成分…
- That friend he was meeting should be Arana. ｜ 而「朋友」指的应该是兰拉娜。
- So, the fake at the shrine is named Lyudochka. Her superior has actually been pushing her to make further contact with you, but for some reason, she hasn't acted yet. ｜ 神社里的冒牌货叫「柳达希卡」，其实她的上司也一直催促她和你们交涉，但不知为什么她却一直没有行动。
- You two must be exhausted from your journey. Please have a rest while we prepare some food for you. ｜ 二位走了这么长的路肯定累了，请在这里先歇着吧，我去给你们准备饭菜。
- Obtain the kindling ｜ 获取火种
- Indeed. The Wenut must've been frozen in an instant. As it has been crystallized, its form remains in perpetuity. ｜ 没错。那应该是一瞬间的事吧，你们看，即便已经变成结晶的现在，它依然保持着当时的动态。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Pool of Sapphire Grace.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『灵沼云池』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- As the river breeze blows, you hitch a ride on the rocking bamboo raft,\nAnd you slowly reach the Jademouth. ｜ 吹着河风，乘着摇晃的竹筏，\n慢悠悠地抵达了宝玦口。
- Huh? What do you mean? ｜ 什么意思？
- No need to worry about me. Master... I mean, my father must have given you this commission. ｜ 请您不要担心我的状态，我的主人…父亲，想必已经将委托交待给了你们。
- Congratulations. ｜ 恭喜。
- How very strange... ｜ 有种奇怪的感觉…
- Mona ｜ 莫娜
- I haven't even been able to keep up with my own work, even though I'm up late all the time these days... ｜ 嗯，我自己的事都做不过来啦，最近总熬夜。
- But... What should we do for Yoimiya... ｜ 可是宵宫…该怎么办才好…
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Yae Publishing House Editor ｜ 「八重堂」编辑
- Maybe the Fading Disorder occurs when the ink within the body dries up... That would explain why the beings here are forgetting their own stories... ｜ 或许那些患上「褪色症」的居民，是因为体内的墨迹干涸褪去，才会忘了自己的故事…
- That would make him a problem, and you... you would be his accomplice. ｜ 那他就会是不折不扣的麻烦了。而你，是惟神晴之介的帮凶。
- ATK Decrease Duration|{param4:F1}s ｜ 攻击力降低持续时间|{param4:F1}秒
- Ah, you mean that giant iron mountain! And we even studied it with Ararycan and Jazari, didn't we? ｜ 啊，是那个「大铁山」！我们还和兰利遮，还有加扎里先生一起研究过呢！
- Finally, the lyre is back in safe hands! ｜ 终于拿到天空之琴啦。
- Think of your movements as a lover's caress. Gently peel the bud open, remove the petals, and stack them with care. ｜ 要像摩挲恋人的肌肤一样，以极为温柔的力道剥开花苞，取下花瓣，将它们细致地叠放。
- And one of my goals for coming to Tsurumi Island was to collect something known as Fluorescent Fungi. According to Sango, these fungi can help improve one's memory and relieve strain on one's brain. It's said that they can even improve visual acuity. ｜ 而我此次来到鹤观的目的之一，是采集一种名为「幽灯蕈」的菌类。听珊瑚小姐说，这种菌类能够增强记忆力，缓解大脑劳损，对视力也有好处。
- In any case, ignore this fraud. He and the organization behind him specialize in tricking unsuspecting people into dangerous competitions, and they earn a profit from it. ｜ 总之，不要理会这个家伙。他和他背后的组织专挑不知情的人，用话术欺骗这些可怜人参加危险的比赛并借此获利。
- Hey, it's not like we have all the time in the world, either! ｜ 我们也不是总是很空闲的啦！
- Go to the camp and ask for clues regarding the strange air current ｜ 到营地询问和奇怪的气流相关的线索
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:F1P}
- Warrior's Spirit ｜ 演武传心
- So... d'you think we have enough between these and the wine Razor's parents left behind? ｜ 这些，再加上雷泽爸爸妈妈留下的酒…够不够呀？
- Umm, don't think too hard about it. Just take what we're saying at face value. ｜ 哎呀，别管那么多，你就当做是真的吧。
- Hey...! I just wanted to inspect each pipe! This is the network the Magic Tonic has to flow through. I was just trying to be thorough! So, I... I disassembled the whole thing... ｜ 我…！我只是想把每一根管道都细细检查一遍！这可是要供「魔水」通过的重要结构！所以我才…才拆开了它们…
- N—No need to be so formal — I've long marveled at your accomplishments... and at last we have the chance to meet. ｜ 不用…不用这么客气，我早就很仰慕您的事迹，终于找到这样的机会了。
- "The enjoyment one gets from playing this game of cards does not pale in the face of wine, tea, or swordplay..."\nHint: Kaedehara Kazuha's deck specializes in using various card combinations to Switch characters efficiently, while using Summons and the Swirl reaction to trigger Elemental Reactions frequently. ｜ 「这牌戏中的雅兴，不逊于饮酒、品茶和练剑…」\n【提示】枫原万叶的牌组擅长通过各种卡牌的配合高效地「切换角色」，并依靠「召唤物」和「扩散反应」来高频地引发元素反应。
- We've arrived at Qiaoying Village. May we meet again, if fate wills it so! ｜ 客人，已经到翘英庄了。若是有缘，下次再见。
- At the time, my creator, Lord Xiuhcoatl, was exhibiting signs of memory degradation and distortion, and the kinsman he cherished most had already severed ties with him... ｜ 那是在制造我的主人，修库特尔大人记忆已出现模糊而扭曲的现象，而他最重视的那位族裔已与他有决裂之势…
- Phew... I think we'll rest for a while... ｜ 呼…先歇一歇吧…
- Sh—Shogun...! ｜ 将军大人…！
- (Alright, this drink is looking good.) ｜ （好，感觉不错。）
- Furnishing ｜ 摆设
- We came here to rescue you, but you actually opened the cage yourself... You were only pretending to be captured by the Nobushi, weren't you? Pretty suspicious if you ask Paimon... ｜ 亏我们刚刚还想来救你呢，结果你居然自己打开笼子走出来了…被野伏众抓住也是装的吧？实在太狡猾了…
- Now that you mention it, you haven't said anything in quite a while, Liloupar. ｜ 话说回来…利露帕尔还一直没有说话呢。
- If I make it as a big time director, then I can see us working together for the long term! Be sure to stay in touch, okay? You and I are gonna go places... ｜ 要是我以后能成为知名导演，真想请您与我长期合作啊！哎呀，我们必须保持长期联系…
- You're going that far out... Well, mind you don't get too thirsty, alright? ｜ 哇…你要去这么远的地方呀…那小心不要再把自己渴瘪了！
- Corps of Thirty Recruitment ｜ 「三十人团」的招募
- I shudder to think what the Fatui will do with you if you fail to provide their Cor Lapis. ｜ 没有这石珀，「愚人众」会把你怎么样，需要我帮你想象一下吗？
- Ah, yes, that reminds me. I only returned here to check on Caribert, but I do have other things I wish to do... You may come with me, if you're so inclined. ｜ 哦对了，我只是回来确认一下卡利贝尔的情况，还有事情要做…如果你有兴趣，就跟上来。
- Tough luck for us both. ｜ 你不走运，我们也倒霉。
- Really? You're willing to help? In that case, I'll give you my... my spare allowance, all of it! ｜ 真的吗？你愿意帮我？那我也愿意把我…省下来的零花钱都给你！
- R—Really? That's just a story! Are you sure? I never noticed. ｜ 不、不会吧？那可是传说啊，妹妹，你真的没有记错吗？我从来没注意过这个。
- I heard I could get my hands on some special potions here... ｜ 听说这里能买到特别的药剂…
- Shinobu's Principles of Restraint! ｜ 阿忍的克制原则！
- Regenerates <color=#3399CCFF>300–470</color> HP every 5s for the next 30s. ｜ 并在之后的30秒内，每5秒恢复<color=#3399CCFF>300-470</color>点生命值。
- If we've actually been reliving the Sabzeruz Festival day after day, then what happened to the things we used, the money we spent, the food we ate? ｜ 如果一连很多天都是花神诞祭，只是我们不记得的话，那所有的物资消耗，花掉的钱，吃掉的东西该怎么办？
- A small gear. It seems very ordinary indeed. ｜ 一枚小小的齿轮，看起来并没有特殊之处。
- ...So you'd like to know how we're doing lately? ｜ …是问我们的近况吗？
- Golden Troupe's Reward ｜ 黄金剧团的奖赏
- It seems to be guiding me. ｜ 它似乎在指引我。
- A snowman torso with a unique design that can be used to build a Puffy Snowman.\nThe uniqueness of such snowmen lies in its ability to look assertive no matter what accessories it is mounted with. Some bold kids will place snowmen like this in highly visible spots in the city as assertions of their creativity. ｜ 造型特殊的雪人躯干，可用于组装「噗噗雪人」。\n这种雪人的奇妙之处在于——无论配上哪种部件，都有一种「理直气壮」的气势。某些胆大的孩子会将这种雪人堆放在城里醒目的位置，炫耀自己的得意作品。
- Talk to Azariq ｜ 与阿萨里格对话
- Haha, I knew you three could do it! Such extraordinary skill! ｜ 哈哈，不愧是三位，身手不凡呀！
- If you've memorized the steps, give it a go. If you've forgotten, feel free to ask me again. ｜ 记住的话就来试试吧，如果忘记了再来问我也没关系。
- After that, I might go look for one of my dad's co-workers... I've heard that Mr. Kaji is still on the island. He might know something about Mom. ｜ 然后，我可能会去找找爸爸的工友…之前听说梶先生还在岛上，他或许知道关于妈妈的事。

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Expedition Rating Details</color>\nWhen dispatching characters to investigate, you will achieve one of three Expedition Ratings — Normal, Exceptional, and Perfect — based on the Level of the characters dispatched. The higher the level of the characters sent, the higher the rating. Different ratings will result in different investigation rewards. If the selected characters' Elemental Types match the recommended Elements for this expedition, the rating increase will be greater. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【派遣评价说明】</color>\n在派遣调查时，根据旅行者派遣的所有角色的等级，本次派遣会获得普通，非凡，完美三种不同的评价，角色等级越高，评价越高，不同的评价会对应不同的调查奖励。若所选角色的神之眼元素类型与此项派遣的推荐元素一致，评价的提升效果会更好。

- A stall made from High-quality Otogi Wood, from which festival accessories or decorations are sold at popular festivals.\nThe artisans in charge of making these items tend to play it safe and make only a small number of items each time. Thus, the more popular products tend to sell out fast, with latecomers being forced to wait for another event to come along before they can try their hand at snagging them again. As time passed, the hottest commodities would slowly become "teiban," or "regular fixtures," at the stalls. ｜ 良品「御伽木」所筑的屋台，在至为热闹的祭典上出售饰品和摆件。\n由于饰品和摆件的工匠通常会采取保守的商业策略，单次制作的货品并不多，每次热门的货品都会脱销，人们只能等待下一次的再贩售，下次也未必能抢到，最热门的几款货品不知不觉就成为了常驻摊位上的「定番」。

- A slender amphibian fish that usually lives in the desert. In order to adapt to the high temperatures and lack of water, they have not only taken on a fairly unique shape, but their reproductive methods have also changed.\nThough the researchers of the Akademiya firmly deny this, the desert folk believe that the giant life forms within the sands are the mature and complete forms of these creatures following pupation. ｜ 体型修长的两栖鱼类，通常生活于沙海之中。为了适应高温缺水的沙漠环境，不仅身体演化成了特殊的形态，就连繁殖方式也发生了变化。\n虽然被教令院的学者们所否定，但沙漠的居民似乎认为，存在于沙海之下的巨型生物才是它们蛹化成熟之后的完整形态。
- We've been planning this for so long. It wouldn't hurt to wait a bit longer. ｜ 我们已经筹备了很久，不差这么一点时间。
- I don't think she can hear us. We're too far away. ｜ 太远了，她好像听不到。
- I'm really not accustomed to using a Vision. Why don't you teach me? Ah, I nearly forgot... you've never used a Vision either. ｜ 神之眼用起来还真不太习惯。你来教教我吧？呃…差点忘了，你也没用过神之眼啊。

- A strange device from Fontaine that not only records the world around it but also adds special colors to the printed images. This was designed in response to a request from The Steambird for a Kamera that not only reflects the environment but also the emotions of the person taking the picture. Unfortunately, the final product could not quite meet their requirements. ｜ 来自枫丹的奇特道具。与普通的留影机不同，将景象牢牢记录下来之余，还能在印出的画像上附带特殊的色彩。这种设计，是针对枫丹的通讯社「蒸汽鸟」希望留影机除了反映景象，也能反映拍摄者的情绪而做的。但最终产品没能实现「蒸汽鸟」的需求。
- Offering Unto Wind and Sun ｜ 奉予风阳的禋祀
- Maybe there aren't so many rules about how we should or shouldn't live our lives in this world after all. So... he hopes you can come to understand that even though the power of a yaksha may be harmful to other people, it doesn't mean you shouldn't hang out with them. ｜ 活在世上，或许没有那么多规矩。所以…他希望你也能明白，即使夜叉之力对人有害，也不代表你不能跟大家一起。
- "Father" told us about how you helped Lyney. According to her, you're a trustworthy friend, and as far as she's concerned, that's pretty much the highest compliment we've ever heard her give. As you can imagine, everyone's been very curious about you. ｜ 「父亲」说你们帮过林尼，是值得信赖的朋友。这是我们从「父亲」那里听过最高的评价了，大家都在讨论你们是何方神圣。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Flight Master ｜ 飞行大师
- It's all true, though. I just... don't have very many friends. ｜ 那些都是实话，我这个人…朋友确实比较少。
- Asking Klee how she obtained a Vision will probably get you nowhere — she doesn't know, either.\nA natural-born pyromaniac, Klee had already been acknowledged by a Vision from a very young age.\nAccording to Klee herself, she had been creating a bomb that was "even bigger than super big!"\nThis was her very first solo project, but the results were far from expected—\nWell, she "only" blew her small workshop sky high, leaving a mountain of smoking ash.\nBut rather than being disappointed, Klee was pleasantly surprised to see a flaming Vision emerge from those ashes.\nHow did Klee receive this divine acknowledgment?\nWas it her talent and passion for explosives, the individualistic nature she got from her mother, or her shining innocence?\nRegardless, Klee had already obtained such a coveted item at a tender, carefree age.\nRegardless of what she faces as she grows up, she will never give this "present" up. ｜ 如果问起可莉如何获得「神之眼」，恐怕她自己都说不清楚。\n作为天赋异禀的爆炸狂，可莉在很小的时候就受到了「神之眼」的认可。\n根据可莉自己版本的故事，她那时正在制作一个「比超级大还要大的大炸弹！」\n这是她自己上手制作的第一件作品，实验结果却远不如预期——\n仅仅炸翻了她的小小工棚，留下一大堆冒烟的灰烬。\n失望之余，可莉惊喜地发现，火焰般的「神之眼」从灰烬中浮出。\n可莉为何会获得神的认可？\n是由于对爆炸物与生俱来的才华与执着，还是因为与母亲一模一样的我行我素，又或许是因为足够闪耀的纯真？\n不论出于何种原因，总之，可莉在最无忧无虑的年纪就已获得万人渴求的神之眼。\n无论以后的成长过程中将要面对什么，她也绝对不会放弃这份「礼物」。
- And speaking of the most distinguished guest here today... I'm sure we all agree that it's Mr. Zhongli. ｜ 那么说到在座身份最尊贵的客人…一定就是钟离客卿了吧。
- Well, Natlan is a nation of heroes, whose valiant deeds are preserved and passed down over time in the form of stories. ｜ 这么说吧，纳塔是英雄的国度，他们的英勇事迹都通过故事的形式传承到了现在。
- That, my friend, is what you get when you combine a butt-kicking card deck with raw oni power! Hahahaha, thank you very much! ｜ 这就是男子汉的牌组，这就是男子汉的实力，哈哈哈哈哈！
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Maple Wood Tanuki.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「枫木布面狸猫玩偶」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- What could they be then? ｜ 那会是什么呢？
- Need some water? Here, take a sip of mine. It's infused with mint leaves, so it's extra refreshing! ｜ 喝点水吗？尝尝我瓶子里的吧，泡薄荷叶子果然是明智的选择呢。
- Duelists of the first bout, please step forward. ｜ 第一回合的选手，请上前。
- A gamepiece based on Large Cryo Slimes. Each unit has 2 members.\nA monster created through the coagulation of Cryo in the natural environment. These slimes can use the abundant Cryo energies within themselves to freeze the moisture in the atmosphere and form a protective shell around themselves. They can also utilize a similar principle to freeze the water around them.\nAs one of the medium-level threats most often faced by adventurers and the armed forces of various nations, it is eminently suited to filling in the line of battle. ｜ 以「大型冰史莱姆」为原型的兵棋，每个单位编有2名成员。\n逸散在自然之中的冰元素沉积形成的魔物会利用体内凝聚的丰沛的冰元素，将大气中的水汽凝结成具有保护性的外壳；也会利用同样的原理，将周围的水面冻结。\n作为各国将士与冒险家们最常应对的中等威胁，十分适合填充战线。
- Thank you for your performance! Should you have any requests, I shall do my utmost to fulfill them. ｜ 演出辛苦了！客人有什么吩咐，我会尽力效劳的。

- I grew up with the vishaps. My only possessions were this pendant and a few boxes of books. I learned human language and writing from them. ｜ 我从小就和龙蜥一起长大。除了这个挂坠伴身之外，还有几箱子书卷。我通过它们学习了人类语言和文字。
- Ugh. There's no more hilichurls left at this camp. Such a great opportunity, completely wasted. All I can do now is wait until next time. ｜ 唉，这个营地已经没有丘丘人了，大好的机会就被这么浪费了。只能下次再说了。

- When using an Elemental Skill, All Elemental DMG Bonus will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color> for 15s, and a Bond of Life worth 24% of Max HP will be granted. This effect can be triggered once every 10s. When the Bond of Life is cleared, every 1,000 HP cleared in the process will provide <color=#99FFFFFF>3%</color> All Elemental DMG Bonus, up to a maximum of <color=#99FFFFFF>18%</color>. This effect lasts 15s. ｜ 施放元素战技时，所有元素伤害加成提升<color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color>，持续15秒，并赋予生命值上限24%的生命之契，该效果每10秒至多触发一次。生命之契清除时，每清除1000点将会提供<color=#99FFFFFF>3%</color>所有元素伤害加成，至多通过这种方式获得<color=#99FFFFFF>18%</color>所有元素伤害加成，持续15秒。

- It must be hard for Mom, being stuck between her two daughters, so I didn't press the issue, and I didn't go looking for her. ｜ 夹在两个女儿中间，想必妈妈也很难受吧，所以我没有追问，也没去追查。
- I don't like seafood. Just seeing it reminds me of that... slimy texture, and that scent that just won't wash off. As for why I hate it... *sigh* It's a long story, so let's just say my memory is a little too good. ｜ 我不喜欢海鲜。仅仅是看到海鲜，就会想到那种…该怎么说呢，滑溜溜的触感，洗不净的腥味。哦，原因的话…\n唉，说来话长，就当是因为我记性太好了吧。

- Aloy throws a Freeze Bomb in the targeted direction that explodes on impact, dealing <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo DMG</color>. After it explodes, the Freeze Bomb will split up into many Chillwater Bomblets that explode on contact with opponents or after a short delay, dealing <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo DMG</color>.\nWhen a Freeze Bomb or Chillwater Bomblet hits an opponent, the opponent's ATK is decreased and Aloy receives 1 Coil stack.\nAloy can gain up to 1 Coil stack every 0.1s.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Coil</color>\n·Each stack increases Aloy's Normal Attack DMG.\n·When Aloy has 4 Coil stacks, all stacks of Coil are cleared. She then enters the Rushing Ice state, which further increases the DMG dealt by her Normal Attacks and converts her Normal Attack DMG to <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo DMG</color>.\n\nWhile in the Rushing Ice state, Aloy cannot obtain new Coil stacks.\nCoil effects will be cleared 30s after Aloy leaves combat.\n\n<i>You think that's cold? Guess you've never been to The Cut.</i> ｜ 向目标方向投掷一枚冰尘弹，在命中后引发爆炸，造成<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素伤害</color>。爆炸后，冰尘弹将分裂成许多冷冻炸弹，在接触到敌人或一段时间后爆炸，造成<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素伤害</color>。\n冰尘弹或冷冻炸弹命中敌人后，会使敌人的攻击力降低，并为埃洛伊赋予1层「线圈」效果。\n每0.1秒至多获得1层线圈效果。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>线圈</color>\n·依据层数，提高埃洛伊的普通攻击造成的伤害；\n·拥有4层线圈时，埃洛伊清除所有的线圈效果，并获得「冰驰」，进一步提高普通攻击造成的伤害，并将普通攻击造成的伤害转为<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素伤害</color>。\n\n处于冰驰状态下时，埃洛伊无法获得线圈效果。\n线圈效果会在脱离战斗30秒后清除。\n\n<i>挥刀断崖那里的温度可要冷得多。</i>

- Look... Somebody's coming this way! ｜ 看，那边有人来了！
- Try something else next time. ｜ 下次做点别的吧。
- There must be a way you could liven things up a little here. Hmm... Ah, yes — how about hosting a ball here? I'm sure Fontaine's social elite would jump at the chance to fraternize with you. They'd flock here in droves, and everyone would be singing and dancing to their hearts' content. ｜ 如果想热闹一些的话，我想想…举办一场舞会怎么样？枫丹那些上流人士应该会很乐意跟你搞好关系，借用场地来尽情歌舞。
- Paimon doesn't remember that detail from the brainstorming session. ｜ 之前在想故事的时候，好像还没有这个设定的。

- She even warned us not to change it. It's blatant bullying of the gang, that's what it is... ｜ 还警告我们不许涂改，这样针对我荒泷派，实在可恶…

- *sigh* How am I going to get past... ｜ 唉，到底怎么过去呢…
- The cave swallowed them alive!? ｜ 被洞窟吃掉了！
- The Raiden Shogun, the dignified deity of Inazuma, is also known as "Raiden Ei."\nOnce, she sequestered herself away in her Plane of Euthymia, seeking to fulfill her promise to her people of an unchanging eternity, leaving her puppet Shogun to enact the plan in her place.\nBut she has broken with this cycle after witnessing the desires of her people and taking up the dream of one she once knew, and now walks amongst mortals once more.\nWhere will the new Eternity she sees lead Inazuma now? ｜ 以神明之尊君临稻妻的雷电将军，其真名为「雷电影」。\n为许臣民亘古不变之「永恒」，曾隐身「一心净土」，铸人偶将军代行「永恒」之道。\n在见证万千民众之愿望、重拾昔年故人之梦想后，影终于勘破妄执，了却因果，再度行走于人间。\n而她眼中所见新的「永恒」，又会将稻妻引往何方？
- Go to the Feiyun Commerce Guild warehouse ｜ 前往飞云商会的仓库
- Right now, she should be down at the docks. Lemme box up this food real quick, then we can head on down. ｜ 这会儿她应该在码头上。我去把菜装进食盒，我们到码头看看。

Heh, in fact, it's hard to tell who's the winner whenever we spar. ｜ 九条小姐啊，她是我的朋友。嗯？我认识她让你觉得很意外吗？噢，你可能误会了，我加入荒泷派之前就跟她有交情。我们俩的切磋，还难分胜负呢。

- But you should hurry, there is little time to waste. ｜ 快去吧，这件事刻不容缓。
- Enough! No more! Please, stop! ｜ 别拆了！你快停手！
- A pocket watch with a cover that cannot be opened. Yet it ticks and tocks away, following the inexorable flow of time. ｜ 壳罩无法打开的怀表，会坚定地随着时光流逝而嘀嗒作响。
- Leave it be. ｜ 复归原样。
- Thank you so much! ｜ 太感谢了！
- Our ancestor, Burkina once fought a campaign there alongside the five other heroes. But it's not such an easy place to get to these days. ｜ 先祖布基纳曾经与其他五位英杰一同征战过烬寂海，如今那里不是普普通通就能抵达的地方。
- The number of foreign visitors to Sumeru has been increasing recently, and with it, cases of individuals not being acclimatized to local conditions and food, so Bimarstan is buying a batch of medicine to <color=#F39000>relieve physical discomfort</color>. ｜ 须弥的外国旅客人数上升，水土不服的情况有所增加，「健康之家」正在采购一批<color=#F39000>缓解身体不适</color>的药品。
- Please forgive me, but we may not have sufficient stock for you today. Earlier, many of our Harra Fruits were taken by mice. ｜ 二位请见谅，今天的货可能没有二位想象中那么多，因为香辛果前一阵子被老鼠叼走了好些。

- Regardless, I have lost. You can take me back to the Akademiya to stand trial. ｜ 不管怎么说，这次是我输了，你可以把我送到教令院接受审判。

- Huh? Ah! It's the Iktomisaurus in charge of the exam questions... Does it want to say something...? ｜ 咦，啊，是负责考题的暝视龙，它有什么想说的话吗…

- An exquisitely-furnished mercantile district that pays homage to the layout of Sumeru City's streets and its Grand Bazaar. Fresh fruits, delectable dishes, and all manner of lifestyle goods may be found at the stalls here. A few rounds around the area, and you will find a unique ambience one feels when stepping foot into a bustling market.\nThey say that the shops and stalls on either side of Sumeru's streets have been modified according to specific rules that are the product of some Akademiya research, such that they can provide holistic service with the minimum possible management difficulty and acreage used.\nThis Furnishing Set is favored by the following companions: Dori, Faruzan, Sethos ｜ 布局精妙的商区，充分参考了须弥城的街道与大巴扎的布置，设有新鲜果蔬、诱人美食和各类生活用品的商位，只需在其中踱步几圈，就能找到别样的亲切感，似乎真的来到了热闹的市集。\n据传，须弥街道两边的店铺和摊位分布经过专门的规划，运用了部分教令院的研究成果，能在降低管理难度的前提上，尽可能利用有限的面积，为更多居民提供周到的服务。\n偏好这套摆设的同伴：多莉、珐露珊、赛索斯

- HP increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>30%</color>. When an Elemental Skill hits opponents, you gain the Grand Hymn effect for 20s. This effect increases the equipping character's Elemental Mastery by <color=#99FFFFFF>0.18%</color> of their Max HP. This effect can trigger once every 0.3s. Max 3 stacks. When this effect gains 3 stacks, or when the third stack's duration is refreshed, the Elemental Mastery of all nearby party members will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>0.3%</color> of the equipping character's max HP for 20s. ｜ 生命值提升<color=#99FFFFFF>30%</color>。元素战技命中敌人时，将产生持续20秒的「宏大诗篇」效果：基于装备者生命值上限的<color=#99FFFFFF>0.18%</color>，获得元素精通提升，该效果每0.3秒至多触发一次，至多叠加3层。该效果叠加至3层或3层的持续时间刷新时，将基于装备者生命值上限的<color=#99FFFFFF>0.3%</color>，为队伍中附近所有角色提供元素精通提升，持续20秒。

- Bounty No. 13: A notice pinned to the board with a dagger, with a giant red "X". Most of the information is now illegible, except the word "Sinthe." ｜ 第十三号悬赏令：用匕首钉在留言板上的悬赏令，其上有红色的巨大叉号。多数信息已经无法辨认，仅能认出「乐斯」两字。
- A pavement created using dense stones. These stones are arranged rather flexibly and are suited for paving roads where load-bearing requirements are not too stringent.\nThe clean, hard stones utilize a traditional art from Liyue that melts and melds smashed stone and sand grains together to form slabs that are sturdy, long-lasting, and inexpensive, thus making them much sought after across the continent.\nAccessibility is not merely the keystone of mercantile development, but it is also how those who live in even the most remote places may seek a new life and new opportunities. ｜ 由坚密的石材拼接而成的地板，石板的排布灵动，可用于铺设承重要求并不苛刻的道路。\n光洁而坚硬的石材应用了璃月的传统工艺，熔铸碎石与沙粒制成，牢固耐用，造价低廉，并因此远销至大陆各国。\n四通八达的道路不仅是商业发展的重要条件，还能为身居绝域殊方的人们带去生活的转机。

- A special variety of Jadeplume Terrorshroom that can create a Dendro Ward to protect itself. When the Metastable Jadeplume Terrorshroom has a <color=#FFE14BFF>Dendro Ward</color>, its <color=#FFE14BFF>All Elemental and Physical RES</color> will both be increased.\nWhen it is hit by <color=#FFE14BFF>Catalyze</color> reactions and <color=#FFE14BFF>Electro</color>, it will accumulate "Activation." When Activation is fully accumulated, the Metastable Jadeplume Terrorshroom will enter the <color=#FFE14BFF>Activated</color> state and <color=#FFE14BFF>shed</color> its Dendro Ward.\nWhen not in the Activated state, if it receives <color=#FFE14BFF>Pyro</color> damage, it will become <color=#FFE14BFF>Scorched</color>, and release spores in every direction, and cause them to explode in order to leave this state. After leaving the Scorched state, the Metastable Jadeplume Terrorshroom will <color=#FFE14BFF>reform</color> its Dendro Ward.\nIn addition, when the Metastable Jadeplume Terrorshroom <color=#FFE14BFF>is not</color> in the Activated or Scorched states, and is not protected by a shield, it will <color=#FFE14BFF>reform</color> its Dendro Ward. ｜ 能驱使草元素构成护罩，保护自身的翠翎恐蕈特殊变种。当「亚稳态翠翎恐蕈」拥有<color=#FFE14BFF>草元素护罩</color>时，所有<color=#FFE14BFF>元素抗性和物理抗性</color>均会获得提高。\n在承受<color=#FFE14BFF>雷元素</color>攻击与<color=#FFE14BFF>激化反应</color>时，会积累「活性化」状态。在「活性化」状态积累满后，「亚稳态翠翎恐蕈」将进入<color=#FFE14BFF>活化</color>状态并<color=#FFE14BFF>移除</color>身上的草元素护罩。\n不处于活化状态时，若「亚稳态翠翎恐蕈」受到<color=#FFE14BFF>火元素</color>伤害，则会变得<color=#FFE14BFF>枯焦</color>，会向四周散播孢子，并引爆孢子以摆脱这种状态。在摆脱枯焦状态后，「亚稳态翠翎恐蕈」将<color=#FFE14BFF>重新生成</color>草元素护罩。\n此外，当「亚稳态翠翎恐蕈」<color=#FFE14BFF>不处于</color>活化状态或枯焦状态，且未受到护罩保护时，将<color=#FFE14BFF>重新生成</color>草元素护罩。

- "The lands outside the capital have been overtaken by monsters, and our people are being led astray by forces of wickedness. We beseech you, please help us resolve this crisis, and return peace and stability to our home." ｜ 「王城之外魔物盘踞，王国的人民也被蛊惑…请你们帮忙解决危机，让和平与安定重新回到这座城市吧。」
- A sky-riding Sub-Space Boulder that was made by the conscientious Tubby in advance for a certain Inazuman guest. Inazuman mountain rock was cast on top of Plaustrite from Liyue to make this exquisite floating platform that expertly combines elements of both the "Sky Range" and "Solitude" models.\nTubby and her friends originally wanted to build a floating Tenshukaku using these boulders, along with layers of sakura flower clouds. Now that she thinks back on it, no one had really considered what sort of scenery that guest would have liked... ｜ 高悬于空中的外景磐石，是心思细腻的阿圆为某位稻妻贵客提前准备的「惊喜」。在璃月的「浮生石」外熔铸稻妻风格的山石，从而构筑精巧的浮空平台。与「空峋」和「孤硊」有着异曲同工之妙。\n阿圆和老友们本想依托这些外景磐石，建造浮空的天守阁，和樱花花瓣交织的层云。如今回想起来，大家都还没有深入了解过，那位贵客究竟喜欢何种景观…

- One of Liyue's traditional snacks. The egg has been beaten into the flour to form a dough and the shrimp and fish have been diced, minced, and packaged into the shape of a teacup, before being garnished with whole shrimp and steamed in a pot. The resulting design is like that of clouds embracing the moon, hence the name Fullmoon Egg. ｜ 璃月的传统点心之一。将蛋液混合面粉制成面皮，虾仁和鱼肉剁碎制成肉馅，包成茶盏形状，点缀完整虾仁上锅蒸熟。其造型如同云朵抱月，因此得名「明月蛋」。

- Okay! Let's go! ｜ 那我们走！
- Uh... Are those all the names of Aphids? ｜ 呃…这些是蜜虫的名字？
- Oh, hey. I would say this is a nice surprise, but... it's really not that surprising. Look at you, venturing out into the darkness, doggedly fighting your way through, just to come and see me. ｜ 嚯，该说意外呢，还是说毫不意外呢。在这种黑暗之中，仍然要执意前行，破开雾霾，来到我的面前。
- As the people of Liyue Harbor see it, Madame Ping is often found with Yaoyao by her side, the two seeming the very image of a loving grandmother and granddaughter.\nIn truth, however, there is no blood relation between them, and Yaoyao is Madame Ping's — or should we say Streetward Rambler's — disciple.\nWhen Yaoyao first became the adeptus' disciple, she was still too young to have learned to read and write, and so her master began by teaching her the etiquette of tomes of poetry on a daily basis.\nAs she grew, Streetward Rambler would gradually add the rites of the adepti, their methods of self-cultivation, and her own spear arts into Yaoyao's curriculum.\nThe voluminous nature of such teachings makes committing them to memory a challenge for Yaoyao, but her master does not overly fret about such things, for it is apparent to her that Yaoyao has indeed listened to those lessons.\nWhile her spear's shaft is heavy and ill-aligned to a child's easy wielding, Yaoyao practices every day nonetheless.\nAnd while books of poetry might be hard to memorize, she reads them daily nonetheless, to the point where she can expound on the relationship between full stomachs and righteousness in her sleep.\nHaving initially resolved to be a sterner taskmistress, Streetward Rambler was relieved to see Yaoyao's earnest attitude, and thus relaxed her requirements a little.\nThat Yaoyao genuinely treated her as her grandmother warmed the cockles of her heart greatly as well.\nIndeed, despite being half the height of an adult, Yaoyao tended to Streetward Rambler's meals and fretted over her health when the hotter parts of the year give way to the cold, as if forgetting that headaches and fevers were not common problems for the adepti.\nIndeed, Streetward Rambler came to feel as if she really had been blessed with a granddaughter, and from then on, she never said a strict word to the child ever again.\nWhile she had not begun this relationship with any intention apart from taking a disciple, she now finds herself and Yaoyao inseparable. Which is alright, she supposes. Let the little one stay by her side for some time yet — she still has much to teach, after all. ｜ 在璃月港居民眼中，萍姥姥总将乖巧爱笑的瑶瑶带在身边，两人俨然一对亲密的祖孙。\n但其实这一老一少毫无血缘关系，瑶瑶是萍姥姥——或者说歌尘浪市真君的弟子。\n瑶瑶入门时年纪太小，连字都还没认全，真君便从日常应对，诗书礼仪开始教导。\n随着瑶瑶一天天长大，真君逐渐将仙家典仪、修身养性的法门，还有自己这一身枪术加入日课中。\n内容有些多，瑶瑶记不住，听不懂是常事，真君也并不着急，因为她看得出，瑶瑶的确将她劝学的话听了进去。\n枪杆沉重，这孩子不太拿得动，可还是坚持日日练习。\n诗书难背，她也每日努力诵读，梦话里都能蹦出一句「仓廪实而知礼节」。\n真君本想做个严师，既然瑶瑶如此令人省心，她便也稍稍放松了些要求。\n更令她心热的是，瑶瑶似乎真把她当作「姥姥」看待。\n才半人高的孩子，竟自作主张管起了她的饮食，寒暑交替时忧心她的身体，好像完全忘记了头疼脑热这种事对仙人来说并不常有。\n看那份亲热劲，她感觉自己仿佛真添了个孙女，意识到这一点之后，严厉的话就更说不出口了。\n当初结下师徒之缘时未作他想，如今真君是打心眼里放不下这个孩子，那就让她在自己身边再多陪伴些时日吧，自己想传授给她的还有许多。
- My master and her friend contended in the mystic arts all their lives without a clear victor. If I triumph here, then I will show myself to be superior to my master! ｜ 师父和她的朋友在神秘学方面斗了一辈子，也没能分出胜负。要是我能赢，那我不就比师父还厉害了！

- Small, multi-colored round pastries. The crisp shell wraps a thick, soft filling, and all is right with the world. - Miasma may not be fatal to humans, but long-term exposure to it does affect wild animals and monsters, making them more violent than usual. The more powerful the monster, the more severe the effects.\nTry defeating the <color=#FFE14BFF>leader of the monsters</color>, before following the trail to the <color=#FFE14BFF>source of the miasma</color> in the area and purifying it with adeptal energy. ｜ 尽管氲气本身对人类并无致命危害，但长久徘徊于其中的野兽和魔物依然会受到影响，变得比平常更为凶暴。而那些最为强大的魔物，受到的影响往往也更为严重。\n尝试击败<color=#FFE14BFF>魔物们的首领</color>，便能顺藤摸瓜，找到这一区域<color=#FFE14BFF>氲气的根源</color>，运用仙力将其净化。

- After entering the depths of the foundry, you come face to face with the very core of the god creation plan — the Fatui Harbinger known as The Balladeer. Just as Nahida reaches out with her hand, seeming to summon a certain power, The Balladeer suddenly wakes up and repels all of you. Although the sages haven't gotten the chance to infuse the Divine Knowledge Capsules into him, the power of a god has already been vested in The Balladeer. Abandoning his former name, "Kunikuzushi," The Balladeer has become a real god — Shouki no Kami. ｜ 你们进入了工坊深处，见到了造神计划的核心，愚人众执行官散兵。纳西妲向前伸出手去，似乎想要使用某种力量，散兵却忽然醒来，震退了你们。虽然贤者们尚未来得及向这新神体内注入神明罐装知识，但此刻的散兵的确拥有了神明的力量。抛弃了国崩之名的他，已化身货真价实的神明——正机之神。

- It has been many years since the Pyro Dragon Sovereign and the first human god tumbled together into the volcano's depths.\nThe Sacred City is pitch-dark, having been sealed. Whether through the loss of the primal flame or to adapt to realms now ruled by humanity, the ancient dragons have forsaken both wisdom and form. Others were reduced to ash when the furnace blazing in their breasts burned out.\nThe silver-white shadow steps alone into the turbulent blazing pool that lies within the ever-more-solitary city. ｜ 那是在火龙之王与初代人类的神明一同坠入火山深底以后许多年的事了。\n圣城因封绝而一片漆黑，远古的龙众因失去源火，或者为适应如今的人的国度而放弃了智慧与形体，或者因胸中的炉膛烧尽而成了死灰。\n银白色的影子在愈发寂寥的城中，独自踱入翻涌的焰池…
